name: Claire Low, NDRC
subject: This year’s races will help decide who controls the redistricting process in crucial battleground states
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Will you double down on your support and help elect Democracy Defenders across the country?
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105903805/539768620/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxNzExM2MxLTU1MWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dGM6JCEl8I26Js0i6MBwLzsfify1MtZJttecSR7EBTY=&emci=095d35f4-281a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=917113c1-551a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Right now, we’re riding a wave of momentum after a slate of critical election wins — from state legislative races that ensured Democratic control of key chambers to Judge Susan Crawford’s victory over her Trump-backed opponent in Wisconsin. These victories were possible with the generosity of grassroots supporters like you and countless hours of organizing on the ground. Now, as we look toward the horizon into the rest of the year ahead, we need to harness that same energy in vital elections that will decide the balance of power in...
* Michigan’s State Senate,
* Pennsylvania’s State Supreme Court,
* And Virginia’s House of Delegates — with Virginia also electing a new governor and lieutenant governor.

**Races like these could play a role in shaping the redistricting process in crucial battleground states.** [**So, as part of our 10 Year Plan to keep the GOP from gerrymandering themselves into unearned power, we’ll keep on endorsing Democracy Defenders in key state-level elections. And we’ll continue doing everything we can to help them cross the finish line. Make a contribution of $30 or more right now to help elect leaders who stand firmly against gerrymandering.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105903806/539768621/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_SpecialElection2025_email_20250415-NDRC-Tier1-SpecialElection2025_ctrl&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250415-NDRC-Tier1-SpecialElection2025_ctrl&utm_campaign=SpecialElection2025&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxNzExM2MxLTU1MWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dGM6JCEl8I26Js0i6MBwLzsfify1MtZJttecSR7EBTY=) Now, here’s something we’re keeping in mind: Democrats are outperforming expectations around the country. In 2025 special elections, we’ve seen _double-digit swings_ toward Democratic candidates from the 2024 general presidential election. **These high levels of enthusiasm can create new opportunities to win in surprising places — but we can only truly reach that potential with enough financial resources to meet the moment. Strong grassroots support helps expand the map.** We’ll need your support every step of the way to keep up the momentum and help elect pro-democracy candidates who are fighting for fair maps and fair elections in this year’s high-stakes races. clean_body: Will you double down on your support and help elect Democracy Defenders across the country? | Peter, Right now, we’re riding a wave of momentum after a slate of critical election wins — from state legislative races that ensured Democratic control of key chambers to Judge Susan Crawford’s victory over her Trump-backed opponent in Wisconsin. These victories were possible with the generosity of grassroots supporters like you and countless hours of organizing on the ground. Now, as we look toward the horizon into the rest of the year ahead, we need to harness that same energy in vital elections that will decide the balance of power in... Michigan’s State Senate, Pennsylvania’s State Supreme Court, And Virginia’s House of Delegates — with Virginia also electing a new governor and lieutenant governor. Races like these could play a role in shaping the redistricting process in crucial battleground states. = Now, here’s something we’re keeping in mind: Democrats are outperforming expectations around the country. In 2025 special elections, we’ve seen double-digit swings toward Democratic candidates from the 2024 general presidential election. These high levels of enthusiasm can create new opportunities to win in surprising places — but we can only truly reach that potential with enough financial resources to meet the moment. Strong grassroots support helps expand the map. We’ll need your support every step of the way to keep up the momentum and help elect pro-democracy candidates who are fighting for fair maps and fair elections in this year’s high-stakes races. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you so much for being a part of this movement, Claire Low Director of Political and Campaigns National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. subject: Hey, meet Rone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shadow Warriors Project
body:
| | | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/--T5cnDl3_o5WKoR-fGpCg2vsOIdggdL5Uicy5aqHQlpKD37P9r_egFtBuhjZ6fqp-9nTm0_pDfoWGGa4zq3cjTP-178KigPZuiWwFazV9sZe7KabsKraG-SpjRLDrsk2BFX7kBcZ9eHFQwh9MdhY-T9md8lVvEy23mDDdB5EgySA72pVPheqzOzRh9iVpYL_stWygoY6k36SdqxkPAmqaUu1qGnrrLVhWw3UCIR1FTyxZGqEbLwA7MegvCpKKxPkjP_TBI46ulEQLy7TAj1VHe5zZP3hvMWJFaXHUwyCzZHVOXMo6TCPTJVD0nomKyAeQxB-PGWUo_Lb7BDP5gZPEVZ12DdbVFv9q27cvyakw1rT7ByjmFHjuVS32AYREVLzTV6Da-sXZx2dtaawTWreaBtMW8/7e0tHBAvh0GeWa4d90EOEv-JZA0yZ2MR/8)
---
|
---
|
---
Peter, meet Rone.
She's 7 – and I’m proud to say she’s named in honor of Tyrone Woods, my fellow warrior who died next to me in Benghazi in 2012.
It will never come easy to talk about being abandoned by our government, _twice._
**Once for 13 hours in Benghazi, and again after I returned home without pay. **
My recovery process was long, costly and excruciating. I underwent 14 surgeries, primarily as a result of the shrapnel I took in my arms, neck and legs.
The physical recovery is just half of the battle, however. The other half was mental, but I got there, and Rone played a huge part in that.
This dog helped to bring me genuine healing and a new sense of purpose which I’ve channeled into helping other warriors facing similar challenges.
**Bonding a veteran with a service K9, and watching them train and grow together is an amazing thing to be a part of, and that’s why it’s such a big focus of ours at Shadow Warriors Project.**
Most military contractors, or “shadow warriors,” serve in classified programs for our government, and it's easy for them to be forgotten about.
Having been through it myself, I refuse to sit back when I have the power to help these warriors and their families who've given so much.
**[So here's my challenge for you today – make a tax-deductible donation, and empower us to bring healing, financial assistance and service K-9s to those who truly need and deserve it.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/2nvpX_J8Fl2sAWxi4mGqvlXiDYC3iOgMRPEvD3Forl2BXvvnwTPDIiv4oHTOwpJ6gXsIoMqR5R4IDOcR7sf9YGKBQ1h2fFII5Us6fDP7NDjSb7ZKtiQJRb560HLVa5XNtoEer0xinVmR1LgtiJXnzYdmro-XITQjEnDmZySa9fH2mMmMEVGwR8RmZhyUom6HL_afZPoHdWXbFjUMgXbfF16qv8bbUWZ2Q-VEYJYHr_zAo3o9MSIcjV6WBhsYvbzP1fghztif6xVHVN5Ff4pUbFfmXto9tRxDzjFv26BefNUMrHkPvgeiEXycC7dgRDuVNqFIW8WYqe1ZbgZ3fI9w-9k8UIsH62zEmJty4vlJ5SNRdC8Rl4DWWjWouPLzkXteTrOyNXjczJfWSRTkfSRtUYeDahE/mllkCC3d9X0V5OadxsOYXpUMVltE8Bas/8)**
Thanks for your time, and I hope we can count on your support.
Semper Fi,
Mark "Oz" Geist

|

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Respectfully
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends:
You’ve heard from my team about our goal for this April. We’re making some good progress already. But I want to make sure you hear from me, too. Could you let me explain?
I put on a Town Hall with Congressman Greg Stanton, Senator Cory Booker, and my wife, Gabby, in a Republican-held district in Tucson on Sunday. People are fired up. And we’ve got a lot of work to do so that we can harness that motivation and use it to defeat MAGA Republicans up and down the ballot next year. I’m personally invested in being a part of that work.
But alongside it, I’m getting a good bit of flak coming my way. It’s no secret that Elon Musk has taken a personal interest in attacking me these days, and he’s got the ear of the president. There’s no telling what might come next, but whatever it is, we have to be ready.
I love this country. That’s why I joined the Navy, NASA, and the U.S. Senate. I’ve always wanted to serve. And as tough as times are today, I’m glad I’m in a position to do that. I’m always ready to work.
**It’s not lost on me that your support got me here, and that’s why I’m respectfully asking:**
[**If you can afford it, will you make a $3 contribution to my campaign? We’re looking for 30,000 contributions for the month of April, and we’ll only get there with folks who know how important this moment is, chipping in whatever they can.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-apr25.P7mRSa&refcode=em250415-2-500&t=1&akid=6044%2E6688874%2EKB7yxu)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

I really can’t thank you enough for everything you’ve already done. It means the world to me.
Thank you again,
Mark

I owe my life to the United States of America
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kE9v8jAMhz9NcqNKnH_tIQdeUN_DWDVp2qRxy9pAg2oa0tKKbz_BWA--2I_9e2SHsQuHmyXmHwFoQzMQACLWBODyNWO6nvDl_6qKJ7m66ArVfQqbJzrBAp9rJ_e79z3Gj7eBo9ocq93rxBd8vEW_wM_QzKML3b1rtrSx4tAwSb3lRkqjoVCGtlZ_ay6dznOvjNRC5UJL5xtROMZqBpoGCwwUk1wzBiBUVoBSYIRQ6tAongsi2SMnc-hTqB0fxtml1PeY1T3SzrbjGIeHWEmgnFOfna9156_D71rdI4HyqUygnO41FrH9XM_VjYjy8TSxvWCqyr3bAU22iXPoujBoQyQ7_p2hk4WfAAAA__8-JW2k)

---
I never got to use a toilet seat. Instead, we had to share a hole in the ground with 8 other families. I was raised on food rationing coupons in the Sichuan province of China during Mao’s Cultural Revolution. I was only a child, yet I worshiped him like a God. I had no other choice. I was brainwashed. We all were. Eventually, I was able to escape from China and flee to the United States.
---
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8z0GP2yAQBeBfg2-2YADjHDi0G7mHbqNKVQ_dS0UAJ6yY4ACOlX-_chTlyOOT3huDcwzTXRP1nQCcgysEgPBvBOD6b8W8fOLPH-1h_hTttT-g3H7h7Ulv8MIXa8TH-58PnP_-Lgzl2-nw_uvGXrzeZ__Cz9LOowlxS9W-cZpPjorGa6aEUD3spGrOehgc93SYJsedp8YMR2qPFHaTEmx3HGwTNFCQVLCeUgAuux1ICYpzKScn2cCJoI-ezqDPwRpW6mpyTgk7m7CJ-lzrXB7DRgJj8XbJvlvDJXu3CQJjDPEubLqcsi-ltQkx1Or9pmvK9zZh-zxlJHxcKv4vacnWE76_2Eig3yL0LixI-P6Yn0n1eXuvmTVZu3kNMYbSKyLo6TF4m3fT8BUAAP__uLOB0w)
---
I spent the next 20 years uninstalling everything Mao’s regime had programmed into my brain, only to discover the very same evil was now being promoted in America and celebrated by the radical left. Then it hit me. I wasn’t just a product of the American Dream - I was also a survivor of Communist rule. **[My name is Lily Tang Williams, and I’m the Republican running for Congress in New Hampshire's 2nd Congressional District.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8z0GP2yAQBeBfg2-2YADjHDi0G7mHbqNKVQ_dS0UAJ6yY4ACOlX-_chTlyOOT3huDcwzTXRP1nQCcgysEgPBvBOD6b8W8fOLPH-1h_hTttT-g3H7h7Ulv8MIXa8TH-58PnP_-Lgzl2-nw_uvGXrzeZ__Cz9LOowlxS9W-cZpPjorGa6aEUD3spGrOehgc93SYJsedp8YMR2qPFHaTEmx3HGwTNFCQVLCeUgAuux1ICYpzKScn2cCJoI-ezqDPwRpW6mpyTgk7m7CJ-lzrXB7DRgJj8XbJvlvDJXu3CQJjDPEubLqcsi-ltQkx1Or9pmvK9zZh-zxlJHxcKv4vacnWE76_2Eig3yL0LixI-P6Yn0n1eXuvmTVZu3kNMYbSKyLo6TF4m3fT8BUAAP__uLOB0w)**
---
[**SUPPORT LILY'S CAMPAIGN**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8z0GP2yAQBeBfg2-2YADjHDi0G7mHbqNKVQ_dS0UAJ6yY4ACOlX-_chTlyOOT3huDcwzTXRP1nQCcgysEgPBvBOD6b8W8fOLPH-1h_hTttT-g3H7h7Ulv8MIXa8TH-58PnP_-Lgzl2-nw_uvGXrzeZ__Cz9LOowlxS9W-cZpPjorGa6aEUD3spGrOehgc93SYJsedp8YMR2qPFHaTEmx3HGwTNFCQVLCeUgAuux1ICYpzKScn2cCJoI-ezqDPwRpW6mpyTgk7m7CJ-lzrXB7DRgJj8XbJvlvDJXu3CQJjDPEubLqcsi-ltQkx1Or9pmvK9zZh-zxlJHxcKv4vacnWE76_2Eig3yL0LixI-P6Yn0n1eXuvmTVZu3kNMYbSKyLo6TF4m3fT8BUAAP__uLOB0w)
---
My story, my voice, and my campaign endanger everything the Democrats have built their party on - _I don’t fit their mold_. **[And now they’re preparing to spend millions to browbeat me into silence& end my candidacy.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8z0GP2yAQBeBfg2-2YADjHDi0G7mHbqNKVQ_dS0UAJ6yY4ACOlX-_chTlyOOT3huDcwzTXRP1nQCcgysEgPBvBOD6b8W8fOLPH-1h_hTttT-g3H7h7Ulv8MIXa8TH-58PnP_-Lgzl2-nw_uvGXrzeZ__Cz9LOowlxS9W-cZpPjorGa6aEUD3spGrOehgc93SYJsedp8YMR2qPFHaTEmx3HGwTNFCQVLCeUgAuux1ICYpzKScn2cCJoI-ezqDPwRpW6mpyTgk7m7CJ-lzrXB7DRgJj8XbJvlvDJXu3CQJjDPEubLqcsi-ltQkx1Or9pmvK9zZh-zxlJHxcKv4vacnWE76_2Eig3yL0LixI-P6Yn0n1eXuvmTVZu3kNMYbSKyLo6TF4m3fT8BUAAP__uLOB0w)** That’s why I’m humbly asking for your help today. My candidacy & our country truly do depend on it. I hope you’ll do what you can to save both today. Help me make history, Patriot.
---

name: Sharice Davids
subject: Get involved in any way you can
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Every one of us has the power to use our voices and put the pressure on our government

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105904908/539782919/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTZmNTZmNC01ODFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KXHGRbeut3DqGEmpGPkU4M6AsnrkAk00DRtd5rfuvJ4=) Hey, it’s Sharice. I know it’s getting late on a weekday, so I’ll try to make this quick. It’s no secret that Kansans are anxious about the future right now. We’re worried about the state of our democracy, the safety of our families, and the long-term future of Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare. I’ve heard from so many folks who are fed up with what they’re seeing in Washington — and they’ve asked me what they can do to bring about real progress. Here’s what I’ve told them: **Get involved in any way you can.** Because every single one of us has the power to use our voices, put the pressure on our leaders in government, and demand change. That could mean sharing your concerns with friends, neighbors, and coworkers. It could mean picking a cause and organizing folks in your community around it. It could mean protesting out in the streets, just as we saw across the country earlier this month. And it could even mean running for office yourself. Listen, I understand that the challenges we’re up against are very, very real, and the future we’re committed to building may seem out of reach. But we’ve made it through tough times before, and I know we can do it again. I promise that I will not sit on the sidelines in this fight for Kansas’ future, and I’m asking you to do the same. **And finally, I wanted to humbly ask for your grassroots support. clean_body: Every one of us has the power to use our voices and put the pressure on our government = Hey, it’s Sharice. I know it’s getting late on a weekday, so I’ll try to make this quick. It’s no secret that Kansans are anxious about the future right now. We’re worried about the state of our democracy, the safety of our families, and the long-term future of Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare. I’ve heard from so many folks who are fed up with what they’re seeing in Washington — and they’ve asked me what they can do to bring about real progress. Here’s what I’ve told them: Get involved in any way you can. Because every single one of us has the power to use our voices, put the pressure on our leaders in government, and demand change. That could mean sharing your concerns with friends, neighbors, and coworkers. It could mean picking a cause and organizing folks in your community around it. It could mean protesting out in the streets, just as we saw across the country earlier this month. And it could even mean running for office yourself. Listen, I understand that the challenges we’re up against are very, very real, and the future we’re committed to building may seem out of reach. But we’ve made it through tough times before, and I know we can do it again. I promise that I will not sit on the sidelines in this fight for Kansas’ future, and I’m asking you to do the same. And finally, I wanted to humbly ask for your grassroots support. I know that fundraising asks like these can be annoying, but the cold, hard truth is that they’re necessary — because we know that National Republicans are willing to spend millions to smear my record and kick me out of office. Thank you! TRULY, I’m grateful for you.

John 💛

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: We’re here to upend the status quo
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This is why we started Leaders We Deserve.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250415-1&t=1&akid=1988%2E587540%2EzhTBAD)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250415-1?refcode=em20250415-1988&amount=5&refcode2=1988_587540_zhTBAD&akid=1988%2E587540%2EzhTBAD)
Peter, we started Leaders We Deserve because young people are dramatically underrepresented in our government – and yet, younger leaders with big, bold, progressive values are the solution to so many problems we’re currently facing.
**We’re here to upend the status quo, break down the doors, and elect the next generation of leaders who are not afraid to stand up and fight for our futures.**
But we can’t win these fights without your support. Our organization and endorsed candidates accept _ZERO DOLLARS_ of corporate PAC money. We aren’t bankrolled by special interests and billionaires. We’re powered by real people like you who contribute anything they can afford to fuel these young progressives’ campaigns.
**[Peter, will you donate $5 or more now to support this important work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250415-1?refcode=em20250415-1988&amount=5&refcode2=1988_587540_zhTBAD&akid=1988%2E587540%2EzhTBAD)**

Thank you,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250415-1&t=2&refcode2=1988_587540_zhTBAD&akid=1988%2E587540%2EzhTBAD)**

clean_body: This is why we started Leaders We Deserve. Peter, we started Leaders We Deserve because young people are dramatically underrepresented in our government – and yet, younger leaders with big, bold, progressive values are the solution to so many problems we’re currently facing. We’re here to upend the status quo, break down the doors, and elect the next generation of leaders who are not afraid to stand up and fight for our futures. But we can’t win these fights without your support. Our organization and endorsed candidates accept ZERO DOLLARS of corporate PAC money. We aren’t bankrolled by special interests and billionaires. We’re powered by real people like you who contribute anything they can afford to fuel these young progressives’ campaigns. Thank you, Leaders We Deserve

name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: April 22 Town Hall with Congressman Clyburn
body:
New podcast launching Thursday!

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6068bde60f5e/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6418942?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
|
# Join me April 22 for a Town Hall with Congressman Clyburn in Spartanburg
---
[](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=25e6a24cf2&e=edbde6c9b1)
| Join us for an IN-PERSON People’s Town Hall in Spartanburg on Tuesday, April 22 with Congressman Jim Clyburn. Since Senators Lindsey Graham and Tim Scott, and Congressman William Timmons refuse to show up for their constituents, we will.Make your voice heard on the critical issues impacting our communities—from tariffs to healthcare to democracy itself. Learn how to get involved, organize, and hold your representatives accountable.Location details are emailed upon registration. Doors open at 5pm! Space is limited - registration required and does not guarantee entry.
---
| [Register for the Town Hall ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e68714edd4&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
# It’s tax time, and your reps are trying to raise them.
---
| The average South Carolinian is being hit hard by their representatives. Republicans in the State House have introduced H.4216 — the Flat Tax Bill — that proposed a flat income tax of 3.99%, quite different than the tax brackets currently in place ranging from 6.2% to 0%. The proposed overhaul of South Carolina’s income tax structure to establish [a flat tax would initially require nearly 60 percent of South Carolinians to pay more next year](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=69a41e73dd&e=edbde6c9b1). Much of that increase would fall on middle-income taxpayers, many of whom would pay nearly $600 more.
Though the bill did not advance in it’s current form, the chairs of South Carolina’s House and Senate budget committees have agreed to eliminate earmarks from the 2025–26 state budget (which hurt agencies and nonprofits), freeing up significant funds to accelerate income tax cuts – but**only for the wealthy**. The move reflects a growing focus on tax reform that seems to solely protect the rich.
---
| [Click here to watch my video on the Flat Income Tax ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=beb7062032&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | Meanwhile, as South Carolina Republicans are debating tax increases, Trump-backed tariffs have caused major disruptions in markets across the globe. American consumers will pay a heavy price: the average American family will pay $4,400 more this year and have experiences and average loss of $100,000 out of their 401k.
I dive deeper into this conversation with with Rep Wendell Jones from Greenville on my new podcast, **The Upstate Tea with Kathryn Harvey**. Tune in this Thursday as I join the crew from [Frogmore Stew - SC’s pop-politics podcast](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=b7de0a30a0&e=edbde6c9b1) \- as their weekly contributor from the Upstate.
---
[](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=12a2c042f0&e=edbde6c9b1)
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **An evening with Dr. Amalia Luxardo, CEO of Women’s Rights and Empowerment Network****April 28 at 5:30 pm Wofford College** A reception will be held before the event at 4:30pm at the York Family Portico.
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| | **A Candid Conversation****April 29th at 6pm Wofford College** Join Trey Gowdy, political commentator and former Congressman for SC-04 and Bakari Sellers, political commentator and former SC Representative for HD 90 for a conversation moderated by Billy Webster.
---
| April 16 SCDP Civil Rights & DEI Virtual Town Hall [Register Here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=64945088f2&e=edbde6c9b1)April 19 Together in Community Rally in Greenville at Unity Park. [Learn more here! ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=2d5e46b92f&e=edbde6c9b1)April 22 Spartanburg Town Hall with Rep. Clyburn. [Register Here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=49342701a0&e=edbde6c9b1)April 26 Indivisible Upstate Meeting at 10:30am at the Taylors Library & SPCDP OfficeApril 28 WREN Advocacy Session with Amalia Luxardo, CEO of WREN. April 29 A Conversation with Bakari Sellers & Trey Gowdy at Wofford. May 7 SPCDP Monthly Meeting at TK Gregg Community Center 6pm May 29 Fighting for Freedom Fundraiser. [RSVP here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=2f5cb36e84&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **STOP the Save Act -**[**Contact your Senator**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ab6bb2157b&e=edbde6c9b1) The US Senate is set to vote soon on the "Safeguard American Voter Eligibility" (SAVE) Act, a harmful bill that would disenfranchise millions by requiring passports or birth certificates to register and update voter information. Over 21 million Americans lack access to such documentation.
**Ask your SC Reps to Support H3211**| H3211 would allow DACA recipients to seek professional licensure in South Carolina, in. a state that already has a workforce shortage. We need to write our elected representatives or give them a call and let them know we SUPPORT the bill. [Here is a sample script](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=180b907516&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | The House is on furlough this week, meaning that no House floor debates or committee meetings are scheduled. The Senate meeting schedule for the week is [available here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=bcd71272e9&e=edbde6c9b1). Both chambers have until May 8 to pass legislation this calendar year. Any bills not passed by that date, known as [ _sine die_](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ca4cc0afb8&e=edbde6c9b1) , will carry over until the session returns in January 2026
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=b3c406aafd&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| It is no easy task to run for office. But in today's climate... it is a necessary one. Thank you to Emerge South Carolina’s Executive Director, Allison Terracio for hosting an informational candidate session in Spartanburg last week. We learned all about what it takes to run for office and support candidates leading up to the next election season.
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | READ: Post & Courier: [Timmons needs to choose a side on Trump’s Tariffs](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=375512afb9&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: Post & Courier: [Greenville County is a hotspot for eviction, could a special court help?](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=828db97928&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: Post & Courier: [House Speaker Johnson eyes cuts to Medicaid ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=499c4167fb&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: SC Daily Gazette: [Tariff Induced trade war spells trouble in SC](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=bd5316b4cd&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: WYFF: [Democratic Chairs Statement on BMW Attacks](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=3ca80db7e3&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: SC Daily Gazette: [SC Treasurer petitions to stop removal of office](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=144f476d0f&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: NBC: [Trump Administration freezes $2 Billion after Harvard rejects demands](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=863cafb5dc&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: NYT: [U.S. and El Salvador won’t return wrongly-accused man](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=66742f6a66&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: [Rep. Mace addressed more than 1,000 potential voters at the Greenville County GOP convention](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=a8773eb58f&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
[](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=9ac0960e90&e=edbde6c9b1)

Tune in this Thursday as I join the crew from \- as their weekly contributor from the Upstate. | | | | | | | | | | | | An evening with Dr. Amalia Luxardo, CEO of Women’s Rights and Empowerment NetworkApril 28 at 5:30 pm Wofford College A reception will be held before the event at 4:30pm at the York Family Portico. | | | | | | | | | | | | | A Candid ConversationApril 29th at 6pm Wofford College Join Trey Gowdy, political commentator and former Congressman for SC-04 and Bakari Sellers, political commentator and former SC Representative for HD 90 for a conversation moderated by Billy Webster. | April 16 SCDP Civil Rights & DEI Virtual Town Hall 19 Together in Community Rally in Greenville at Unity Park. 22 Spartanburg Town Hall with Rep. Clyburn. 26 Indivisible Upstate Meeting at 10:30am at the Taylors Library & SPCDP OfficeApril 28 WREN Advocacy Session with Amalia Luxardo, CEO of WREN. April 29 A Conversation with Bakari Sellers & Trey Gowdy at Wofford. May 7 SPCDP Monthly Meeting at TK Gregg Community Center 6pm May 29 Fighting for Freedom Fundraiser. | | | | | | | | | | | STOP the Save Act - The US Senate is set to vote soon on the "Safeguard American Voter Eligibility" (SAVE) Act, a harmful bill that would disenfranchise millions by requiring passports or birth certificates to register and update voter information. Over 21 million Americans lack access to such documentation. Ask your SC Reps to Support H3211| H3211 would allow DACA recipients to seek professional licensure in South Carolina, in. a state that already has a workforce shortage. We need to write our elected representatives or give them a call and let them know we SUPPORT the bill. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | The House is on furlough this week, meaning that no House floor debates or committee meetings are scheduled. The Senate meeting schedule for the week is . Both chambers have until May 8 to pass legislation this calendar year. Any bills not passed by that date, known as , will carry over until the session returns in January 2026 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | It is no easy task to run for office. But in today's climate... it is a necessary one. Thank you to Emerge South Carolina’s Executive Director, Allison Terracio for hosting an informational candidate session in Spartanburg last week. We learned all about what it takes to run for office and support candidates leading up to the next election season. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | READ: Post & Courier: : Post & Courier: : Post & Courier: : SC Daily Gazette: : WYFF: : SC Daily Gazette: : NBC: : NYT: : | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Kathryn for SC. name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Caraveo for Congress
body:
https://www.caraveoforcongress.com/ [https://www.caraveoforcongress.com/] Hey Peter,

I just wanted to take a moment to say thank you.

When I announced that I’m running to win back Colorado’s 8th District, I wasn’t sure what to expect. But the outpouring of support – from longtime friends to brand-new supporters – has been incredible. I’m so grateful to have you with me.

This campaign is personal. My parents came to this country in search of the American Dream. I became a pediatrician to help families here in Adams County. And when I saw how broken our system was – how hard it was for so many to afford basic health care or prescription drugs—I knew I had to do more.

That’s why I ran for Congress in the first place. And it’s why I’m running again – because Gabe Evans and the MAGA majority in Washington are doing real harm to the people I’ve spent my life fighting for.

We came just 2,449 votes short in 2024. This will be one of the closest races in the country. But with your help, I know we can win.

Thank you for standing with me. I’m proud to be in this fight with you.

Yadira

Team –
Donald Trump is back—and his actions are more dangerous than ever.
As Colorado’s next Attorney General, Jena will be on the frontlines defending our rights. She’s ready to take on Trump’s unconstitutional overreach and protect every Coloradan’s civil liberties.
Here’s what we’re up against:
* Trump is putting Elon Musk and other billionaires before working people.
* He’s trying to deport people without due process.
* He’s attacking birthright citizenship in defiance of the Constitution.
This isn’t leadership. Jena has never backed down from protecting our rights, and she won’t start now.
Chip in now to help us elect Jena and defend our rights. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250415-email]

Together, We Made History—And We're Just Getting Started

Thanks to the unwavering support of our faith community, we mobilized a statewide voter registration effort that reached every
county in New Jersey. From church basements to community centers, from sermons to street corners, we inspired thousands to make
their voices heard at the ballot box.

But we can't stop now. The momentum is real, and the need is urgent. With your continued support, we can keep empowering faith
leaders and congregations to lead the civic charge, bringing hope, dignity, and change from the pulpit to the polls.

Support this vital work. The future is ours to shape together.

Help us Give Voters the Tools to Decide for Themselves

In a time when confusion and misinformation can drown out the truth, people of faith need trusted resources to make informed
decisions at the ballot box. That’s why we’ve created a comprehensive Voter Guide—to clearly lay out where candidates stand on the
issues that matter most to our communities and our values.

But getting this guide into the hands of voters across New Jersey takes resources. With your support, we can produce, mail, and
share these guides far and wide, ensuring that every voice has the information needed to vote with confidence and conviction.

Christ is Risen. Christ is Lord. **_[Do you believe that, Peter?](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/lMWcdNHYAxE1CgP_gK8ha1vOVQiFymqsLYphtO_I2jSGhoukgZdqM8mRcWDfzU5pBVXwj9TTph1UAvgdXTCQ90Hz1ZyHARzuB_dxwRT8P7wULxarq6SYp4tdh8TbG_fUMNqbwE_kM-noVQ_UgIy9MhhuLlw0k-Ce0eVJlZ-0w9rrkeCmFq_Sb8nohgik_4Ti2qNYhgzDI-zHRmskluA019zFTh0H6l2qBFg3nZcorV0XbMxMBeujWn49ohKGRoCQ5OqSYnhwbO5y0LQrGcwdpUPeMUEFU6R9hmWlu3t870mUxK0le-gRtgRAeFsBtrSCDQOn9BcjMrMtQG1Yeg0XPjaqheXXdnT_8CaFTMfnqgLTo6-wiV0Q6uOBwNHXLz3jQRiAzGrmkr2Zf9gWua0opd6zFo2CYQBtXUkLKo0kJNsuQlHEmqBPN40LzIC4JrDDCwkfdhhUHrZJzvSph3n_0nJPFb_xH-oExrjjkFqXO1pwIivhYQ/enKqzingNkXZ3TnhuulI_hb3MuKeqphf/8)_** It’s Nancy Mace. As we celebrate Easter, I’m thanking Jesus — not just for the empty tomb, but for the fire in my soul to keep going. “No weapon forged against you will prevail...” — Isaiah 54:17 _**Let me remind you where I come from:**_ **Before Congress, I was a Waffle House waitress. Hustling to survive.** I wasn’t born with a silver spoon. _But by the grace of God, I became the first Republican woman ever elected to Congress from South Carolina._ Now I’m using that seat to speak truth in a world full of lies: 👉 There are TWO genders.
👉 Women are being erased by the woke Left.
👉 And Christians are under attack from every angle. **For saying those things, I’ve faced threats. Been smeared, mocked, and targeted.** But I will NEVER bow. Not to the mob. Not to the lies. Not to the Left. **We serve a God who parts seas, shuts the mouths of lions, and raises up warriors in their darkest hour.** And I believe we are here for a time such as this. **_Peter_ , if you’re a proud Christian who refuses to be silenced — I need you standing beside me.** The Left wants to erase Christ from American life. Not on my watch. _**[_**Say it with me this Easter: CHRIST IS LORD.**_](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/eQnHBIUMFiVT8le6vJ_EfcpOFk0BJns4jLdoMHk5ALv09GdsgTCUt6vk3e5BG1ZYBVM4YYmJZWXEaUuHTzsY5kq0UFmdp8bU2gGhwq_eMwrNNBnci2m8_4YKr47eYBY1DyH6hXDiJ3rwX98NfbzldKyx04ahjKIk8gIw6ImogEwzmDoUurTX7I5tKkRDAGxYAxdterSanwD6vDWhKaA_xnfIoq8zRBowvxtbkVa7YimEUo6rDPbmKvM42erdUZDKX9RAamEsjN99eSxElDCgUhFRGB2Fz7aBSeWTAFCYRHhZL2J559eG14opSNVIBnSdeaWQePzuJsyxbpJiXQtma88UIZwccdIgaoqppQ-cn-rciwQjB32bo3cpuA7gI4ktnQsUaeobi95mF8bKtE7AtbFiY8Su5bdTbihlAMjxoIQf-X5LDiD9r-Nr0hPo-iySqHzmj99NrSaa105WBTjPcKly7Qfhx8zRZfSt8wMRym5XwKdxCg/_wR16nxzwS1aJApXFZNRBZCJ5zXnIS5a/8)**_ _Can I count on you to chip in today and help me defend that truth in Congress?_ 🙏 And please — say a prayer for America. We need it now more than ever. — Nancy Mace

* * *
* **TOP NEWS**

"**Wilmer-Hutchins High School shootings leaves 4 wounded,** " Dallas Morning News' **Jamie Landers** ,**Talia Richman** ,**Matt Kyle** , **Alex Nguyen** and **Chase Rogers** \-- "Four students were wounded in [a shooting Tuesday afternoon](https://substack.com/redirect/1ba2f2ec-1f9e-48f8-a865-3866534a1945?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at Wilmer-Hutchins High School in Dallas -- nearly a year to the day since gunfire erupted on the same campus.

Officers were dispatched about 1 p.m. to the school in the 5500 block of Langdon Road. A police call log showed more than 20 units responded to the scene.

**Jason Evans** , a Dallas Fire-Rescue spokesman, confirmed four students were taken to hospitals. Their conditions varied, he said, from not life-threatening to serious.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/f8de2584-86d0-4f7d-973f-842ae10b7211?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
According to Evans, three of the students ranged in age from 15 to 18, and all were injured by gunfire. The age of the fourth, who suffered a "musculoskeletal injury to the lower body," was not immediately known.

At a news conference about 5 p.m.,**Christina Smith** , Dallas ISD's assistant chief of police, said the suspected shooter, who was not publicly identified, had not been arrested. In an internal police message obtained by _The Dallas Morning News,_ Dallas police __ officials provided a description of a suspected person and directed officers across the city to look for him.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/f8de2584-86d0-4f7d-973f-842ae10b7211?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Officials declined to comment on how a gun got inside the school, which has metal detectors and a clear backpack policy. However, Smith said the gun did not enter the building "during regular intake time."

"It was not a failure of our staff, of our protocols, or of the machinery that we have," Smith said.

Dallas schools Superintendent**Stephanie Elizalde** said at the news conference that Gov. **Greg Abbott** called to ask for a status update and offered resources in support. Beyond local law enforcement, Elizalde said troopers from the Department of Public Safety, as well as the FBI and Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives were present.

[Classes were canceled](https://substack.com/redirect/95a2c522-660f-474d-97d5-8c950f38821e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at the high school for the rest of the week, though Elizalde said there will be mental health support for those who need it.

"You don't ever just get used to this," she said.

Elizalde added that Wilmer-Hutchins Elementary School will have classes as normal on Wednesday. The facility was placed under lockdown due to its proximity to the high school, but there was no danger posed to its students and staff, she said." [DMN](https://substack.com/redirect/52eefd2e-2e15-474f-9eb8-be12801b0ad4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

TOP NEWS "Wilmer-Hutchins High School shootings leaves 4 wounded, " Dallas Morning News' Jamie Landers ,Talia Richman ,Matt Kyle , Alex Nguyen and Chase Rogers \-- "Four students were wounded in at Wilmer-Hutchins High School in Dallas -- nearly a year to the day since gunfire erupted on the same campus. Officers were dispatched about 1 p.m. to the school in the 5500 block of Langdon Road. A police call log showed more than 20 units responded to the scene. Jason Evans , a Dallas Fire-Rescue spokesman, confirmed four students were taken to hospitals. Their conditions varied, he said, from not life-threatening to serious. According to Evans, three of the students ranged in age from 15 to 18, and all were injured by gunfire. The age of the fourth, who suffered a "musculoskeletal injury to the lower body," was not immediately known. At a news conference about 5 p.m.,Christina Smith , Dallas ISD's assistant chief of police, said the suspected shooter, who was not publicly identified, had not been arrested. In an internal police message obtained by The Dallas Morning News, Dallas police officials provided a description of a suspected person and directed officers across the city to look for him. Officials declined to comment on how a gun got inside the school, which has metal detectors and a clear backpack policy. However, Smith said the gun did not enter the building "during regular intake time." "It was not a failure of our staff, of our protocols, or of the machinery that we have," Smith said. Dallas schools SuperintendentStephanie Elizalde said at the news conference that Gov. Greg Abbott called to ask for a status update and offered resources in support. Beyond local law enforcement, Elizalde said troopers from the Department of Public Safety, as well as the FBI and Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives were present. at the high school for the rest of the week, though Elizalde said there will be mental health support for those who need it. "You don't ever just get used to this," she said. Elizalde added that Wilmer-Hutchins Elementary School will have classes as normal on Wednesday. The facility was placed under lockdown due to its proximity to the high school, but there was no danger posed to its students and staff, she said." At a news conference about 5 p.m.,**Christina Smith** , Dallas ISD's assistant chief of police, said the suspected shooter, who was not publicly identified, had not been arrested. In an internal police message obtained by _The Dallas Morning News,_ Dallas police __ officials provided a description of a suspected person and directed officers across the city to look for him.

Officials declined to comment on how a gun got inside the school, which has metal detectors and a clear backpack policy. However, Smith said the gun did not enter the building "during regular intake time."

"It was not a failure of our staff, of our protocols, or of the machinery that we have," Smith said.

Dallas schools Superintendent**Stephanie Elizalde** said at the news conference that Gov. **Greg Abbott** called to ask for a status update and offered resources in support. Beyond local law enforcement, Elizalde said troopers from the Department of Public Safety, as well as the FBI and Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives were present.

[Classes were canceled](https://substack.com/redirect/3d565f09-3bab-4403-8b3e-1c565e696e56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at the high school for the rest of the week, though Elizalde said there will be mental health support for those who need it.

"You don't ever just get used to this," she said.

Elizalde added that Wilmer-Hutchins Elementary School will have classes as normal on Wednesday. The facility was placed under lockdown due to its proximity to the high school, but there was no danger posed to its students and staff, she said." TOP NEWS "Wilmer-Hutchins High School shootings leaves 4 wounded, " Dallas Morning News' Jamie Landers ,Talia Richman ,Matt Kyle , Alex Nguyen and Chase Rogers \-- "Four students were wounded in at Wilmer-Hutchins High School in Dallas -- nearly a year to the day since gunfire erupted on the same campus. Officers were dispatched about 1 p.m. to the school in the 5500 block of Langdon Road. A police call log showed more than 20 units responded to the scene. Jason Evans , a Dallas Fire-Rescue spokesman, confirmed four students were taken to hospitals. Their conditions varied, he said, from not life-threatening to serious. According to Evans, three of the students ranged in age from 15 to 18, and all were injured by gunfire. The age of the fourth, who suffered a "musculoskeletal injury to the lower body," was not immediately known. At a news conference about 5 p.m.,Christina Smith , Dallas ISD's assistant chief of police, said the suspected shooter, who was not publicly identified, had not been arrested. In an internal police message obtained by The Dallas Morning News, Dallas police officials provided a description of a suspected person and directed officers across the city to look for him. Officials declined to comment on how a gun got inside the school, which has metal detectors and a clear backpack policy. However, Smith said the gun did not enter the building "during regular intake time." "It was not a failure of our staff, of our protocols, or of the machinery that we have," Smith said. Dallas schools SuperintendentStephanie Elizalde said at the news conference that Gov. Greg Abbott called to ask for a status update and offered resources in support. Beyond local law enforcement, Elizalde said troopers from the Department of Public Safety, as well as the FBI and Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives were present. at the high school for the rest of the week, though Elizalde said there will be mental health support for those who need it. "You don't ever just get used to this," she said. Elizalde added that Wilmer-Hutchins Elementary School will have classes as normal on Wednesday. The facility was placed under lockdown due to its proximity to the high school, but there was no danger posed to its students and staff, she said." Officers were dispatched about 1 p.m. to the school in the 5500 block of Langdon Road. A police call log showed more than 20 units responded to the scene.

**Jason Evans** , a Dallas Fire-Rescue spokesman, confirmed four students were taken to hospitals. Their conditions varied, he said, from not life-threatening to serious.

According to Evans, three of the students ranged in age from 15 to 18, and all were injured by gunfire. The age of the fourth, who suffered a “musculoskeletal injury to the lower body,” was not immediately known.

At a news conference about 5 p.m.,**Christina Smith** , Dallas ISD’s assistant chief of police, said the suspected shooter, who was not publicly identified, had not been arrested. In an internal police message obtained by _The Dallas Morning News,_ Dallas police __ officials provided a description of a suspected person and directed officers across the city to look for him.

Officials declined to comment on how a gun got inside the school, which has metal detectors and a clear backpack policy. However, Smith said the gun did not enter the building “during regular intake time.”

“It was not a failure of our staff, of our protocols, or of the machinery that we have,” Smith said.

Dallas schools Superintendent**Stephanie Elizalde** said at the news conference that Gov. **Greg Abbott** called to ask for a status update and offered resources in support. Beyond local law enforcement, Elizalde said troopers from the Department of Public Safety, as well as the FBI and Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives were present.

(limited time) | TOP NEWS "Wilmer-Hutchins High School shootings leaves 4 wounded, ” Dallas Morning News' Jamie Landers ,Talia Richman ,Matt Kyle , Alex Nguyen and Chase Rogers \-- "Four students were wounded in at Wilmer-Hutchins High School in Dallas — nearly a year to the day since gunfire erupted on the same campus. Officers were dispatched about 1 p.m. to the school in the 5500 block of Langdon Road. A police call log showed more than 20 units responded to the scene. Jason Evans , a Dallas Fire-Rescue spokesman, confirmed four students were taken to hospitals. Their conditions varied, he said, from not life-threatening to serious. » According to Evans, three of the students ranged in age from 15 to 18, and all were injured by gunfire. The age of the fourth, who suffered a “musculoskeletal injury to the lower body,” was not immediately known. At a news conference about 5 p.m.,Christina Smith , Dallas ISD’s assistant chief of police, said the suspected shooter, who was not publicly identified, had not been arrested. In an internal police message obtained by The Dallas Morning News, Dallas police officials provided a description of a suspected person and directed officers across the city to look for him. » Officials declined to comment on how a gun got inside the school, which has metal detectors and a clear backpack policy. However, Smith said the gun did not enter the building “during regular intake time.” “It was not a failure of our staff, of our protocols, or of the machinery that we have,” Smith said. Dallas schools SuperintendentStephanie Elizalde said at the news conference that Gov. Greg Abbott called to ask for a status update and offered resources in support. Beyond local law enforcement, Elizalde said troopers from the Department of Public Safety, as well as the FBI and Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives were present. at the high school for the rest of the week, though Elizalde said there will be mental health support for those who need it. “You don’t ever just get used to this,” she said. Elizalde added that Wilmer-Hutchins Elementary School will have classes as normal on Wednesday. The facility was placed under lockdown due to its proximity to the high school, but there was no danger posed to its students and staff, she said." This is when we lay the groundwork—organizing, reaching voters, and defending every inch of WA-08 before special interests flood it with more cash. We can’t afford to fall behind. = | = Every dollar helps us stay on track and stay in this fight. I know Kim is so proud of the work we’ve done—and I’m even more excited to help her reach her goals in the months ahead. Thanks, Stuart Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: AOC
subject: We are at a crossroads.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
This movement is not about partisan labels or purity tests. It is about class solidarity.
It's about the thousands of _you_ who stand together and say **our lives deserve dignity, and our work deserves respect**.
It will never be just institutions and officials alone that uphold our democracy. It will always be the people — the masses who refuse to comply with authoritarian regimes — who are the last and strongest defense of our country and our freedoms.
We are at a crossroads: oligarchy or democracy. But we cannot have both.
I've made my choice. **We must fight the oligarchy that has created this nightmare**.
And that is why I have never taken money from lobbyists or corporations. And it's why I never will.
But beyond elections, **our task is to build community**. Block associations, volunteer groups, church organizations, PTA's, activist organizations — because **community is the most powerful building block we have to defeat authoritarianism and root out corruption**.
This is the path to guaranteeing healthcare to every American, to establish a living minimum wage, to take on skyrocketing rents and mortgages, to tackle the climate crisis, and establish a country where the American Dream is actually possible for us.
Because we know that a better world is possible. **And we are willing to do something about it**.
[Will you contribute right now to help us power our Fighting Oligarchy tour on the road?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250415-2.YSraKl&refcode=em20250415-8620-P_FND_EGR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8620%2E2526796%2E2Ro1Zf)
Your support allows us to rally people together at record scale to organize their communities for the better world that we know is possible.
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250415-2.YSraKl&refcode=em20250415-8620-P_FND_EGR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8620%2E2526796%2E2Ro1Zf)**
Pa’lante,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250415-2?refcode=em20250415-8620-P_FND_EGR_CTR&t=21&refcode2=8620_2526796_2Ro1Zf&akid=8620%2E2526796%2E2Ro1Zf)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250415-8620-P_FND_EGR_CTR&t=22&akid=8620%2E2526796%2E2Ro1Zf)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=8620%2E2526796%2E2Ro1Zf) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=8620%2E2526796%2E2Ro1Zf) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=8620%2E2526796%2E2Ro1Zf)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=8620%2E2526796%2E2Ro1Zf)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=8620%2E2526796%2E2Ro1Zf)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Ken Paxton
subject: One week ago today
body:
[](https://kenpaxton.cmail20.com/t/r-l-thdliudt-nuylrudkjy-y/)

| |
---|---|---
| Fellow patriot, One week ago today, I launched my campaign for U.S. Senate. This first week has been incredible, and I’m grateful beyond words for all the support I’ve received these last few days. It’s crystal clear that there are millions of patriots who know what I know: It’s time for a change. And in March of 2026, _change is coming._ Because of my rock-solid America First record and steadfast support for President Trump, polling has me currently LEADING John Cornyn. But now is not the time to take our foot off the gas. [**_Will you chip in to make sure I hit my fundraising goal for my VERY FIRST WEEK as a candidate?_**](https://kenpaxton.cmail20.com/t/r-l-thdliudt-nuylrudkjy-j/) [donate online today](https://kenpaxton.cmail20.com/t/r-l-thdliudt-nuylrudkjy-t/) [**$5, $10, $20**](https://kenpaxton.cmail20.com/t/r-l-thdliudt-nuylrudkjy-d/)—any amount helps, and every dollar counts! We’re just getting started, and together we will win this. Thank you again for your support, Ken Paxton |

_**[I won't stand for more liberal threats to go unchallenged, and that's why I'm taking the fight back to them in the upcoming midterm elections.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/0gdIYNaRsYfKoP-KDVWODA~~/AAVLBhA~/MdxMiFEc2RSlSMPFAUa0vx_eo-wExOTxHul29nAeg_M1uwBBZidefneiuz1JhqNCqFJiwbqOxoT3rUiKZlZboSYnt1f2IJ406M9N_NyXhRt7CSLu4_EJiUswL8lJTCU3fJ7TGgLPN1SF9hkD8IoIWbWDiJq2ZCyB9O43D9EX034HgrBGyHva-0eWT4N0xWWwbdtCd5Pad5SN0dFBPPkuYAjnHJkcwmCUumhRKah2fTREJxJsiwvexPgavABAP6olS_WJDPCyU_4C4SYCQOCYhdkKvhBLv__l2bb5ci5m3GklrSzGThq1o8S6LYsCvn_h8q4lnJ4pujz4XifRtWesUn26o3k5yAxUxFAS_Nn6rgOKLVfoIgV6X-j_INkM5PVKkFy7AHcNjB3k8bzLpd9nEw~~)**_

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Defeat DEI Survey
body:
DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs541gakvjd8ehe8qhqmsnvdjl1od6esccbt68a0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctieeor1chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkbmld9qgi4josolqnbdntg4opbhguos0d38i60o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctieeor1chh2bs).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqliv5u689643nvbp8m9n6vjaassv37gcs9ule18_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctieeor1chh2bs)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Dave McCormick
subject: Wrestling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
I know firsthand the blood, sweat, and tears that wrestlers have to pour into this sport is spellbinding.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6kaedkob6cnc2q9q29ku01mtclb5l7ptfes50u8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctieeor3cph2bs)

Friend,

I grew up wrestling across Pennsylvania. I know firsthand the blood, sweat, and tears that wrestlers have to pour into this sport is spellbinding.

So when I watched those incredible athletes step up to the mat in Philadelphia, **[I was reminded of the lessons I learned from wrestling, and how they have impacted me even to this day.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrhodn95aq238k8co8u7d501db2imdujp4b505cg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctieeor3cph2bs)**

During my senior year at West Point, I was tested. I was the captain of the U.S. Army's wrestling team and I blew out my knee and had to finish the season with a torn ACL. Working through that injury and leading the team as team captain while performing on the mat was a real challenge.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgneeq25n1hq2tmqgv0vd0ahi1stosii6u95qui0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctieeor3cph2bs)

**But I 'm no stranger to challenges. I've been challenged and tested my entire life. I've learned from the victories and the defeats on the mat, on the battlefield, and now in the U.S. Senate.**
[DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z29imro62bokstdrq98aumr5e0pcppr8ttb1jr30_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctieeor3cph2bs)
---

As we speak, I'm fighting to lower costs for families, unleash American energy, make our communities safer, and ensure every citizen has the opportunity to achieve their version of the American Dream.

**But the fight isn 't easy.** It takes hard work, courage, the capacity to overcome adversity, and respect--_all of which I learned through my time wrestling._

**[Now, as I continue to go to the mat for America, I'm asking for your support. Can I count on you to chip in a generous donation of $25 or more today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjmr6eq615ov79ue3oesj5rcglcl3keb4g6a3khg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctieeor3cph2bs)**
[DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z44g62ks4lossrjdcfnhocj2gs3rr3dpqfotg07g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctieeor3cph2bs)
---

The work being done in Washington can be grueling and difficult, but the end result is well worth it. We've already made incredible progress to confirm cabinet secretaries in record speed, combat the opioid epidemic, support small businesses, unleash American energy, cut bloated government, slash wasteful spending, and so much more.

_This is just the beginning ..._

With so much more work still to be done, I'm asking for your support. **[Before the day is over, please consider chipping in to help me continue the fight.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5bqimlib0cpo9ekf63t5nd9m3etqtqu8t8u79t0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctieeor3cph2bs)**
[DONATE $25](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpj9nakgdpbq62inktkbtl7mqqkc48mju9vtgi8g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctieeor3cph2bs)
---
[DONATE $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z19idk5ruint06bv0b6p8fnkj9lgk9i5ceq4lcf8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctieeor3cph2bs)
---
[DONATE $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd2jts19v4ejdlhj1msi2kf2hv66mnp7m2ct2gq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctieeor3cph2bs)
---
[DONATE $500](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfohqrnntjsihnaone2buug6c7uogpd1b6hbnfng_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctieeor3cph2bs)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z070c4qs85t8iblj1csmir6ua2cmm8b7s7mp59cg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctieeor3cph2bs)
---

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

Sincerely,
Sen. Dave McCormick
[DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztrosq6uga3irt1jh55t4du2l9fs2ns2ddqnpmd0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctieeor3cph2bs)

clean_body: I know firsthand the blood, sweat, and tears that wrestlers have to pour into this sport is spellbinding. Friend, I grew up wrestling across Pennsylvania. I know firsthand the blood, sweat, and tears that wrestlers have to pour into this sport is spellbinding. So when I watched those incredible athletes step up to the mat in Philadelphia, During my senior year at West Point, I was tested. I was the captain of the U.S. Army's wrestling team and I blew out my knee and had to finish the season with a torn ACL. Working through that injury and leading the team as team captain while performing on the mat was a real challenge. But I 'm no stranger to challenges. I've been challenged and tested my entire life. I've learned from the victories and the defeats on the mat, on the battlefield, and now in the U.S. Senate. As we speak, I'm fighting to lower costs for families, unleash American energy, make our communities safer, and ensure every citizen has the opportunity to achieve their version of the American Dream. But the fight isn 't easy. It takes hard work, courage, the capacity to overcome adversity, and respect--all of which I learned through my time wrestling. The work being done in Washington can be grueling and difficult, but the end result is well worth it. We've already made incredible progress to confirm cabinet secretaries in record speed, combat the opioid epidemic, support small businesses, unleash American energy, cut bloated government, slash wasteful spending, and so much more. This is just the beginning ... With so much more work still to be done, I'm asking for your support. Thank you in advance for your generous support. Sincerely, Sen. Dave McCormick Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick. Our mailing address is: PO BOX 23537 PITTSBURGH, PA 15222 Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlnqnqs5l9k8e5rif8polbl13h8ltftfk14dmus0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctieeor0sdh2bs)

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Defeat DEI Survey
body:
DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs9c9rvgbm1o3sr7nlr8lvu9l2qdupkog8ferfo0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctie9ob6c1h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmq6d960qe3nesu6e1dsu6214sl1phe4gl5pe3m0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctie9ob6c1h2bs).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn2d6akg0r4q1qmf3bv38m1ihnpuaq3979shh0go_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctie9ob6c1h2bs)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: These aren’t easy words for me to say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But here goes nothing...

But here goes nothing...
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zme5ekn655u4g3t43nnab3ftmo8nvli2ndvk7jt8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g68oj6cth2bs)
---
Friend,
---
None of this is easy for me to say, but here it goes...
---
All my life I’ve been known as a fighter.
---
I fought the mob head on in New York as America's mayor. I fought the sham witch hunts against President Trump. I’ve fought to defend my good name against the Left’s vicious lies, smears, and attacks.
---
**But over the past few years – and I hope you’ll agree – _I’ve fought the hardest of my ENTIRE life for my freedom and true justice._ **
---
The Radical Democrats and their accomplices labeled me a “ _DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_ ,” _RAIDED_ my home, _ARRESTED_ me, took a _MUGSHOT_ of me, and forced me into _BANKRUPTCY_.
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4um422b92lutun620ennepf5hhrn2im73s7dpb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g68oj6cth2bs)
__
---
_But every step of the way I’ve fought with every fiber of my being – supported by generous patriots like _YOU_ – and here I am, still standing!_
---
**However, the truth is, through every sham indictment, false arrest, and bogus charge where I’ve had to defend my innocence and good name, I’ve been saddled with enormous legal bills, unimaginable costs, and debts.**
---
**And if we’re being honest with each other, it’s a cost I simply cannot bear on my own.**
---
Make no mistake, this was the vindictive Democrats’ plan all along...
---
_This latest sham criminal case in Arizona – where if the Democrat Attorney General gets her way, I could take my last breath in prison – is designed to bleed me dry._
---
That’s why I now have no choice but to set a goal to raise $50,000 before week’s end for my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can continue fighting to remain a FREE man.
---
I hate reaching out like this, and this is difficult for me to say, but right now, my fate is truly in _your_ hands.
---
_But let me make something perfectly clear: If you’re struggling right now or can’t afford to contribute, please know I understand. I would never want you to suffer hardship in your wish to alleviate my hardship. Take care of your family and yourself first! Your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough. God Bless you!_
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me raise the $50,000 I need to continue fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats try to JAIL me for LIFE as an innocent man.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zveo088hblkcmj0ddfchvdngrv16ke8fiirrovl8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g68oj6cth2bs)
---

__
---

---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z032klrlrn1h4v8o4sm8oebr02gb5ecpp8tm1f8g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g68oj2c3h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs7ge3he32ik22dgbj472svt1olurtbvghdr2r4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g68oj2c3h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5ok1nrpaqpiiqqcuta9um78c7mknqm2j4ivbd30_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g68oj2c3h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z32c91r54998l14a3r00mnnlil3i0o4qq4pmejco_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g68oj2c3h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu13hi6ubdldsctdc9lra4gebnco257gsro7icig_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g68oj2c3h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2cp4hjejkdic463opm3fb0gujmcgj3rjou5g810_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g68oj2c3h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z798umk2ll46ar99anjvfb7qtjmmj39ha1h97go8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g68oj2c3h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zin1i1g7fhhmas49tbesncm0qcditfigdah9vsmo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g68oj2c3h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztjdr1ar9jajhogd6hgi2rrt23ac7dcrrokudtc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g68oj2c3h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---

---

# **[Army Takes Control of Over 100,000 Acres Along Southern Border to Fight Illegal Immigration](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
The U.S. Army is stepping in to help secure a large stretch of land along the southern border, following a new directive from President Trump. On Tuesday, Secretary of the Interior Doug Burgum announced that nearly 110,000 acres of federal land in New Mexico will now be under Army control for the next three years. [...]

# **[Budget Group Says Actual Federal Debt Is $158.6 Trillion](http://trk.libertyledger.__oI9hIH9IuK-DcYg)**
---
As Americans file their taxes at the last minute this April 15, the federal debt – and Americans’ federal debt burden – continues to grow. While the federal government reports a national debt nearing $37 trillion, one budget watchdog says the figure is actually much higher: $158.6 trillion, amounting to $974,000 for each federal taxpayer. While the federal government reports a national debt nearing $37 trillion, one budget watchdog says the figure is actually much higher: $158.6 trillion, amounting to $974,000 for each federal taxpayer. [...]...Click to read more A company that makes baby food sold under a Target store brand is recalling more than 25,000 packages of a product because it may contain elevated levels of lead. Miami-based Fruselva issued the recall in March for Target’s Good & Gather Baby Pea, Zucchini, Kale & Thyme Vegetable Puree, sold in 4-ounce tubs, according to [...]...Click to read more The family of Karmelo Anthony says they’re the target of racist attacks. P.O. Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178 No longer want to receive the Liberty Ledger? Unsubscribe .
