name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zku26cuhf0n8cgns5hpmojicrk54vojljoopj8o8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g64p32chh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z804d4rqv2lk2ku3fbsmhvv5c0m16lau1t6ptpfo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g64p32chh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdbiab2gofpetamggisou56ub8oo9tj5op4rplj0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g64p32chh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv6rtgr5ehghsb35v3kdnhndvqmbn0nur9p572vg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g64p32chh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0hi29vvo2ld5r5n9i4qmhdus1oc639f0d48etuo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g64p32chh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmk65qkh2din23rbfr46oi5f8f2bp631j3ss11h0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g64p32chh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlm2r824jssimk09s9fvr9polmpbv05fr8njqio0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g64p32chh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zf7uu6aic5n20dbn547jc0ickspc2adq82h1vqng_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g64p32chh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmaclkgmo7i5l7ocdnb42cfucdvlgo8hsq4isqi0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g64p32chh2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---

---

name: USAF/ANG Combat Veteran Troy Downing
subject: I'm about to throw in the towel.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I’m no stranger to pulling myself up by the bootstraps, but I need your help.

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Peter, I'm about to throw in the towel.

I thought there were more Patriots like you out there who'd be willing to take a stand with me. But the response has been deafening silence.

My name is Troy Downing, and I'm a combat veteran, a Christian, a husband, and a proud dad. I'm also a GOP freshman on a mission to put America First.

**As you know, House Republicans are clinging to a razor-thin majority - just a handful of seats stand between us and the radical Left taking control. And the Democrats will stop at nothing to flip it.**

I have to face the facts: My first major End-of-Quarter deadline is at the end of this month, and this may be our final shot to get back on track before our fundraising numbers go public.

I'm not looking for a handout or a huge donation. **[**I just need a small contribution from Patriots like you to keep my campaign afloat.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**
---
[ **RUSH REINFORCEMENTS**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Every little bit counts, and without it, I'm done.

If I can defend this critical House seat, it'll be a crushing defeat for the radical Left. But I need your help to make it happen.

[**Will you stand with me, Peter, and chip in a few bucks to help a combat vet take down the Democrat machine?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._Aa6Rc6OKLmrA)
---
[ ** SEND HELP NOW **](https://trk.emails.troydowning._-8aa2tFYg)
---
Your support would be a godsend.

Sincerely,Troy Downing
_Conservative Veteran_
---

name: Lara Trump
subject: This is what we’re up against
body:
To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.

| | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.
---
| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zif2pijq2bjep6qnsk033a0cea52evk168lfvbag_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g66or2c9h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, **[I need you to join the fight.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcv59uepgsepukar91vfppgqvrp1f7evm0tcvgi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g66or2c9h2bs)** Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree.But here's the reality.So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children.But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left.In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. **[**And that's why your support to Brave Books today is so critical.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z387f1vr0dsggiadda7ahsj0glcctcrfqg3emg6o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g66or2c9h2bs)** I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. **[**And the #1 thing you can do today is help by giving your best donation to Brave Books right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsabrgvbp4lulb9cfqochq7j8l5v7l4kef5losng_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g66or2c9h2bs)** If you've heard of **Brave Books** , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on _Fox News_ for countering the Left's horrible poison. **Brave Books** fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian **Kirk Cameron** (_Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof_) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great **Brave Books** with conservative messages such as:
---
* _The Test of Lionhood_ by **Kevin Sorbo --** Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good.
* _The Night the Snow Monster Attacked_ by **General Michael Flynn --** Shows children what it takes to be a good leader.
* _Happy No Snake Day_ by**Riley Gaines --** Encourages children to stand up for the truth.
* _Because You're My Family_ by **Missy Robertson --** Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love.

---
| | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several **Brave Books**. But my favorite is _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at **Brave Books** aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My **Brave Book** , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. **[That's why I hope you’ll support Brave Books today by giving a gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt276cbuqhtui8gsudn8urru754a02jl3dhfqcp8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g66or2c9h2bs)** Your gift helps **Brave Books** create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.**I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your[gift of $100 or more](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrg4pfm7udh47btf7k999savvtp01at2sh9o5n7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g66or2c9h2bs), I'll send you a copy of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ as a special "Thank you" from me.** Sharing the lessons of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children,
---
| | Lara TrumpWife, Mother, and Author
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zslr19rp20o5t6oaipu4m6p4dbefhotva1gbsr9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g66or2c9h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3oeo2uk30pu4k4cagun6npp09dlltfhvsean438_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g66or2c9h2bs)
---
**Lara Trump** **Wife, Mother, and Author**
---
|
---
| | **P.S. If we do nothing, we're just handing America's children over to the Left.[Please help me fight by giving to Brave Books to protect our children today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5hrp74kjla2d5tgl78ofqouec44pm41gjhpgt4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g66or2c9h2bs) **Thank you! - Lara
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqbep1li62dhoqm150a3kppl7coipi48tk0leqfg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3g66or2c9h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
---

---

name: Widowmaker Knife
subject: You're going to love this!
body:
What is this freaky weapon?...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21119/6374453/1addb951cfa433647622619c546151ab06bb1bbd/c21be753adea9f277eb67fc94860f9a153066509)
---
| | |
---
_April 16th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
| | **Help Us Field-Test the Widowmaker

** **200 Knives. No Gimmicks. Just Grit.** This isn’t a toy. And it sure as hell isn’t some flimsy wall-hanger.

The **Steel River Widowmaker** is our most aggressive blade yet—a full-tang, 9.5" recurve beast forged from 5CR15MOV stainless steel, made for people who actually _use_ their gear.
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21119/6374453/1addb951cfa433647622619c546151ab06bb1bbd/c21be753adea9f277eb67fc94860f9a153066509)
---
Before we roll it out nationwide, we’re putting it in the hands of real Americans who know what it means to carry a knife that can handle anything.

Here’s the deal:
We’re giving away **200 Widowmakers for FREE**. Just cover a small shipping fee, put it to the test, and tell us what you think.

And if it doesn’t live up to the hype? You’re covered by our **60-day Money Back Assurance**. No questions asked.
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21119/6374453/1addb951cfa433647622619c546151ab06bb1bbd/c21be753adea9f277eb67fc94860f9a153066509)
---
**P.S.** The Widowmaker is part of our first production batch. Once these 200 are gone, that’s it. If you want a blade built for battle—and built to last—don’t wait.
---
|

[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21119/6374453/1addb951cfa433647622619c546151ab06bb1bbd/c21be753adea9f277eb67fc94860f9a153066509)

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: American workers love it. Leftist billionaires hate it.
body:
I stand with patriotic American workers.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/akeq/?__vbtrk=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot, I’m proud to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with President Donald J. Trump in the fight to put America First.

His bold tariffs are a game-changer.
We are _**restoring American factories**_ , _**rebuilding American communities**_ , and **_giving hardworking Americans the shot at prosperity they deserve_.**

**I’ve got his back 100% because I’ve got your back 100%.****__[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aker/?__vbtrk=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__**
[RECLAIM THE AMERICAN DREAM](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/akeq/?__vbtrk=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
For years, the working class – the backbone of this nation – have been crushed under the weight of **rotten deals that shipped our jobs overseas and left our towns hollowed out**.
**President Trump’s tariffs are about leveling the playing field, making American workers the priority again, and telling the world that we won’t be their doormat anymore.**
It’s common-sense economics, and it’s working, but here is the truth that many elected officials are afraid to hear: **the liberal billionaire class hates this.**
The _**Liberal elites**_ , _**Hollywood executives**_ , _**G**** _**l**_ obalists**_, and _**Leftist**** _**cr**_ onies in the media**_ can’t stand that we're fighting for you.
They’re used to politicians who bow down to them, cut deals, and sell out our country for a quick buck.
**That’s not me, never has been, and never will be.****__[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aker/?__vbtrk=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__**
[RECLAIM THE AMERICAN DREAM](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/akeq/?__vbtrk=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Because I’m an ardent supporter of President Trump’s America First vision, they’re coming for me.
They’ve got their checkbooks out, their smear campaigns ready, and their Far Left lobbyists on speed dial. They’ll do anything to silence me because they know **I won’t back down from defending the forgotten men and women of this country**.
That’s why I need you with me right now. This isn’t just about tariffs or trade, it’s about who runs America. _**T**_** _he American People or just the Liberal Elite._**
I’m in this fight to provide opportunity and prosperity to the American People but I can’t do it alone. **__[The special interest attacks against me are ramping up and I urgently need your support to keep standing strong](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/akeq/?__vbtrk=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_._**
I created the **House GOP Battleground Fund** to defend Republicans who are fighting to protect President Trump’s policies and **every dollar fuels our battle to put America First**. The elites have their billions but my team have patriots like you._**_
_**__**_[Please chip in whatever you can today to help me stand up to the Liberal Elite and defend American workers](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/akeq/?__vbtrk=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**_
I’m not afraid of their **_threats _**or their **_lies _**because I’ve taken on the Radical Left, the Deep State, and the Establishment before and I know that with you by my side we will be victorious.
**Together, we’ll keep pushing forward, continue bringing jobs back, and making sure American workers come out on top.****__[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aker/?__vbtrk=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__**
[RECLAIM THE AMERICAN DREAM](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/akeq/?__vbtrk=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Thank you for your support and standing with me in the fight to reclaim the American Dream. Now is the time to show what we are made of and save America!
_Your fellow patriot,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/akeq/?__vbtrk=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
House Republican Leadership Chair
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/akeq/?__vbtrk=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1MjEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

## Trump Eyes Foreign Prisons for U.S. Felons
President Trump is considering whether [violent U.S. citizens can be legally deported](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyU0LGOhCAYBOCnwU4DPwhaUFxjt9deaVj4Xf8NikFuyd7TX7w3uG6SSb5J5us23xxF2h-fbkNbljT7lXZ3Hjkd7uH24IBvT6wY8wwc-parVug5OIrvWTXBLoiAskErjFJmNKPUzWqdWJaR34EPvQYzBuPADF5r3vugZRgaspfGldCC816qDu9aD8rAEILsjZBMcQxUUu6eifay4hLf6YW582lrol1LOU4mPxhMDKZaa-f3u79KBtNFM5i4YjCJK5X8vR1twCPl0noq9IP72UZXu7Vssck2HJVipFMbpvhjcxT_dsr_H3lZ-A0AAP__TD9saw) to prisons in Central America, the White House confirmed Tuesday. Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said Trump is reviewing the legality of sending “egregious, repeat offenders” to facilities like El Salvador’s supermax CECOT prison. In a recent interview with Fox Noticias, Trump praised El Salvador’s President Nayib Bukele for his tough approach to crime and said he was impressed by the country's prison system. Referring to violent offenders as “[homegrown criminals](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkD2O6yAURleDOywMGOKC4jXu8topLQLX9o34sYAJyu5HmR1M90mfdI50vu7b3WLAdPy3EUzb8-ZOTLZeJV_2sMlbzuITOoSyccZnyiSd1OYthvcmB292AA5iADNpKfWiF6GG0-iZ2V1ZDfMM0-KEXtQDbpYpJq2WixjQfGhMTmpibBZyhIdSN6n5zXsx60kQycBjy2V8ZkzthD288wvK6HIcgjlbuyoR_whfCV9776N71AS9fn7C188kfG3lO170zBGOknuirmDEZEOley6AR6JXwZpTpQ5cboSvQzH-6hgCVqWJZEe0GH6l7e95Xob_BAAA__-nUnQx),” Trump said they have no place in American communities. However, legal experts warn the proposal could face serious constitutional challenges.
## China’s Propaganda Joins the Trade War
China has escalated its trade war with the U.S. through [a state media blitz](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyU0LGupCAYBeCnwe6fIKBoQbEN3d12S_OP_Cp3EAzgNfP2G-cNbn2SL-ecf1_TF_rg4_oXdzJ1SdO8-YjlyOnAFaNDwfdvuijkSXDRAVfQ9pNDH96TapxZiATJhkyrldKjHmXfbIa3Wks9csnHsZPjMCjJpeufauwUCRoab26Nq7ZvOe-ketCz7welxeCc7HQrmeLkfE358Z18rBst4Z1-KD_mtDfBbLUehck_TFgmbHwfqdQ7YsLeMBOWKyZs2zJhzwKRrsKE_WyD5aRQoGZ0BBdmuHzdAD2sFCljJQe3ViAtUPO5H7Cf5QUBZx9XOA-I_kUFfASEBeea8hsuApdihSfOL3DpikzYJht3XD4EX3rNFF939OFTv_7-6B8j_gcAAP__lDqKtw), including AI-generated videos and parodies that blame President Donald Trump’s tariffs for rising consumer prices. Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said Trump is reviewing the legality of sending “egregious, repeat offenders” to facilities like El Salvador’s supermax CECOT prison. In a recent interview with Fox Noticias, Trump praised El Salvador’s President Nayib Bukele for his tough approach to crime and said he was impressed by the country's prison system. Referring to violent offenders as “,” Trump said they have no place in American communities. However, legal experts warn the proposal could face serious constitutional challenges. China’s Propaganda Joins the Trade War China has escalated its trade war with the U.S. through , including AI-generated videos and parodies that blame President Donald Trump’s tariffs for rising consumer prices. In Washington, the Chinese embassy mocked U.S. infrastructure with a meme comparing aging freight trains to China’s sleek bullet rail. . Beijing also ordered its airlines to and suspend purchases of U.S. aircraft parts. Meanwhile, the Trump administration is considering from U.S. stock exchanges. Thieves Tunnel Their Way to $20 Million Robbery Police are searching for suspects who tunneled beneath a Los Angeles jewelry store, evaded security cameras, broke into a safe, and The owners of the family-run Love Jewelry believe the thieves spent weeks digging a tunnel from an abandoned theater next door. Security footage apparently captured the sound of a drill or saw cutting through the store's wall. The family said the stolen jewelry was not insured. They are offering for any information about the burglary. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb1b4d955-832b-4718-9e9a-899468ded482/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: History Facts
subject: The world's largest underground city
body:
Building an 18-level underground city may sound like the project of an advanced future society, but the world’s largest underground metropolis was actually constructed around 1200 BCE.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68eq2td3oxpujbqa9p1qcp03h3993xbb1wn0ncnn0f0szmp0stg34ba0jsqiezwf38tpild6yzucpj3bf5mlklxr8m37ftzdcwpuz89k0a5f9lr6vwlqjd44tkgu38zejonc3i01t9ltz6gxe&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sut3rm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [The world’s largest underground city housed more than 20,000 people.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sut3rm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sut3rm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sut3rm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| B uilding an 18-level underground city may sound like the project of an advanced future society, but the world’s largest underground metropolis was actually constructed around 1200 BCE. The ancient subterranean city of Elengubu, [now called Derinkuyu](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sut3rm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), lies in the semi-arid region of Cappadocia in modern-day Turkey. Tourists can meander tunnels and walk among subterranean rooms, stables, schools, wineries, and even a chapel — all underground. At its peak, during Islamic raids on the Byzantine Empire in the seventh century, Derinkuyu housed up to 20,000 people.
---
While the origin of the site remains a mystery, experts theorize that the Hittites, a superpower of the Bronze Age, likely built the first few levels while under attack from the Phrygians, who expanded the project when they moved into Central Anatolia after the Hittites’ collapse. Although the Phrygians were skilled architects, the surrounding landscape also aided in this ambitious construction effort. Due to the area’s semi-arid nature, Cappadocia’s soil is easily malleable and its rock easily moldable. Three volcanoes — Mount Erciyes, Mount Hasan, and Mount Melendiz — formed the region millions of years ago, and the pyroclastic material found in the area could be carved with simple tools and little effort. Today, for 60 Turkish lira (about $2), visitors can once again descend into this subterranean world and experience life underground.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sut3rm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sut3rm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## The world’s largest cave was discovered by accident.
[The world’s largest cave](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sut3rm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) is Hang Sơn Đoòng (“Mountain River Cave”), located in Vietnam’s Phong Nha-Ke Bang National Park. Encompassing an incredible 1.35 _billion_ cubic feet, this cave is so big that it contains its own weather system (clouds included), especially during Vietnam’s warm and muggy spring months, when moisture forms at the cave’s mouth. Despite its immense size, Hang Sơn Đoòng was not discovered until 1990, and only then by accident. A local named Ho Khanh was exploring the jungle for timber and food when he unexpectedly spotted the gaping maw of a limestone cliff with clouds billowing out of it. As the site seemed too perilous to explore, Khanh moved on and promptly forgot its location. It wasn’t until a later conversation with two members of a British cave expedition that Khanh realized what he’d discovered. It took him almost two decades to relocate the cave, but in 2009, he led a team of experts and surveyors to the site of his discovery.

clean_body: Building an 18-level underground city may sound like the project of an advanced future society, but the world’s largest underground metropolis was actually constructed around 1200 BCE. | B uilding an 18-level underground city may sound like the project of an advanced future society, but the world’s largest underground metropolis was actually constructed around 1200 BCE. The ancient subterranean city of Elengubu, , lies in the semi-arid region of Cappadocia in modern-day Turkey. Tourists can meander tunnels and walk among subterranean rooms, stables, schools, wineries, and even a chapel — all underground. At its peak, during Islamic raids on the Byzantine Empire in the seventh century, Derinkuyu housed up to 20,000 people. While the origin of the site remains a mystery, experts theorize that the Hittites, a superpower of the Bronze Age, likely built the first few levels while under attack from the Phrygians, who expanded the project when they moved into Central Anatolia after the Hittites’ collapse. Although the Phrygians were skilled architects, the surrounding landscape also aided in this ambitious construction effort. Due to the area’s semi-arid nature, Cappadocia’s soil is easily malleable and its rock easily moldable. Three volcanoes — Mount Erciyes, Mount Hasan, and Mount Melendiz — formed the region millions of years ago, and the pyroclastic material found in the area could be carved with simple tools and little effort. Today, for 60 Turkish lira (about $2), visitors can once again descend into this subterranean world and experience life underground. | By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our and . Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Distance (in feet) of the world’s deepest human-dug hole 40,229 | | Maximum length (in hours) humans will sleep without exposure to daylight 30 | Maximum length (in hours) humans will sleep without exposure to daylight 30 | | Running time (in minutes) of Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade , featuring the underground city of Petra 127 | | Year SubTropolis, an underground industrial park in Missouri, opened for business 1964 | Year SubTropolis, an underground industrial park in Missouri, opened for business 1964 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- The world’s largest cave was discovered by accident. is Hang Sơn Đoòng (“Mountain River Cave”), located in Vietnam’s Phong Nha-Ke Bang National Park. Encompassing an incredible 1.35 billion cubic feet, this cave is so big that it contains its own weather system (clouds included), especially during Vietnam’s warm and muggy spring months, when moisture forms at the cave’s mouth. Despite its immense size, Hang Sơn Đoòng was not discovered until 1990, and only then by accident. A local named Ho Khanh was exploring the jungle for timber and food when he unexpectedly spotted the gaping maw of a limestone cliff with clouds billowing out of it. As the site seemed too perilous to explore, Khanh moved on and promptly forgot its location. It wasn’t until a later conversation with two members of a British cave expedition that Khanh realized what he’d discovered. It took him almost two decades to relocate the cave, but in 2009, he led a team of experts and surveyors to the site of his discovery. subject: Bullet Train Funding Pulled, High School Shooting, and 4 Million Miles
body:
The U.S. Department of Transportation canceled a $63.9 million grant for the proposed Dallas-to-Houston high-speed rail project on Monday. Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy called the ambitious proposal “a waste of taxpayer funds.”

## Feds Pull Funding for Dallas-Houston Rail Line
The U.S. Department of Transportation [canceled a $63.9 million grant](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckL2OpDAQhJ8GMo_aHn6GwMElZHvphaixG2jJ2MjuHZi3P7GPsGmV9FXp-_c1fSEHjutf3MnKtaRp_g6BRDJyXL6j57ged-K3yYBpFTRKd5NHDp-pqb2dwQ-6Jqv7pnmBNv2z3iyC9jB3rSOY3fICwrbXPb48dktrzFCzvWHQ6E5r0No8nn7oDfjFoYZ5HlzVAHmWlB-ykdCFZQmf9Kb8cGmvg91EjlI9_1RmrMx4nudjSVeks9x9ZcYjBRZ2pTKjT6IKvqkowevAD-WibpLqYFdCeeeIwnFVPzNq43VT5SDyKiMH5VKUjE7qbP1xcghcur5qYN2Rw88b-YW4tzX_AwAA___CCoDh) for the proposed Dallas-to-Houston high-speed rail project on Monday. Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy called the ambitious proposal “a waste of taxpayer funds.” The bullet train rail line was initially [proposed as a private venture](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLFyhCAQhp8GO5yFw0MLijR2lzalA7IqCacO7J3e22e4yROk2WJ35tv_-79uw82GGNb5097R0Dltg3vEiETJhnV6rD6s8142fhkkyIaD4uI6eBvia1CVNw58Jyo0QivVgpD6Ui3GNc6DRmxG346AnW076FqlJ4fCgm6qYAoMlLgKAULI-uI7LcFPoxXgXDcyBegDbammBQlPm6f42p6Y6nG7V9EsRHtmlw8meyb74zjqH0dnOTLZFzaTPSgme1HGYTMhJ3vu9oWJF6_MJ_SZFzf-58nff_gS5oXnHdHzZEPke9q-cSQm-yoZvx8hxpCvmimY7zbEdyD6R3dPI38DAAD__22JfsQ) led by Texas Central, but Amtrak became a partner last year. The Biden administration awarded the grant in August from funding authorized by the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act. _"If the private sector believes this project is feasible, they should carry the pre-construction work forward rather than relying on Amtrak and the American taxpayer to bail them out,"_ Duffy said. A statement from the agency [pegged the projected cost](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckMGOtCAQhJ8GbxhA1PHAYfIn3uY_7h5NIzCSIBhox5m33-i-wZ66U5VUqr7vx_QAH3x8_ofVKny7NOk9BIuYwUe3R-PjczsVs0yCiZYySXk3GfDhM8nKKM3MwCureC_ljXHRN9WiuL7NvJWthsbpW2dg6KVkonH9zDqAtvLqDGOSd5wzzkXdmKEXzLgZONN6mIlk1nhMucbFon1DceGTXjbXc1qroBbErZDmTsRIxHgcR72WeHpEjDbSvRAxRnuc5_ox7-tGwaw--oIZ0KdIz2GFln3bUkbqUqYGQoBCMdEl7QVTpL846MWDiBEyvd_5v68OocrKbIcPwZeuJ5I9V_Dhqod_IPlS4icAAP__cnaFVQ) of the route at $40 billion. Fort Worth investor John Kleinheinz, who is now Texas Central’s [primary financial backer](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLGO5CAQRL8GZ20BZs04ILjE2V56odWGxnDCxsI9Mzt_f5rVfcGmpaeq0vvzuXxiLvnYfuNOjr9iXdZ7KcTcMB_xfoR8bOc7CWnRUn-ANKDGJWAur8V0wa0yTKojp6wxN6m0HbrklIla2jjcphhQDYO2lpTx3powealuXXbvMmnUqJRUSvdDmKyWIXpUcl0nL4ykkLm2nhMxfeEVy6s-qPW-7l1xifm8xPBL6FnoOdbGz9o4NTpr4762Tej5PSH0LI3Qs_r4j8E3B77uJx4v2OuDLsBEGOCZOUHKW4LrJArQMBc4W_1LngEjU4PR7BApUMMCW8ODwd9Z6LlrLpzPXEq-RiuM3HbM5fsq_8Dqw-l_AQAA__9kSYe7), welcomed the “good news,” explaining that “this project should be led by the private sector, and we will be proud to take it forward.”
## Lowe's Buys Dallas Interior Design Company
Artisan Design Group (ADG), a Dallas-based home interior design company, is [being acquired by Lowe’s](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckL2O4yAUhZ8GdzcCQkJcUEQruZvtdre0LubGRsJgwc14_PYrzyNMe470nZ9_H-MHxhTz_BtXcvz1KqN_p0TMFWN-vXOIed5OJSyjlvoG0oC6jwFjOkbTBedl6FVHTlljHlJpe-0W9zD3HoPE2wPDZNH43prJeqNu1npJjy66EyaNuislldKXa-itluE1oZLe95MwkkLkUi-8ENMXtlc6yifVy1TWLrmFeWvi-hR6EHrY9_2ytnx6Qg-U4d2EHtaS6RB6qISJGiOT0EMqO0GDttH3NjiZoMDHlGLJUDIETAkbTGXdMB_ACzIw1pm4wVJWgpiZaiz1zMAKz6f69bf_Y7vqwrafnHa3wsh5xZi-6_IPnv10-n8AAAD__7UGimo) for $1.33 billion, according to a Monday announcement from the retailer. The cash deal is expected to close in the second quarter of this year. Founded in 2016, ADG specializes in design services and installing floors, cabinets, and countertops. The company [operates 132 stores across 18 states](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLGO5CAQBb8GZ4ygYY0JCC5xtpdeaDXutgcJ45HB652_P_miizetJ5We6s_n9Ikpp7L-xo1D-172KZ45c2sHprKchVJZXzeh5wQKPqSyUvcTYcrvyXYUoiKvOw7aWTsoDc50zwCu713sjWZU0WhvPFuOaD9wWEARdincMmV1r7XSGh6GvANFy4xaxehnYRVTavvxaE9u_I11ye_9i4_HvG9dDs_WXlWYXwJGAeN1XY9rQbxHASMeLc2ZBYzbXvgtYIxnTYVrFTDWDXOW_4G8X1xlPN9VEuaMVUasTPK2VCySuKa1yPXYz5eAEQYn_UwuDmQk-AGk1YYkovLSD6qPizfOk-6OQK8r5Zxq74RV64Yp_3vffhD6K8DfAAAA__-cHIwz) and generated about $1.8 billion in revenue last year. The acquisition will provide Lowe’s with expanded service capabilities within the $50 billion new home construction market. The company’s statement cites research projecting that [18 million new homes](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckDFuhDAQRU9jOtB4MBAKF2noNm1KZOMBRvLaxDbL7u2jzRHSfn29J73v23wz7DlsX-ZOujzXONvTeyolGQ7rGRyH7Xgvbp8RsKtB1bKfnWH_mlXltAU3yoq0HJT6AIlDW-26bREd9kAGBmtH6hS4bm1BLh3aEbFi_YaBkr2UICU2rRsHBLcuRoK14yIUkOMSU1N2KvQ0efWv-KDULPFeeb2XcmTRfgqcBE7XdTWJimHv-EHvi8Ap0JUFTj5elGuz_JycuXAMtUmFswm1o8xbqLcUz6M-UhQ4DaprBxA4VUm742LvOfeDULDdDfs_d_lHpofG3wAAAP__Zh13hQ) will be needed in the U.S. by 2033.
## Grapevine Student Earns Perfect SAT, ACT Scores
Grapevine High School junior Piyush Mallick [earned perfect scores](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyczz2OgzAQQOHT2F2QZ-zwU7jYhi7bbomMZwwjOYDACcntV9kjbPuKT3o_t-EWJMsyfYc7-_JK6zA-cuZS9iBLeiwky7R9Cs0DGrxejLtAPVCQ_B6cJj8a6kCzh8a51gA2Vs_eWkJHWCcDtostX9O1JYPWMaXIddDiP5hxUAMYAKwsdQ0aSjGAGccuKmeYpKx7VWYu_ApHyu_1yXsV17vOfi5lO5T9Utgr7M_zrKYoB1ULF4V92IvEzAp7BNcCtHr3tJ2Ssxx1o5yZ7kHyH1X-cf30-BsAAP__99FllA) on both the SAT and ACT, a feat achieved by only a handful of the millions of students who take the college entrance exams each year. Mallick is the [UIL 5A state champion](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLGunDAQRb_GdF6NBy9eCoo0dC9tSjT22HgULyDwLm__PiL5g7TnSFdX59fX9EVSZJl_0jMO9Tutk3-VEmvdSZb0WliWebsI5wkB7xqsNt3EJOUz2YYHD9ybJg7GWfsAg65t8tCD861li_CwnX1Q79iDY-qAvE8mNDJcY2BNZwwYg7eWe4fAKZAB7_ugLESWuu63mmON33Sk8lnfcb-F9dmUIde6Har9oXBUOJ7neTsT0SUVjrRXCSUqHJd4HgrHyK9AVdZF4XiEvK7lovNOW3zLEnWWOet_Qm_yeR1ZP6kUCb_1FvcUQ9UHVU2hKhzx4bSltvXYkU54d9paZk2hczo5iJh8QLhzsw-8nVKKHJ1TFuYnSfl7v_5H6feAfwIAAP__SjWNCg) in math and number sense, and he helped his school’s debate team win the cross-examination competition at their district meet this year. "_One of the harder parts of my job is trying to find ways to challenge and push Piyush_ ," said Mallick’s math teacher. Mallick would like to attend MIT, Stanford, or UT Austin. He plans to study computer science and follow in his father’s footsteps by becoming a software engineer. But first, he needs to get [his driver’s license](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckL2O6yAUhJ_G7rA4mGviguI27rLtlhY_xwaJgAUncfL2K-8jbDcajeaTvu_7ejcxxbx_mQdqem9ltc-UkKiamLdn9jHvx9X4sAou_jEuGUyrNzF9Vtl7bbmfoUcNSsobB6HGPmiJqBRHa0cE9DAJe5sFgp1uapJS-j7q64xLmAA4gBhGPyvB_eYMcGtn10mOPlKpAwUkfJu2pU95YR1cefRJB6KjdeP_TiydWM7zHLbylhnPdg06sVyxE8tezYGvmJGFuAfWXCglsUZPj5nYjtTYgXVDR6y5UrGxZogZR33V_jhjSrFNqpN8f5iYfuH0B08vLX4CAAD__-SLegk).

**➤ Dallas:** At least four students were hospitalized after a shooting at Wilmer-Hutchins High School yesterday afternoon. Police have not identified the suspect, who was on the run at the time of writing. Last year, a student was shot in the leg at the same school. ([More](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLuu2zAQRL-G6mgsKerBQkUadTdtSoGPlbnAmhRE-ur67wO7SZ9yZoADzPnztX05Ysr33-6BS_vZy-afzNja6Sjvzxwp3493E9OmQQ8SjFTjFh3xazNdXDxEqzpc1GTMDEpPfZcWFfZpnOxoZud71MqbGO0MgMNo4zD4jpY3DIwalQKl9K2PdtIQ9-AUeG-DMICRWjlvLWHDH1d3fpVvPG-hPDpeUmtHFf0voVeh1-u6btfu3HsUenVno8Ao9JrxqkKvXIJjodfomF2VoTxze_3LH768iB94yvRsIVGuMtE9yRpSKSyPwhRQnliPkitKyoEi5ib0qudJ6nkOpvdWYgCQxhojHSDI3RoFw6Am5_vuXOJxETPVcRIG7g9H_HnT_kP896L_BgAA__--1ZHe)) **➤ Austin:** The Texas House passed a bill that would allow student-athletes to receive compensation directly from the college or university they attend. The legislation aims to update current law to comply with a pending settlement in a $2.6 billion national antitrust case. ([More](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0DGOgzAQBdDTmM7IHhyICxfb0GXbLdEYD2CtYxCehOT2K3KE7Ubzpaev_3MbbhhTzPM33snxa1oH_0iJmHeMeXrkEPO8nZ-wDKDgIpWRuh0CxvQeTBWcV8HqipzujLkqDV1TLe5iLmCRwE4WobETNtc2-KAsmjFo21TRnZgyutVaaQ11E2wHKkwjauW9HYVRFCKve80LMb2wTOm9Pmmvx_VeJbcwb0U0XwJ6Af1xHPWv59cZCuhPW0CvjIBen1emQ34QmWOSPqYkNyyFilzWRyGJE9MuE-WZl7cM5JFJQF_tLmxHTCmWthNGzXeM6VOA_7HV08FfAAAA___1u3gU)) **➤ Fort Bend ISD:** The board of trustees approved a policy on Monday requiring school officials to notify parents if a student asks to be identified by a different name or pronoun than those associated with his or her biological sex. McIntyre's hit single “The Race,” recorded while on the run from authorities, has racked up over 250 million views on YouTube. Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy called the ambitious proposal “a waste of taxpayer funds.” The bullet train rail line was initially led by Texas Central, but Amtrak became a partner last year. The Biden administration awarded the grant in August from funding authorized by the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act. "If the private sector believes this project is feasible, they should carry the pre-construction work forward rather than relying on Amtrak and the American taxpayer to bail them out," Duffy said. A statement from the agency of the route at $40 billion. Fort Worth investor John Kleinheinz, who is now Texas Central’s , welcomed the “good news,” explaining that “this project should be led by the private sector, and we will be proud to take it forward.” Lowe's Buys Dallas Interior Design Company Artisan Design Group (ADG), a Dallas-based home interior design company, is for $1.33 billion, according to a Monday announcement from the retailer. The cash deal is expected to close in the second quarter of this year. Founded in 2016, ADG specializes in design services and installing floors, cabinets, and countertops. The company and generated about $1.8 billion in revenue last year. The acquisition will provide Lowe’s with expanded service capabilities within the $50 billion new home construction market. The company’s statement cites research projecting that will be needed in the U.S. by 2033. Grapevine Student Earns Perfect SAT, ACT Scores Grapevine High School junior Piyush Mallick on both the SAT and ACT, a feat achieved by only a handful of the millions of students who take the college entrance exams each year. "One of the harder parts of my job is trying to find ways to challenge and push Piyush ," said Mallick’s math teacher. Mallick would like to attend MIT, Stanford, or UT Austin. name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Stephanie Thomas’ Partisan Meltdown
body:
And ROVAC Let It Happen

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=795047ebd2)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | “There’s a time and place for political rants—like Twitter, or a backyard barbecue. Not a mandatory government training with 200 civil servants in folding chairs. Knowing the difference isn’t just basic etiquette—it’s what separates leadership from a meltdown.”\- Dominic Rapini
---
|
---
| **# RESIST Meets Connecticut Elections**
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=5a09e06f04&e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
| **Opinion | Patisan Meltdown**
**Opinion | Stephanie Thomas’ Partisan Meltdown Was a Disgrace—And ROVAC Let It Happen**
**By Dominic Rapini, ’22 GOP candidate for Secretary of the State, Election Moderator**
The**job of a Registrar of Voters in Connecticut is, by design, nonpartisan**. It’s not glamorous, it’s not highly paid, and for many, it’s not even full-time. These are hardworking public servants—some even volunteers—tasked with safeguarding the most sacred function in a democracy: the vote. They don’t ask for much. A little respect, some professional development, a chance to do their jobs well. What they got last week was a political ambush disguised as a training conference.
At the semi-annual ROVAC (Registrar of Voters Association of Connecticut) conference—a forum meant to be strictly nonpartisan—the state’s top elections official, Secretary of the State Stephanie Thomas, used her platform not to educate or inform but to deliver a campaign-style screed dripping with partisan venom. According to multiple attendees,**Thomas veered into outright insult, reportedly referring to President Trump as the “General of the SS”—a not-so-subtle Nazi reference** aimed at half the room, which consisted of Republican Registrars of Voters.
This wasn’t a slip of the tongue. It was deliberate. Inflammatory. Divisive. And deeply inappropriate.
What’s worse is the context. This wasn’t a political rally. It was a professional event—one many **Registrars were required to attend** to maintain certification. Instead of guidance, they were treated to an ideological lecture that mocked their beliefs, distorted facts, and accused them—implicitly and sometimes directly—of undermining democracy simply for holding different political views.
One attendee put it bluntly:**“She stood in front of people who just want to do their jobs and effectively called them ‘Nazis’.”**
Others walked out. Some sat in stunned silence. Some, out of disbelief, asked if anyone had recorded her. The answer: yes—and that footage is already circulating.As if that wasn’t enough, Secretary Thomas leaned into fear-mongering around voter eligibility.**She claimed, falsely, that married women could be prevented from voting if their ID didn’t exactly match their voter record.**
**One outraged Registrar responded:**_“The married woman can’t vote thing boils my blood! Any person who has changed their name and holds a driver’s license (Real ID or otherwise) knows perfectly well how to verify their name. Stephanie knows how that works. She’s making a choice to scare and confuse women by weaponizing their gender for political gain. It’s unbelievably disgusting. These women trust her, and she’s exploiting that fear. She KNOWS she’s spreading false fear—and she doesn’t care. What kind of person does that?”_
This is what passed for “training” at a state-run conference. Facts optional. Smears encouraged.
Thomas’ address wasn’t just offensive—it exposed a fundamental misunderstanding of her role. The Secretary of the State is not a political influencer. She is a **constitutional officer sworn to serve all voters and all election officials** —regardless of party. But her speech made one thing crystal clear: neutrality is not on her agenda. She also**dismissed commonsense election safeguards like voter ID** and citizenship verification. Never mind that about 80% of Americans, across party lines, support requiring government-issued ID to vote and believe only U.S. citizens should be allowed to cast ballots.
Instead of listening to the public, Secretary Thomas—like so many progressive ideologues—refuses to even acknowledge the growing evidence of noncitizens being registered and voting. In our own debate, she went as far as to suggest that some voter fraud is acceptable.
Let me be clear: it’s not.
**States like Arizona are finally taking action. Following a lawsuit from America First Legal, Arizona counties are now working with the Department of Homeland Security to remove nearly 50,000 registrants lacking proof of citizenship. They’re checking their rolls monthly, as the law requires.**
And in Connecticut?
**We rely on a checkbox.** No documentation. No verification. Just hope and good faith. Suggest adding any proof, and you’re labeled a “fascist.” **Or the favorite insult these days—a “racist.”**
That’s the atmosphere Secretary Thomas is promoting: where legitimate concerns about election integrity are mocked, and the very officials working to protect the system are smeared.
The Registrars in that room didn’t come to fight culture wars. They came to learn, to improve the process, to better serve all voters. These are civic-minded professionals—part-time, underpaid, and often underappreciated—who believe in the process. Who believe in showing up, doing the work, and keeping politics out of the polling place.And what did they get? Accusations. Insults. Smirking contempt from the state’s top election official.
**And the institution meant to protect them—ROVAC—sat on its hands.** No pushback. No correction. No apology. The very organization that claims to represent Connecticut’s Registrars failed to defend them when it mattered most.Secretary Thomas wasn’t just out of line—she was a disgrace to her office. If she wants to go back to activism, she’s welcome to it. But**if she intends to hold constitutional office, she needs to act like it—and that means respecting all voters, all election officials, and the nonpartisan traditions that keep our democracy functioning.**
**She owes every Registrar in that room an apology.**
But more than that, she owes it to the people of Connecticut to get on board with the **SAVE Act,** clean up our voter rolls, verify citizenship at registration, and finally do the job the state Constitution mandates her to do: ensure free, fair, and trustworthy elections for everyone. **Not just the voters who agree with her politics.** And ROVAC? **They owe their members a backbone.**

* * *

|

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 4/16/2025
body:
Fifteen days that changed Colorado forever
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/sek74cda80e)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s1i26eb0172)**
| | Hi friends,
We're excited to share **[Part II of The COvid Chronicles](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s8v1fc242fa)** —Rocky Mountain Voice’s newest investigative series uncovering how “15 days to slow the spread” unraveled into years of mandates, school closures, and government overreach. We’re pulling back the curtain on the decisions that changed Colorado—and the people still living with the consequences. [If you missed Part I, click here!](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s8u725fbabc)
Listen to today's **Mountain Minute Podcast** [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s4n9e5c92b2), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s0h21b7340f) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s0p369a6faf)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...** Colorado’s [condo construction bill](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/sdq08910e72) is advancing in the Senate, aiming to revive affordable housing by addressing defect litigation—but builders remain skeptical it goes far enough. Ibotta’s CEO is raising alarms over [Colorado’s proposed AI regulation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s1gcec11d54), calling it a job-killer and warning it could drive tech companies out of the state.
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Democrat Yadira Caraveo is aiming to [reclaim her seat](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s1jb9ee16bb) from Rep. Gabe Evans in Colorado’s 8th—now a key battleground with the House majority at stake. Meanwhile, Greeley voters weigh a [new hockey arena](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/seg8b78e9ec) and entertainment district, and Craig Station [remains on track to close](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s7p759ebe00) by 2028 despite Trump’s efforts to keep it running.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** A judge blocked his effort to [revoke parole](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/seu1c65ae69) for 500,000 illegal immigrants under Biden’s CHNV program. As trade tensions rise, China is restricting [rare earth exports](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s0m8bea3b81), while a bipartisan bill aims to restore Congress’ [authority over tariffs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/sbs453b07ff).
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** In a powerful personal piece, George Tristan reflects on how [political division tore his family apart](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s1l683fbc12)—and how faith, forgiveness, and love brought them back together. His story is a call to prioritize connection over conflict in an age of polarization.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, April 16, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[The COvid Chronicles: Fifteen days that changed Colorado forever](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s7lf82381c4)** BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s0o888de6bf)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/sal21bcd582)
Colorado changed overnight.
In the first two weeks of April 2020, headlines shifted from public health to public control. Behind the fear and mandates were decisions—made daily—that reshaped lives and redefined freedom.
This is the record.
April 1: Where else to start than the pages of The Denver Post (The DP)? On April 1, 2020 it wasn’t an April Fool’s Day joke that the economic industry Gov. Polis prioritized over such Centennial State mainstays as oil-and-gas and beef production – tourism – was reeling.
Hotels across the state were completely disrupted, including 1,400-plus dismissals at arguably the state’s most lavish resort, The Broadmoor. Over at DIA, air traffic plunged 90% and Vail Resorts was furloughing employees seemingly everywhere.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s5n26f1b6ab)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s2ue4f00156)
|
---
**[Yadira Caraveo launches bid to reclaim Colorado’s 8th District after razor-thin loss to Gabe Evans](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s7j0e27abe6)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s5t77667be8)
* Democrat Yadira Caraveo is running to reclaim her seat in Colorado’s 8th District after losing to Republican Gabe Evans by fewer than 2,500 votes in 2024, setting up one of the nation’s most competitive 2026 House races.
* Caraveo faces early headwinds, including a primary challenge from State Rep. Manny Rutinel and scrutiny over her high staff turnover and public struggles with mental health during her first term.
* Evans, a veteran and former police officer, has quickly risen as a GOP star, with the NRCC and national leaders already backing his re-election in this key swing district.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s6ld3f226f5)**
|
---
**[Colorado Senate committee approves bill aimed at boosting condo construction](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s2l42c3e687)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s1tda853422)
* A Colorado Senate committee voted 6–1 to move forward with HB1272, a bill aimed at reviving the state's stagnant condo construction market by addressing construction defect litigation and insurance issues.
* While lawmakers frame the bill as a solution for affordable housing, major homebuilders like Lokal Homes say the changes don’t go far enough to address liability and cost concerns—some even plan to exit the condo market entirely.
* Independent inspections, clearer defect definitions, a new settlement process, and adjustments to the statute of limitations. Supporters say the bill strikes a balance between protecting buyers and incentivizing builders.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s7j672aa3cd)**
|
---
**[Tristan: Politics came between me and my daughter – love and faith brought us back](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s2g83159b06)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s0nec9ada70)
* George Tristan reflects on how political division and the national climate of bitterness tore apart his relationship with his daughter after a tense 2023 Thanksgiving.
* He attributes the healing of their relationship to love, faith, and a renewed focus on spiritual connection over political ideology.
* Tristan urges readers to reconnect with estranged loved ones, emphasizing that personal relationships matter more than political differences.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s6qdee36539)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[HB25-1312 and the silencing of parents: What the Rocky Mountain Summit revealed](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/s0q1cec146d)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/sdh47a9dcff)****BY JEN SCHUMANN****| STATE | APRIL 14** _From court-ordered gag rules to the looming threat of custody loss, this isn’t hypothetical — it’s happening now. Colorado families gathered at the Rocky Mountain Summit in early April to share what it means to raise children under a system that increasingly treats concern as abuse._
**[Hunter: Faith-driven schools are proving that clarity and character create safe campuses](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/sel8e93fd75)** **BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | APRIL 14** _In the face of rising cultural concerns over student safety and institutional trust, a quiet but significant shift in Colorado’s educational landscape is rooted in moral conviction, sustained by ethical character, and bearing fruit in meaningful outcomes._
**[Hancock: The biblical mandate for political engagement](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._-YoQ/sfid9e029c8)** **BY MICHAEL HANCOCK | COMMENTARY | APRIL 14** _The modern American Christian faces an identity crisis. Many have retreated from the political arena, citing their faith as a justification for disengagement. They claim, with a kind of pious resignation, that politics is too corrupt, too divisive, too worldly for a true believer._

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🏡 DID YOU KNOW?** More Americans **returned to their home state during the pandemic**. From 2019 to 2022, the share of “return-home” movers rose from 4.2% to 5.0%, even as overall moving rates declined nationwide. Turns out, there really is no place like home.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** “One person is nothing. Two people are a nation.” –Terry Pratchett
|
---

name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: April 22 Town Hall with Congressman Clyburn
body:
New podcast launching Thursday!

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=edbde6c9b1&u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=712d043b70)
---
|
---
| Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
|
# Join me April 22 for a Town Hall with Congressman Clyburn in Spartanburg
---
[](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=81ed6cea08&e=edbde6c9b1)
| Join us for an IN-PERSON People’s Town Hall in Spartanburg on Tuesday, April 22 with Congressman Jim Clyburn. Since Senators Lindsey Graham and Tim Scott, and Congressman William Timmons refuse to show up for their constituents, we will.Make your voice heard on the critical issues impacting our communities—from tariffs to healthcare to democracy itself. Learn how to get involved, organize, and hold your representatives accountable.Location details are emailed upon registration. Doors open at 5pm! Space is limited - registration required and does not guarantee entry.
---
| [Register for the Town Hall ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d7e8e8eb8e&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
# It’s tax time, and your reps are trying to raise them.
---
| The average South Carolinian is being hit hard by their representatives. Republicans in the State House have introduced H.4216 — the Flat Tax Bill — that proposed a flat income tax of 3.99%, quite different than the tax brackets currently in place ranging from 6.2% to 0%. The proposed overhaul of South Carolina’s income tax structure to establish [a flat tax would initially require nearly 60 percent of South Carolinians to pay more next year](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=14a8c6273f&e=edbde6c9b1). Much of that increase would fall on middle-income taxpayers, many of whom would pay nearly $600 more.
Though the bill did not advance in it’s current form, the chairs of South Carolina’s House and Senate budget committees have agreed to eliminate earmarks from the 2025–26 state budget (which hurt agencies and nonprofits), freeing up significant funds to accelerate income tax cuts – but**only for the wealthy**. The move reflects a growing focus on tax reform that seems to solely protect the rich.
---
| [Click here to watch my video on the Flat Income Tax ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=5026fdf20d&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | Meanwhile, as South Carolina Republicans are debating tax increases, Trump-backed tariffs have caused major disruptions in markets across the globe. American consumers will pay a heavy price: the average American family will pay $4,400 more this year and have experiences and average loss of $100,000 out of their 401k.
I dive deeper into this conversation with with Rep Wendell Jones from Greenville on my new podcast, **The Upstate Tea with Kathryn Harvey**. Tune in this Thursday as I join the crew from [Frogmore Stew - SC’s pop-politics podcast](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=4aa285b655&e=edbde6c9b1) \- as their weekly contributor from the Upstate.
---
[](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=805c112010&e=edbde6c9b1)
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **An evening with Dr. Amalia Luxardo, CEO of Women’s Rights and Empowerment Network****April 28 at 5:30 pm Wofford College** A reception will be held before the event at 4:30pm at the York Family Portico.
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| | **A Candid Conversation****April 29th at 6pm Wofford College** Join Trey Gowdy, political commentator and former Congressman for SC-04 and Bakari Sellers, political commentator and former SC Representative for HD 90 for a conversation moderated by Billy Webster.
---
| April 16 SCDP Civil Rights & DEI Virtual Town Hall [Register Here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=566724b2b0&e=edbde6c9b1)April 19 Together in Community Rally in Greenville at Unity Park. [Learn more here! ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f016c2b22f&e=edbde6c9b1)April 22 Spartanburg Town Hall with Rep. Clyburn. [Register Here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=dae2260c52&e=edbde6c9b1)April 26 Indivisible Upstate Meeting at 10:30am at the Taylors Library & SPCDP OfficeApril 28 WREN Advocacy Session with Amalia Luxardo, CEO of WREN. April 29 A Conversation with Bakari Sellers & Trey Gowdy at Wofford. May 7 SPCDP Monthly Meeting at TK Gregg Community Center 6pm May 29 Fighting for Freedom Fundraiser. [RSVP here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=a6a1853925&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **STOP the Save Act -**[**Contact your Senator**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=2b221a8eb3&e=edbde6c9b1) The US Senate is set to vote soon on the "Safeguard American Voter Eligibility" (SAVE) Act, a harmful bill that would disenfranchise millions by requiring passports or birth certificates to register and update voter information. Over 21 million Americans lack access to such documentation.
**Ask your SC Reps to Support H3211**| H3211 would allow DACA recipients to seek professional licensure in South Carolina, in. a state that already has a workforce shortage. We need to write our elected representatives or give them a call and let them know we SUPPORT the bill. [Here is a sample script](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=da3a1efd8b&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | The House is on furlough this week, meaning that no House floor debates or committee meetings are scheduled. The Senate meeting schedule for the week is [available here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d049393654&e=edbde6c9b1). Both chambers have until May 8 to pass legislation this calendar year. Any bills not passed by that date, known as [ _sine die_](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=7a89432f53&e=edbde6c9b1) , will carry over until the session returns in January 2026
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=a28d1dffbe&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| It is no easy task to run for office. But in today's climate... it is a necessary one. Thank you to Emerge South Carolina’s Executive Director, Allison Terracio for hosting an informational candidate session in Spartanburg last week. We learned all about what it takes to run for office and support candidates leading up to the next election season.
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | READ: Post & Courier: [Timmons needs to choose a side on Trump’s Tariffs](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=af9856e954&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: Post & Courier: [Greenville County is a hotspot for eviction, could a special court help?](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=0cdbccd929&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: Post & Courier: [House Speaker Johnson eyes cuts to Medicaid ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=576ecebea3&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: SC Daily Gazette: [Tariff Induced trade war spells trouble in SC](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=54fdb52917&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: WYFF: [Democratic Chairs Statement on BMW Attacks](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=aa87558458&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: SC Daily Gazette: [SC Treasurer petitions to stop removal of office](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=b92d24124a&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: NBC: [Trump Administration freezes $2 Billion after Harvard rejects demands](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f5d79ecb44&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: NYT: [U.S. and El Salvador won’t return wrongly-accused man](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=9c716fb887&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: [Rep. Mace addressed more than 1,000 potential voters at the Greenville County GOP convention](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c6a73d4a9b&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
[](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=3c3714aee0&e=edbde6c9b1)

Tune in this Thursday as I join the crew from \- as their weekly contributor from the Upstate. | | | | | | | | | | | | An evening with Dr. Amalia Luxardo, CEO of Women’s Rights and Empowerment NetworkApril 28 at 5:30 pm Wofford College A reception will be held before the event at 4:30pm at the York Family Portico. | | | | | | | | | | | | | A Candid ConversationApril 29th at 6pm Wofford College Join Trey Gowdy, political commentator and former Congressman for SC-04 and Bakari Sellers, political commentator and former SC Representative for HD 90 for a conversation moderated by Billy Webster. | April 16 SCDP Civil Rights & DEI Virtual Town Hall 19 Together in Community Rally in Greenville at Unity Park. 22 Spartanburg Town Hall with Rep. Clyburn. 26 Indivisible Upstate Meeting at 10:30am at the Taylors Library & SPCDP OfficeApril 28 WREN Advocacy Session with Amalia Luxardo, CEO of WREN. April 29 A Conversation with Bakari Sellers & Trey Gowdy at Wofford. May 7 SPCDP Monthly Meeting at TK Gregg Community Center 6pm May 29 Fighting for Freedom Fundraiser. | | | | | | | | | | | STOP the Save Act - The US Senate is set to vote soon on the "Safeguard American Voter Eligibility" (SAVE) Act, a harmful bill that would disenfranchise millions by requiring passports or birth certificates to register and update voter information. Over 21 million Americans lack access to such documentation. Ask your SC Reps to Support H3211| H3211 would allow DACA recipients to seek professional licensure in South Carolina, in. a state that already has a workforce shortage. We need to write our elected representatives or give them a call and let them know we SUPPORT the bill. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | The House is on furlough this week, meaning that no House floor debates or committee meetings are scheduled. The Senate meeting schedule for the week is . Both chambers have until May 8 to pass legislation this calendar year. Any bills not passed by that date, known as , will carry over until the session returns in January 2026 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | It is no easy task to run for office. But in today's climate... it is a necessary one. Thank you to Emerge South Carolina’s Executive Director, Allison Terracio for hosting an informational candidate session in Spartanburg last week. We learned all about what it takes to run for office and support candidates leading up to the next election season. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | READ: Post & Courier: : Post & Courier: : Post & Courier: : SC Daily Gazette: : WYFF: : SC Daily Gazette: : NBC: : NYT: : | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Kathryn for SC. All rights reserved.

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

DHS Assistant Secretary for Public Affairs Tricia McLaughlin **[held her own against a reporter](https://substack.com/redirect/d24e04aa-a304-473c-9e7c-4ab20062ce1e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** trying to make her admit that suspected MS-13 affiliate Kilmar Abrego Garcia was wrongfully deported by the Trump administration to El Salvador and should be returned.
How she handles this is impressive:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d24e04aa-a304-473c-9e7c-4ab20062ce1e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d24e04aa-a304-473c-9e7c-4ab20062ce1e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"The Supreme Court has upheld that the administration should facilitate and affectuate Abrego Garcia's return," the reporter told McLaughlin. He further referenced a quote from President Trump last week saying he would agree to "bring somebody back" if the Supreme Court said to.
"Why hasn't the government done what the Supreme Court asked them to do?" the reporter continued.
**[McLaughlin was waiting with a strong response,](https://substack.com/redirect/d24e04aa-a304-473c-9e7c-4ab20062ce1e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "I think what really matters to Americans is that this MS-13 gang member, who unfortunately, you and a lot of your colleagues have called a 'Maryland man'..."
The reporter cut her off, demanding evidence that Garcia was a member of MS-13.
"There's actually been two seperate immigration judges who ruled he was in MS-13!" McLaughlin fired back. "I can do this all day! He's a member of MS-13, I don't think you'd want to be his neighbor and I don't think many Americans watching would want to be this individual's neighbor!"
Watch the tense live T.V. clash here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d24e04aa-a304-473c-9e7c-4ab20062ce1e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **Scott Jennings GOES TO WAR with entire panel of CNN hacks for attacking Trump 's deportations**
CNN Republican Scott Jennings **[set the record straight during a heated panel debate](https://substack.com/redirect/993536bb-ad61-4064-a155-d55485bf9d7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that illegal immigrant and suspected MS-13 gang member Kilmar Abrego Garcia was correctly deported by the Trump administration.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/993536bb-ad61-4064-a155-d55485bf9d7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/993536bb-ad61-4064-a155-d55485bf9d7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"You guys need to understand, there is no version of this man's life that ends up with him living in the United States," Jennings explained. "He's an illegal alien from El Salvador who came to the country illegally, who in their view and in the view of some immigration courts is a member of MS-13..."
Abby Phillip interjected, disagreeing that Garcia has any concrete connection to MS-13. "He strongly disputes in court that he is a member of MS-13!" she said.
"That's literally the definition of tyranny!" another Democrat pundit added. "We're going to throw him in jail? No, there's a thing called the rule of law which has not been followed in this case,... the next time this goes up the court system, they have absolutely zero credibility to say 'don't worry, you can file a habeas petition...'"
Jennings shot back, "They have the ability to deport people who have deportation orders, do they not?! He has due process, he has a deportation order!"
Another Democrat clarified that the Supreme Court ordered that Garcia could not be sent to El Salvador because he was afraid of a rival gang.
**["They haven't existed in El Salvador for four years!"](https://substack.com/redirect/993536bb-ad61-4064-a155-d55485bf9d7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Jennings exploded. "There's more of that gang in Los Angeles than in El Salvador!!"
Watch Jennings take down the entire Democrat panel single handedly:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/993536bb-ad61-4064-a155-d55485bf9d7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
