* * *
Peter, Elon Musk is lying to you about saving the federal government money. Musk promised to cut $2 trillion from the federal budget. That was the deal he pitched to the American people before the 2024 election. Now that Trump is back in the White House, that number keeps shrinking. First to $1 trillion. Then to $150 billion. And now even that number isn’t credible. **_A new report just revealed that Musk’s so-called savings are inflated by bad math and made-up projections._** His own DOGE website can’t provide breakdowns for most of the cuts it claims to have made. This is embarrassing as it is dangerous. **These fake numbers are being used to justify real cuts to the programs millions of Americans rely on, like Social Security, Medicaid, public health, research, and more.** This is a classic billionaire scheme: use misinformation to gut the government and claim you’re "saving" the country while regular people pay the price. We can’t let this go unchecked. Trump gave his biggest donor the power to rewrite the budget, and now he’s using that power to mislead the public and attack the basic services our communities depend on. **[We need to show there’s a people-powered movement ready to fight back. clean_body: Add your name to demand transparency | Peter, Elon Musk is lying to you about saving the federal government money. Musk promised to cut $2 trillion from the federal budget. That was the deal he pitched to the American people before the 2024 election. Now that Trump is back in the White House, that number keeps shrinking. First to $1 trillion. Then to $150 billion. And now even that number isn’t credible. A new report just revealed that Musk’s so-called savings are inflated by bad math and made-up projections. His own DOGE website can’t provide breakdowns for most of the cuts it claims to have made. This is embarrassing as it is dangerous. These fake numbers are being used to justify real cuts to the programs millions of Americans rely on, like Social Security, Medicaid, public health, research, and more. This is a classic billionaire scheme: use misinformation to gut the government and claim you’re "saving" the country while regular people pay the price. We can’t let this go unchecked. Trump gave his biggest donor the power to rewrite the budget, and now he’s using that power to mislead the public and attack the basic services our communities depend on. Thanks for speaking out, Team Unite the Country | Unite the Country is fighting to hold Donald Trump accountable, expose his broken promises, and protect the progress we’ve made over the past four years — but we can’t do it without you! At this critical moment in American history, we’re calling on every Democrat to join Unite the Country in this fight. = = = Follow along:** | Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. subject: Don’t let them win by default.
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=5]

Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard.
They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress.
We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Thanks for taking action,
Team RTP

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Ladies and gentlemen, I'm announcing the release of the GULF OF AMERICA EXECUTIVE ORDER! I want you to have a PIECE OF HISTORY in your home. This is a replica of the one I signed in the Oval Office declaring that we will Make America Great Again by celebrating the big and beautiful Gulf of America! BUT my team has only got 1,500 of these with my signature on them...so they’re VERY LIMITED EDITION. Each of these is 100% Made in America, and they come in this nice HEAVY-DUTY FOLDER! It would make me so happy if you got one and framed it. I would love to see these in everybody’s home! Thanks, Donald J. body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105931827/539862768/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250415fwd_N_HBM_NO_5_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzYzY2NjEzLWNiMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0CiQ26VX2qc0mS5MAXXLa-kAq6XY7NyPruHT20FHcbY=)
---
**Peter, last week, the House of Representatives voted to pass one of the most dangerous threats to women’s rights in America. It is now one step closer to becoming federal law.**

**If the Senate passes the SAVE Act, millions of women would lose access to the ballot box, resulting in a catastrophic backslide for women’s rights in America. We must keep electing women as our best line of defense against these proposed laws.**

Congresswoman Maxine Dexter introduced an amendment that gave her colleagues a chance to protect women’s voting rights by stopping the bill from being implemented _unless Congress could guarantee that no women would be denied the right to vote._ **Republicans voted it down.**

[**At Her Bold Move, we were not surprised to learn that a Congresswoman stood up against this anti-woman policy. As male legislators continue to pass dangerous laws about women’s bodies, healthcare, and hard-fought rights, we desperately need to elect as many women as we can to offices across the country. Join us in our fight to do just that by donating $20.25 today. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105931831/539862771/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250415fwd_N_HBM_NO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzYzY2NjEzLWNiMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0CiQ26VX2qc0mS5MAXXLa-kAq6XY7NyPruHT20FHcbY=)

Thank you,

Her Bold Move

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
---
Hi Peter,

We are writing today because one of the most dangerous threats to women’s rights in America is now one step closer to becoming federal law.

Yesterday, the Republican-controlled House officially voted to pass the “Safeguard American Voter Eligibility” (SAVE) Act which would result in the disenfranchisement of millions of eligible voters. You may have heard about this bill and how it would impact millions of American women... Now that Republicans have a trifecta in Washington, it could easily become law.

**Here is just one reason why this matters:**
This bill would have a devastating impact on women – **most notably on the approximately 69 million women in America who legally changed their last names when they got married** – because the SAVE Act **requires** a _birth certificate that matches the name of the person registering to vote._
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105931834/539862776/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250415fwd_N_HBM_NO_5_NG_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzYzY2NjEzLWNiMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0CiQ26VX2qc0mS5MAXXLa-kAq6XY7NyPruHT20FHcbY=)
---
On April 1st, Congresswoman Maxine Dexter gave her colleagues a chance to protect women’s voting rights by introducing an amendment to the bill that would block it from being implemented unless Congress could guarantee that no eligible married women be denied the right to vote. **Republicans voted it down.**

[**At Her Bold Move, we were not surprised to learn that a Congresswoman stood up against this anti-woman policy. As male legislators continue to pass dangerous laws about women’s bodies, healthcare, and hard-fought rights, we desperately need to elect as many women as we can to offices across the country. Join us in our fight to do just that by donating $25 today. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105931837/539862779/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250415fwd_N_HBM_NO_5_NG_N_L2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzYzY2NjEzLWNiMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0CiQ26VX2qc0mS5MAXXLa-kAq6XY7NyPruHT20FHcbY=)

We will be monitoring the progress of this bill in the Senate and will keep you posted. In the meantime, we remain deeply concerned about the implications this would have on millions of Americans who might not have access to birth certificates, passports, or the documentation this bill would require them to present in order to exercise their constitutional right to vote.

If 69 million American women across the country lose their ability to vote, that would be a catastrophic backslide for women’s rights in America. We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: we must keep up the fight. Women have made SO MUCH PROGRESS over the last century. We must defend that hard-fought progress on behalf of our mothers, our grandmothers, our daughters, and our friends.

[**At Her Bold Move, we know our first line of defense will be the women we elect to our government – the women in the rooms where these decisions are being made. You can join our fight today by donating $25 or more right now. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105931839/539862782/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250415fwd_N_HBM_NO_5_NG_N_L3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzYzY2NjEzLWNiMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0CiQ26VX2qc0mS5MAXXLa-kAq6XY7NyPruHT20FHcbY=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105931842/539862786/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250415fwd_N_HBM_NO_5_NG_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzYzY2NjEzLWNiMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0CiQ26VX2qc0mS5MAXXLa-kAq6XY7NyPruHT20FHcbY=)

clean_body: | | | | | = Peter, last week, the House of Representatives voted to pass one of the most dangerous threats to women’s rights in America. It is now one step closer to becoming federal law. If the Senate passes the SAVE Act, millions of women would lose access to the ballot box, resulting in a catastrophic backslide for women’s rights in America. We must keep electing women as our best line of defense against these proposed laws. Congresswoman Maxine Dexter introduced an amendment that gave her colleagues a chance to protect women’s voting rights by stopping the bill from being implemented unless Congress could guarantee that no women would be denied the right to vote. Republicans voted it down. = Thank you, Her Bold Move \---------- Forwarded message --------- Hi Peter, We are writing today because one of the most dangerous threats to women’s rights in America is now one step closer to becoming federal law. Yesterday, the Republican-controlled House officially voted to pass the “Safeguard American Voter Eligibility” (SAVE) Act which would result in the disenfranchisement of millions of eligible voters. You may have heard about this bill and how it would impact millions of American women... Now that Republicans have a trifecta in Washington, it could easily become law. Here is just one reason why this matters: This bill would have a devastating impact on women – most notably on the approximately 69 million women in America who legally changed their last names when they got married – because the SAVE Act requires a birth certificate that matches the name of the person registering to vote. = On April 1st, Congresswoman Maxine Dexter gave her colleagues a chance to protect women’s voting rights by introducing an amendment to the bill that would block it from being implemented unless Congress could guarantee that no eligible married women be denied the right to vote. Republicans voted it down. = We will be monitoring the progress of this bill in the Senate and will keep you posted. In the meantime, we remain deeply concerned about the implications this would have on millions of Americans who might not have access to birth certificates, passports, or the documentation this bill would require them to present in order to exercise their constitutional right to vote. If 69 million American women across the country lose their ability to vote, that would be a catastrophic backslide for women’s rights in America. We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: we must keep up the fight. Women have made SO MUCH PROGRESS over the last century. We must defend that hard-fought progress on behalf of our mothers, our grandmothers, our daughters, and our friends. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thank you, Jordan Zaslow Founder & Executive Director of Her Bold Move | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. As dangerous laws about women get passed in states with the lowest numbers of women in government (11%, 12%....), we're BREAKING the male supermajorities across those states. Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies. Support this important work with a contribution today! = | | | | | Paid for by Her Bold Move Action. name: Team AOC
subject: 30,000 people in Folsom, CA last night!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Last night, AOC and Bernie rallied with over 30,000 people — in Folsom, CA, with a population of just 85,000 — in Republican Kevin Kiley’s district:
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250416.OAXLx9&refcode=em20250416-8621-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8621%2E2526796%2EOD03v_)
The people of this country are willing to fight back. They deserve politicians that will stand with them.
**Next stop, Montana**.
Something special is happening. Our work to build community must begin _now_ if we are to prevent the country from becoming a private slush fund for Donald Trump and his billionaire donors.
[Will you make a $5 contribution right now to help us host even more town halls as the Fighting Oligarchy Tour continues? Every donation makes a difference.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250416.OAXLx9&refcode=em20250416-8621-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8621%2E2526796%2EOD03v_)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250416.OAXLx9&refcode=em20250416-8621-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=8621%2E2526796%2EOD03v_)**
Thank you for standing with us.
Let's keep up the fight,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250416?refcode=em20250416-8621-P_FND_CTR_GRM&t=22&refcode2=8621_2526796_OD03v_&akid=8621%2E2526796%2EOD03v_)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250416-8621-P_FND_CTR_GRM&t=23&akid=8621%2E2526796%2EOD03v_)**

---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Minnesota DFL
subject: We need to be in every corner of the state right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Minnesota Democratic–Farmer–Labor Party
body:
We can’t expect voters to trust us if we only show up a few weeks before an election. | | | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105934344/539870979/-1821622191?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzU5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjhjNzVmYi1jZDFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=McelpJAsh0k6z36Fd8wGR2TiMOuihTyIS05eQ-EfiUk=)**
---
Peter, We can’t expect voters to trust us if we only show up a few weeks before an election. To attract new voters and reconnect with people who’ve drifted away from our party, we need to be in every corner of the state _right now_ —knocking on doors, forming relationships, and building trust. **That’s why we have an ambitious plan to put organizers on the ground in every region of the state earlier in the cycle than ever before** —including Greater Minnesota and other communities that often don’t get the attention they deserve. But here’s the thing: Organizing takes resources. We need money to hire organizers, train volunteers, host community events, and build a grassroots network strong enough to take on the Trump-Musk agenda. **We have to raise $30,000 by this Friday, April 18 to get this statewide organizing program off the ground. ** Our records indicate that you’re still eligible for the Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program, a public financing tool that allows Minnesotans to donate $75 (or $150 for couples) to our party and receive a full refund. **[Peter, will you make your refundable $75 donation by Friday to help launch new organizing initiatives and build a people-powered movement capable of winning up and down the ballot?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105934374/539871013/-1514823151?refcode=body&amount=75&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzU5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjhjNzVmYi1jZDFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=McelpJAsh0k6z36Fd8wGR2TiMOuihTyIS05eQ-EfiUk=)** | | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: We can’t expect voters to trust us if we only show up a few weeks before an election. | | | = Peter, We can’t expect voters to trust us if we only show up a few weeks before an election. To attract new voters and reconnect with people who’ve drifted away from our party, we need to be in every corner of the state right now —knocking on doors, forming relationships, and building trust. That’s why we have an ambitious plan to put organizers on the ground in every region of the state earlier in the cycle than ever before —including Greater Minnesota and other communities that often don’t get the attention they deserve. But here’s the thing: Organizing takes resources. We need money to hire organizers, train volunteers, host community events, and build a grassroots network strong enough to take on the Trump-Musk agenda. We have to raise $30,000 by this Friday, April 18 to get this statewide organizing program off the ground. Our records indicate that you’re still eligible for the Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program, a public financing tool that allows Minnesotans to donate $75 (or $150 for couples) to our party and receive a full refund. = | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = Thank you, Minnesota DFL ** | = = = Monthly supporters are the backbone of all we do. Peter, we are not — nor have we ever been — a land of kings. And the founding of our nation was a unique one because of it. Our founding fathers were determined to be a land by the people, for the people. Loving this nation and realizing that there is still more work to do aren’t competing thoughts, Peter. In fact, true patriots are willing to do the work to live up to our country’s founding ideals. Members of the other side of the aisle have bent the knee and are supporting an authoritarian agenda that only benefits billionaires. I won’t bend the knee to MAGA tyrants. Members of the other side of the aisle have bent the knee and are supporting an authoritarian agenda that only benefits billionaires. I won’t bend the knee to MAGA tyrants. I am committed to standing up and putting in the work that is required to uphold the ideas of liberty, freedom, and equality this nation was founded on. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = We, as leaders, were not elected to be obedient, submit, or cower to oligarchs. I’m fighting every single day for working families across Vermont and to realize the promise of this nation. Thank you for your support today, Becca mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

# **Governor Braun, HHS Secretary Kennedy, and Dr. Oz Unveils 9 Executive Orders To Help ‘Make Indiana Healthy Again’**

---
| | [](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/3SH69h85JZd8yNhUpFxXGTrciDrRJ0q6f0JlkWKUP3u1ssvnGHz1MQ6N_Z9G00Aw4Uo3M0uFOf1ZIJnRj40cGCWhpsz72nFZY_4YxPn5_kn83TBbB6_yiag72jd-Ub9OJl9z4iHjhp4v4cnUmNM1wl8bO33i3l4NkZeP3XWK0ZeeVMN8nndyErpIgBdYUmKyqiGpsyO-ApSs5z-I9skKfo96SsYIcmN3jn-fr8pD8g0MCxUPiUc78qVpAIJ-DZqq708FAYBLsejTgm9Lq4vW797iA5zyga4QCy7kGtjJKZX8S2Mu-ZVEEHSS-LzKd8ZubKJjB-5aKbMT-MdlUPH86VN0ONUdgLuwfo9u5SoWcxEr/N8_aXPMo-AJbmhbc5albw5Y1GQLP5Cfp/8)
---
Fox 59
David Gay
April 14, 2025 [https://fox59.com/indianapolitics/braun-unveils-9-executive-orders-to-help-make-indiana-healthy-again/](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/DCTWjxWacpb5bfIqHSh0tLYzKYBBkiuFAW2hJN2V7zy5dWyMQXYgfvPPwOBAQJ_nEuJDmKXXC6L7B4LJ8SXpUxThRlmCk_EFZ1KKN_oPDhn9I7fJiaXkkPFryQamNhUx9W9-G4tO938TwtT5kbS5h96ddDGyowVMAn_H-cs03C9MOzcmh-kE8KBbjTQyBVU53gnlVSm9SNPmA614IbgIOlmThMKRrrbvfg91r6HRi20KpwZXad5moImwSbnVapNrEBy6aRljU5FbpPsQFSoKUxi2aOoPenVDtFMWWlLwqcQFGKTQpjaWZBZbGYITp80zt5TTodEE134EMhn_67MyliopAAYaWf1TnYD90UB5B3Lv/f5LqblOaAROgg88BNMyynPJc0AViv-F4/8)
With a backdrop featuring the motto “Make Indiana Healthy Again,” Indiana Gov. Mike Braun stood side by side with Robert F. Kennedy and Mehmet Oz, emphasizing their collective intention to make Indiana a healthier state while further promoting health and wellness at the federal level. Braun signed a series of nine executive orders on Tuesday, promoting Hoosier health and the state’s well-being. During his remarks, Oz said that this “breaks the record by far” surrounding the “Make America Healthy Again” effort. These orders included ones surrounding the Supplemental Nutritional Assistance Program, or SNAP, assessing the health impacts of artificial dyes and increasing Hoosier access to local foods. Braun said on Tuesday that these orders will help Indiana best align Indiana with federal health efforts. Kennedy is the U.S. Secretary of Health and Human Services under President Donald Trump. He has publicly criticized vaccines, as well as the overall healthcare system. Kennedy is also a previous independent presidential candidate. Earlier this month, Oz, a former TV host and heart surgeon, was confirmed as head of the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid. During his campaign, and during his first few months in office, Braun has made healthcare a priority. According to previous reports, Braun has signed multiple executive orders surrounding healthcare costs, Medicaid and increasing access and transparency for healthcare providers. Braun said each one of these executive orders help change the underlying issues that Indiana residents can control. “This isn’t the usual top-down, one-size-fits-all public health agenda,” Braun said in the release surrounding the orders. “We’re focused on root causes, giving Hoosiers the transparent information to make decisions affecting their health, making it easier to access to fresh local food from Indiana’s incredible farms, and taking on the problems in government programs that are contributing to making our communities less healthy.” What are the nine executive orders? **SNAP** The first four orders signed by Braun on Tuesday surrounded the SNAP program, including encouraging the Indiana Family and Social Services Administration to exclude candy and soft drinks from the program. This particular order states that the FSSA will apply for a waiver to exclude candy and soft drinks from the list of SNAP-eligible products. If the waiver is approved at the federal level, the release said that those products will be eliminated from the list. The state’s secretary of Health and Family Services will also recommend additional items to be removed from the SNAP-eligible list “understood to have low nutritional value and a positive correlation with weight gain and obesity...” **The other orders related to SNAP include:** The FSSA will overhaul its employment and training program to assign all non-exempt SNAP recipients to work requirements. The reinstatement of asset testing for SNAP eligibility and limits eligibility to households receiving Temporary Assistance for Needy Family-funded cash assistance, work supports, childcare assistance or households participating in TANF-funded work, education or training programs. The FSSA and the State Budget Agency will review federal SNAP statutes and report findings to federal officials by Dec. 31, 2025, advocating for more state flexibility. **Other orders** The other orders that Braun signed on Tuesday included ones surrounding increasing transparency surrounding food dyes, the development of a diet-related chronic disease plan and increasing access to local foods. **Executive Order 25-66: Making Indiana Healthy Again by Increasing Consumer Transparency Related to Food Dyes and Additives** This order tasks the Indiana Department of Health with conducting a comprehensive assessment on the health impacts of artificial food dyes and additives. Officials said that they will prioritize those that have been identified as harmful by the federal government or other states. The release said the assessment will look at scientific research, health risks as well as advice from food safety specialists and consumer advocates. Recommendations for state actions are then expected to be made to the governor’s office. In the release, and during Tuesday’s conference, Braun said he had concerns surrounding food transparency regarding artificial food dyes, stating that this order helps assess and address these concerns. **Executive Order 25-57: Making Indiana Healthy Again by Developing a Comprehensive Diet-Related Chronic Disease Plan** Through this order, the state’s secretary of Health and Family Services will “conduct a comprehensive study on diet-related chronic disease in Indiana” specifically surrounding kids. This study will also help the state improve how diet-related chronic disease programs can be improved, including programs surrounding: Physical activity Nutrition Chronic disease management The aim of this order is to improve these kinds of state programs, and gather data surrounding how effective they are at reducing the chronic disease in the state of Indiana, ultimately improving them to “get better return-on-investment, fill gaps in services and reduce regulatory barriers.” **Executive Order 25-58: Making Indiana Healthy Again by Increasing Hoosier Access to Local Foods** This order directs the Indiana State Department of Agriculture to conduct a comprehensive study related to the access of local foods in the state of Indiana, as well as direct-to-consumer food sales from Hoosier farmers. Officials said that the order’s purpose is to identify opportunities to increase those direct-to-consumer sales and help identify ways that Indiana is “getting in the way” of that. **Executive Order 25-59: Making Indiana Healthy Again by Promoting the Health and Wellness of Hoosier Students** This order stablishes the Governor’s Fitness Test, as well as School Fitness Month, which will include recommended activities and lessons to increase physical activity and health awareness for students. The release said these programs will also encourage healthier and local food options through increasing farm-to-school programs. It is also expected to provide parents with transparent nutritional data for school meals. **Executive Order 25-60: Assuring Prudent Use of Taxpayer Funds by Ensuring Integrity in the Indiana Medicaid Program** This order requires the FSSA to stop accepting self-attested eligibility for the state’s Medicaid program and enforce hospital performance standards for presumptive eligibility. The FSSA will also use interagency data to identify ineligible recipients and initiate redeterminations. This comes after the state experienced a $1 billion budget shortfall in 2024 and a 28.8% improper payment rate in the most recent federal audit. During his remarks on Tuesday, Kennedy said the orders are designed to improve farms, fitness, food, education and health. With these orders, Kennedy said that he has nothing but optimism for the state of Indiana and encouraged governors across the country to follow Indiana’s lead with these initiatives. Oz said Tuesday was “a monumental day” for the state of Indiana, stating that the federal health effort is a “generational opportunity to make this country as healthy as it should be.” Indiana Attorney General Todd Rokita, who was also on hand for Tuesday’s announcement, said that Indiana is going to lead the “Make America Healthy Again” movement. “Hoosiers in large numbers support the MAHA movement, and the promises that were made are now being kept thanks to the Trump and Braun administration,” Rokita said in a news release.
[To Read The Full Story Click Here](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/lg-kGUP_lsnjdAdGcDZ5dLNHbzQdO2OoapNbI2IC1MK0yOQVuWb8Qblk4xrAJPt1Ep5q67gL5Mngf6L-Qmq9atN2XRmjdu7CELNQtH9rOL3xrrYU6O3kF8RLGKhMUpPQO-oDragN00S_-abBW1zwxwVm0IvLHg5l9IJ4POVNY2JLFxFPyTMOSSPSO2xIsS7lM8edghyq7qiWEatOfk79xy-OIs4W5tSDQJTMBeUJ5VQmlO8BD-BJ7r3U4NFhUJrzVrVHqGulIvcE14M8ldo4g56pGSy0QHDQ2v0bzr6xbwfxi2FREh0_SQzd3FkUeuF_45lq9ZjYqAbvhBk4yoVVo1EZWcd5ux5Kw988C_sEZaQT/7zAsIo72P2Zbvndf0f6jcA1mSYAsVjMb/8)

name: Urgent Petition (via Left Action)
subject: Tell Trump: Bring home the Maryland dad you wrongly deported to El Salvador
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Bring back the Maryland dad wrongly deported to El Salvador >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T415a6d3c-37dd-42ed-872f-597ec1f35d1a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfece3ace-9a58-4815-b9d4-212515725d17/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | He is a father of 3. He is married to an American citizen. He has no criminal record whatsoever. And he was mistakenly deported to El Salvador, to a horrifically violent prison. Even Trump officials admit that it was an “administrative error.” And yet, they’re not doing a damn thing to get Kilmar Abrego Garcia back to America — even though a court has ordered them to do it. In fact, Trump even laughably claimed he couldn't do it -- while he was sitting right next to his BFF, the president of El Salvador. [**Add your name, and demand that they correct their mistake NOW, and bring him back.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T548d4350-a246-499a-9bfe-8a027f32f296/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This isn’t a tough call. The guy wasn’t supposed to be deported, and he’s got a clean record. If they can deport him, and ignore the rules, then any one of us is at risk. [**Add your name, and demand that Trump officials correct their mistake NOW, and bring him back.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2aeda0bf-7e8a-4350-ba7a-d065c162963b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Patriot,
---
None of this is easy for me to say, but here it goes...
---
All my life I’ve been known as a fighter.
---
I fought the mob head on in New York as America's mayor. I fought the sham witch hunts against President Trump. I’ve fought to defend my good name against the Left’s vicious lies, smears, and attacks.
---
**But over the past few years – and I hope you’ll agree – _I’ve fought the hardest of my ENTIRE life for my freedom and true justice._ **
---
The Radical Democrats and their accomplices labeled me a “ _DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_ ,” _RAIDED_ my home, _ARRESTED_ me, took a _MUGSHOT_ of me, and forced me into _BANKRUPTCY_.
---

_But every step of the way I’ve fought with every fiber of my being – supported by generous patriots like _YOU_ – and here I am, still standing!_

**And if we’re being honest with each other, it’s a cost I simply cannot bear on my own.**
---
Make no mistake, this was the vindictive Democrats’ plan all along...
---
_This latest sham criminal case in Arizona – where if the Democrat Attorney General gets her way, I could take my last breath in prison – is designed to bleed me dry._

That’s why I now have no choice but to set a goal to raise $50,000 before week’s end for my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can continue fighting to remain a FREE man.

name: Team Rayfield
subject: AG Rayfield announces Bend town hall
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/danrayfield/ag-rayfield-announces-bend-town-hall?e=1768325bd4)
---
| |
---
| |
# **RSVP FOR BEND TOWN HALL**
Dear Friends,

Last week, we marked my 100th day in office with two town halls - hearing from Oregonians concerned about the impacts of federal actions.

We're not slowing down. We are planning our third town hall in Bend on May 3rd at 9:30. We will have panelists speaking about how their organizations have been affected by funding cuts and the loss of workers, and we're inviting the public to share their testimony and ask questions.

Joining me are Senator Anthony Broadman, Representative Jason Kropf and Representative Emerson Levy. We are all working to defend the values and freedoms of Oregonians.

Please[ click here ](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=c04c4d63ef&e=1768325bd4)to RSVP.

We hope you can join us!

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Friend, Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball just released their 2026 House prediction—and it’s not good. The initial ratings show Democrats on track to take back the House majority. The DCCC is planning an all-out assault on conservative districts, and I’ve already been listed as a target by the House Majority PAC. They’re not just coming for battleground districts anymore. They’re trying to flip deep red territory by flooding it with dark money... | | | | | | This isn’t just a political prediction, it’s a wake-up call. The Left sees Minnesota as soft ground, and they’re bringing in national cash, out-of-touch candidates, and radical activists to try to flip our district blue. I’ve been working every day to make sure southern Minnesota’s voice is heard in Washington. But I can’t do it alone. If we let our guard down now, we’ll lose this seat and with it, the majority. Let’s show the DCCC and House Majority PAC that Minnesota is not for sale. P Thank you, Brad FinstadMinnesota's 1st Congressional District | | | | | | | PO Box 923, New Ulm, MN 56073

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Cannot let them privatize the USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project
Folks -- We know Donald Trump is attempting to take over the United States Postal Service and make it part of the Commerce Department. But now we know his true endgame.
Trump and his greedy billionaire buddies on Wall Street are trying to fully privatize the USPS. Their goal is simple: break it apart, and sell it off for its parts to the highest corporate bidder that has zero interest in continuing to serve every ZIP code.
Now, we have a real opportunity to have Congress take a stand and vow to stop Trump’s USPS privatization plan and save the people’s post office .
Almost 200 members of Congress have already co-sponsored bipartisan resolutions that would draw a clear line in the sand that Congress intends to take every measure to ensure the Postal Service remains an independent public institution.
Tell your representatives in Congress to support the bipartisan bills in the House and Senate to stop this shady privatization scheme before it's too late >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/save-the-usps-3/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/save-the-usps-3/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
H.Res.70 and S.Res.147 reaffirm the founding principle that the USPS exists to serve the people, not greedy corporate billionaires . These resolutions are proof that protecting our public post office is a bipartisan concern, with support from Democrats and Republicans alike. From Republican Rep. Don Bacon and Sen. Thom Tillis, to Democratic Sen. Maggie Hassan and Rep. Gerry Connolly, lawmakers across deep red and blue districts are rejecting privatization.
Leaders in both political parties know exactly who privatization would hurt: rural families, veterans, seniors, postal workers, Black-owned small businesses, Indigenous communities, and many more. The loss of the people’s post office and the public services it provides to folks across the country would be devastating.
Trump and his billionaire cronies tried dismantling the post office for their own profit before -- and we stopped them . But now they’re back with an even more aggressive plan. We can’t stay silent, Congress must hear from us that we will not allow a hostile takeover of the people’s post office to succeed. The damage will be irreversible.
Congress must act before it’s too late. This is our chance to once again show Wall Street our broad, bipartisan support for the defense of the Postal Service from being gutted for corporate gain.
Urge your members of Congress to co-sponsor and pass bipartisan H.Res.70 and S.Res.147 to stop Trump's privatization plan now! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/save-the-usps-3/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/save-the-usps-3/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=do0srlSJ4ukM/EaA1hwXu75xfqtdh5PvkAMtGg06nc1BGEvIZdXEO74y0uQ4vu9y0dd6Q22Iyz5+YP6MN4AXrLyQ+T6bp5jCoXbycVKPJMI= [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=do0srlSJ4ukM/EaA1hwXu75xfqtdh5PvkAMtGg06nc1BGEvIZdXEO74y0uQ4vu9y0dd6Q22Iyz5+YP6MN4AXrLyQ+T6bp5jCoXbycVKPJMI=]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=do0srlSJ4ukM/EaA1hwXu75xfqtdh5PvkAMtGg06nc1BGEvIZdXEO74y0uQ4vu9y0dd6Q22Iyz5+YP6MN4AXrLyQ+T6bp5jCoXbycVKPJMI=]

name: Steve Daines & Tim Sheehy
subject: Bernie & AOC are targeting Montana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
Bernie Sanders and AOC are bringing their Socialist road show to Montana today. Thousands of radical activists and extremists are going to flood into Montana to rally behind Bernie and AOC’s radical agenda. |
---
Fellow American,

Bernie Sanders and AOC are bringing their Socialist road show to Montana today.

Thousands of radical activists and extremists are going to flood into Montana to rally behind Bernie and AOC’s radical agenda. Their message is clear -- Montana is on their 2026 target list!

body:
We cannot sit idly by while the Trump Administration unravels all of our hard-fought progress.
#

Friends -- sorry to come to you with bad news, but we wanted to make sure you saw this:
**The Trump administration is taking action to roll back President Biden’s gun safety progress.**
[**We cannot sit idly by while the Trump Administration unravels all of our hard-fought progress. We need you to help us fight back against this new action. Please rush in $3 to GIFFORDS PAC >>**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr25.x-ZdIQ&refcode=em250416-1NH-b&t=30&akid=10313%2E3935704%2EHO0Zom)
**[DONATE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr25.x-ZdIQ&refcode=em250416-1NH-b&t=31&akid=10313%2E3935704%2EHO0Zom)**
This comes as no surprise. Just last month, Donald Trump issued an executive order to review every gun safety action taken by the Biden Administration -- setting the stage for this move.
The majority of Americans -- Democrats, Republicans, and Independents -- support commonsense gun laws.
Our president is choosing to put the gun lobby over gun safety, even though gun violence is the #1 cause of death for children and teens.
[**We’ve worked hard to make our communities safer from gun violence, and we’ll fight every single day to stand up against Donald Trump and his allies. If you can, please pitch in to GIFFORDS PAC.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr25.x-ZdIQ&refcode=em250416-1NH-b&t=32&akid=10313%2E3935704%2EHO0Zom)

If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you for fighting alongside us. -- Team GIFFORDS PAC Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: RE: Saving Our Mothers:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Save lives and build a more equitable world by supporting the Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice today. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWO-dTuufP6nRQKl4cKLmPcNYxk2JQJa-QcDFMIEJ1vMnKkYjoWWHrc-BhNWjqZeBOmUCDfbH_MHxeZ-H75zwi_7e4A4dZXVTR8ckI3QmIUoIzUUD1hlZwu20rYUSzq-Jo/4fp/oS-de5gDSgCb47x5cPh9EQ/h0/h001.fjVaeR6DmByPwuXFDyH_tOlIgg5P7b-ArrO81pupmNQ)
---
Friend, To address our country’s maternal mortality crisis, this Black Maternal Health Week is focused on _“Strengthening Black Maternal Health Through Collective Action and Advocacy,”_ emphasizing the power of Black-led reproductive health organizations to “drive systemic change,” “shape policies,” and “amplify solutions.” The **Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice** (MCRJ) exemplifies this, leading the push for transformative legislation that addresses the root causes of maternal health disparities in our state. MCRJ’s work is urgently needed in Michigan, which has one of the nation’s highest Black maternal mortality rates. Here, Black women are more than 4.5 times more likely to die of pregnancy-related causes than white women. These deaths are heartbreaking and preventable. As the policy lead in a statewide coalition for birth justice, the Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice is advancing much-needed solutions to save lives. The group’s relentless advocacy led to:
* A new bill that just got signed into law to expand access to birth centers, which are proven to improve Black maternal health outcomes
* The introduction and advancement of the “Michigan Momnibus” policy package, including bills to protect patients and reimburse doulas and midwives, which will be voted on this week in the Michigan Senate
* Direct support and critical resources for Black birthing people, their families, and healthcare providers

In addition to policy progress for birth justice, the Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice (MCRJ) is fighting for water affordability, housing justice, environmental protections, person-centered affirming care, and more. MCRJ recognizes that these intersecting issues are essential to achieving true reproductive justice and freedom.
Right now, the attacks on Medicaid and the federal freeze on funding for reproductive health and maternal health are threatening MCRJ’s progress.
These right-wing threats are also jeopardizing the safety net for marginalized communities, who already face significant barriers to quality healthcare. The Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice’s work depends on federal resources to expand access to doulas, midwives, and culturally competent care. Without sustained funding, they’re forced to fight harder for every dollar to ensure communities don’t lose access to life-saving support.

From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Tues, Apr 15, 2025
Subject: Saving Our Mothers:
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
This Black Maternal Health Week, I want to lift up incredible leaders in the movement to improve healthcare for Black moms and their babies.
**The Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice (MCRJ) is advancing Black maternal health through grassroots leadership, policy advocacy, and coalition building.** MCRJ is committed to ensuring that all people receive the dignified, equitable care they deserve before, during, and after birth.
In my state of Michigan, this is especially needed because Black maternal mortality rates are among the highest in the nation—with Black women more than 4.5 times likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than white women, and Black infants 3 times more likely to die than white infants.
Solutions to this urgent crisis include investing in more Black healthcare providers and more birth centers, which are midwife-led, home-like places that have been proven to improve maternal and infant health outcomes.
As the policy lead for the Michigan State of Birth Justice Coalition, MCRJ grounds its work in the foundational leadership of Birth Detroit—home to the only Black-led birth center in the state. The coalition’s community-rooted vision has helped shape critical policy wins, including a newly signed law to license and expand access to birth centers, and the “Michigan Momnibus” policy package—featuring vital bills to support doulas and midwives and protect patients from discrimination.

Thanks in part to the relentless advocacy from the Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice, lawmakers introduced the “Michigan Momnibus” package during last year’s Black Maternal Health Week. This week, this set of important solutions will be voted on in the Michigan Senate. Then it’s on to the State House!
While pushing for life-saving policies, the Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice (MCRJ) is also providing education and resources to communities, their families, healthcare providers, and the institutions that shape their care experiences.
This community group’s work is rooted in reproductive justice, which is the human right to maintain personal bodily autonomy, to have children or not have children, and to parent in safe, sustainable communities.
In addition to birth justice, MCRJ advocates for intersecting issues such as environmental justice and housing justice—recognizing that access to clean water, safe housing, and economic stability are essential to achieving true reproductive freedom.
The Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice’s critical work depends on federal resources to expand access to doulas, midwives, and culturally competent care. The federal funding freeze is forcing them to fight harder for every dollar to ensure that communities don’t lose access to life-saving support.

In Congress, I’m supporting policies for Black maternal and infant health like the federal _Momnibus Act_ , and I’m working with the Congressional Mamas’ Caucus to center Black mothers and other mothers of color in policymaking.

In love and solidarity,
Rashida

clean_body: Save lives and build a more equitable world by supporting the Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice today. | | | Friend, To address our country’s maternal mortality crisis, this Black Maternal Health Week is focused on “Strengthening Black Maternal Health Through Collective Action and Advocacy,” emphasizing the power of Black-led reproductive health organizations to “drive systemic change,” “shape policies,” and “amplify solutions.” The Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice (MCRJ) exemplifies this, leading the push for transformative legislation that addresses the root causes of maternal health disparities in our state. MCRJ’s work is urgently needed in Michigan, which has one of the nation’s highest Black maternal mortality rates. Here, Black women are more than 4.5 times more likely to die of pregnancy-related causes than white women. These deaths are heartbreaking and preventable. As the policy lead in a statewide coalition for birth justice, the Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice is advancing much-needed solutions to save lives. The group’s relentless advocacy led to: A new bill that just got signed into law to expand access to birth centers, which are proven to improve Black maternal health outcomes The introduction and advancement of the “Michigan Momnibus” policy package, including bills to protect patients and reimburse doulas and midwives, which will be voted on this week in the Michigan Senate Direct support and critical resources for Black birthing people, their families, and healthcare providers | In addition to policy progress for birth justice, the Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice (MCRJ) is fighting for water affordability, housing justice, environmental protections, person-centered affirming care, and more. MCRJ recognizes that these intersecting issues are essential to achieving true reproductive justice and freedom. Right now, the attacks on Medicaid and the federal freeze on funding for reproductive health and maternal health are threatening MCRJ’s progress. These right-wing threats are also jeopardizing the safety net for marginalized communities, who already face significant barriers to quality healthcare. The Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice’s work depends on federal resources to expand access to doulas, midwives, and culturally competent care. Without sustained funding, they’re forced to fight harder for every dollar to ensure communities don’t lose access to life-saving support. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for taking action to build more safety and equity for Black women and all people. Together, we will fight back against racism, fascism, and dehumanizing hate. We will also keep pushing toward positive visions of the world we all deserve, including this from a 2023 convening of reproductive justice leaders: “Our vision is a future rooted in human dignity and worth, bodily autonomy, joy, love, and rest.”1 In solidarity, Rashida 1\. \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib**** Date: Tues, Apr 15, 2025 Subject: Saving Our Mothers: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, This Black Maternal Health Week, I want to lift up incredible leaders in the movement to improve healthcare for Black moms and their babies. The Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice (MCRJ) is advancing Black maternal health through grassroots leadership, policy advocacy, and coalition building. MCRJ is committed to ensuring that all people receive the dignified, equitable care they deserve before, during, and after birth. In my state of Michigan, this is especially needed because Black maternal mortality rates are among the highest in the nation—with Black women more than 4.5 times likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than white women, and Black infants 3 times more likely to die than white infants. Solutions to this urgent crisis include investing in more Black healthcare providers and more birth centers, which are midwife-led, home-like places that have been proven to improve maternal and infant health outcomes. As the policy lead for the Michigan State of Birth Justice Coalition, MCRJ grounds its work in the foundational leadership of Birth Detroit—home to the only Black-led birth center in the state. The coalition’s community-rooted vision has helped shape critical policy wins, including a newly signed law to license and expand access to birth centers, and the “Michigan Momnibus” policy package—featuring vital bills to support doulas and midwives and protect patients from discrimination. Thanks in part to the relentless advocacy from the Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice, lawmakers introduced the “Michigan Momnibus” package during last year’s Black Maternal Health Week. This week, this set of important solutions will be voted on in the Michigan Senate. Then it’s on to the State House! While pushing for life-saving policies, the Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice (MCRJ) is also providing education and resources to communities, their families, healthcare providers, and the institutions that shape their care experiences. This community group’s work is rooted in reproductive justice, which is the human right to maintain personal bodily autonomy, to have children or not have children, and to parent in safe, sustainable communities. In addition to birth justice, MCRJ advocates for intersecting issues such as environmental justice and housing justice—recognizing that access to clean water, safe housing, and economic stability are essential to achieving true reproductive freedom. The Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice’s critical work depends on federal resources to expand access to doulas, midwives, and culturally competent care. The federal funding freeze is forcing them to fight harder for every dollar to ensure that communities don’t lose access to life-saving support. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Our systems and institutions have failed to provide Black people with the high-quality healthcare that everyone deserves. But I refuse to accept this status quo, and I thank you for standing with me and the movement for health equity. In Congress, I’m supporting policies for Black maternal and infant health like the federal Momnibus Act , and I’m working with the Congressional Mamas’ Caucus to center Black mothers and other mothers of color in policymaking. Together, we will continue demanding and building a society that honors everyone’s safety, dignity, and bodily autonomy. name: Team Bell
subject: They’re too afraid to push back. Too cowardly to say no.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter —

Donald Trump and his billionaire allies — like Elon Musk — have filled Congress with handpicked extremists too afraid to say “no” to him and too eager to push his reckless agenda.

_And that makes them dangerous._

They’re pushing a reckless agenda that includes:

🚫 Tariffs that would raise prices on working families

🚫 Cuts to Medicaid and Social Security

🚫 Gutting funding for our public schools

These are real consequences of the Trump administration, and the people who are going to feel it the most are the hardworking folks right here in St. Louis. It puts vulnerable Americans more at risk and protects only the rich and powerful — **folks like Trump and his billionaire allies.**

But Wesley Bell isn’t here to play by their rules. He’s not the D.C. establishment’s pick. _**His focus is on standing up and delivering for the St. Louis region.**_

And right now, he’s fighting tooth and nail to protect Missouri families from Trump’s political games and ensure St. Louisans don’t pay the price. name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: You’re Invited: Train to be a poll challenger
body:
Peter, As citizens, we have a role to play in making sure our elections have integrity: oversight and accountability. By being present, aware, and ready to take action, we can be a critical roadblock against attempts
| | [ ]()
---
Peter,
---
As citizens, we have a role to play in making sure our elections have integrity: oversight and accountability. By being present, aware, and ready to take action, we can be a critical roadblock against attempts to get around our laws, mess with the voting process and results, and sneak in ineligible votes. But that means being trained on what to look for and how to take action. In 2024, the Citizens for NJ Election Integrity trained over 200 poll challengers in New Jersey. Ahead of the June 10th primary, they’ll be holding TWO Poll Challenger Training Classes – one virtual over Zoom and the other in-person in Ocean County. I highly recommend you sign up for one of these training sessions and bring along a friend.

Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsense.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsense.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.

name: the EMILYs List Digital Team
subject: [SURVEY] Using our resources to counter Republicans' "Flood the Zone" strategy
body:
A part of taking back power is continuing to build our opposition strategy. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105941420/539891474/-1649115438?refcode=WUENE435_2025416_MadSurvey_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055964&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWI0ZWJkNi1kNzFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wkfDlnOYEHrkONs-T2Pr6IuEAEHrEBJFYTWAij-effw=&emci=68fb6461-d21a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c9b4ebd6-d71a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5177934) Peter,

It's been 86 days since the Trump administration took power. Every single day, they've deployed their "Flood the Zone" strategy to overwhelm, distract, and divide their opposition.

But here's the truth: **we're not backing down. And a huge part of taking back power is continuing to build our opposition strategy.**

Across the country, Democratic pro-choice women are stepping up by writing bold legislation, challenging MAGA extremism at the state level, and pushing back against every harmful executive order.

While EMILYs List leaders continue that important work, as an organization, we've built a powerful infrastructure to fight back. But we also know what we're up against:
* Extremist billionaires
* Anti-choice Republicans
* Well-funded organizations working to strip away our freedoms

If we're going to win this fight, we need to sharpen our strategy and use every resource we have to target these groups. [**We want to make sure our priorities are your priorities. Take our 30-second strategy survey now:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105941422/539891485/-1649115438?refcode=WUENE435_2025416_MadSurvey_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055964&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWI0ZWJkNi1kNzFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wkfDlnOYEHrkONs-T2Pr6IuEAEHrEBJFYTWAij-effw=&emci=68fb6461-d21a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c9b4ebd6-d71a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5177934) | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105941425/539891493/-1649115438?refcode=WUENE435_2025416_MadSurvey_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055964&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWI0ZWJkNi1kNzFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wkfDlnOYEHrkONs-T2Pr6IuEAEHrEBJFYTWAij-effw=&emci=68fb6461-d21a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c9b4ebd6-d71a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5177934)

clean_body: A part of taking back power is continuing to build our opposition strategy. | Peter, It's been 86 days since the Trump administration took power. Every single day, they've deployed their "Flood the Zone" strategy to overwhelm, distract, and divide their opposition. But here's the truth: we're not backing down. And a huge part of taking back power is continuing to build our opposition strategy. Across the country, Democratic pro-choice women are stepping up by writing bold legislation, challenging MAGA extremism at the state level, and pushing back against every harmful executive order. While EMILYs List leaders continue that important work, as an organization, we've built a powerful infrastructure to fight back. But we also know what we're up against: Extremist billionaires Anti-choice Republicans * Well-funded organizations working to strip away our freedoms If we're going to win this fight, we need to sharpen our strategy and use every resource we have to target these groups. | Thank you for your input, the EMILYs List Digital team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Wes Moore
subject: How we’re serving Maryland
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105941717/539892283/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWMxYWQwZS1kODFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePgsh7JZUzCkHmWCjmippYsOj22p5i7kCXs65CwpIKA=&emci=c55a8f08-d81a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f5c1ad0e-d81a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=24635485)
On January 8th, the start of the legislative session in Maryland, we were in a tough spot. **Maryland was faced with two storms:** a budget crisis that was the worst one since the Great Depression, and an incoming federal administration ready to tear things apart. On January 20th, the Trump administration took office, and chaos ensued. He began signing executive order after order that hurt our federal workers, economy, and more. **We spent the past three months strategizing and coming up with solutions for some of Maryland’s toughest issues.** To tackle the sense of uncertainty that we all were feeling headfirst. Now that the legislative session is over, we’re getting back into the swing of things. **I signed multiple bills into law last week to strengthen Maryland’s economy and protect our middle class.** This legislation targets our workforce, making sure that we have a workforce who reflect the diversity and talent of our state. We’re going to open up all sectors of the Maryland economy so that every person has a fair shot at success. Because winning this decade means that _everyone_ thrives. To make efforts of this magnitude successful, we can’t just pass legislation. We need support from far and wide. It’s people like you who drive our ability to organize within our communities. [**In order to serve you best, we need the resources to power our work. clean_body: On January 8th, the start of the legislative session in Maryland, we were in a tough spot. Maryland was faced with two storms: a budget crisis that was the worst one since the Great Depression, and an incoming federal administration ready to tear things apart. On January 20th, the Trump administration took office, and chaos ensued. He began signing executive order after order that hurt our federal workers, economy, and more. We spent the past three months strategizing and coming up with solutions for some of Maryland’s toughest issues. To tackle the sense of uncertainty that we all were feeling headfirst. Now that the legislative session is over, we’re getting back into the swing of things. I signed multiple bills into law last week to strengthen Maryland’s economy and protect our middle class. This legislation targets our workforce, making sure that we have a workforce who reflect the diversity and talent of our state. We’re going to open up all sectors of the Maryland economy so that every person has a fair shot at success. Because winning this decade means that everyone thrives. To make efforts of this magnitude successful, we can’t just pass legislation. We need support from far and wide. It’s people like you who drive our ability to organize within our communities. = = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Just because the legislative session is over doesn’t mean our work is over yet. There are still bills to sign, constituents to meet with, and more to do in 2025 and beyond. Elevate, Wes

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Dan Goldman
subject: Don’t forget about reproductive freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, While Donald Trump and House Republicans conduct an all-out assault on our democracy, our economy, and our allies, they continue to quietly attack reproductive rights around the country. Republican legislatures at the state level continue to pass draconian abortion bans. And within 24 hours of his inauguration, Donald Trump restricted women’s access to information about their reproductive freedoms. **That’s why my friend Rep. Jasmine Crockett and I recently reintroduced the _Abortion Care Awareness Act_ — legislation that will make sure women have access to reliable and medically accurate information about abortion.** This bill will also expose deceptive “crisis pregnancy centers” — clinics designed to spread misinformation to women about reproductive health. In fact, right now, there are more crisis pregnancy centers in New York City than there are actual abortion clinics. While Donald Trump and his far-right allies continue their attacks on women’s health, I’ll continue fighting to ensure that every woman has the resources and information they need to make their own personal choices. **[If you support this work, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me continue to stand up for reproductive freedom in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105942028/539893228/-1870564982?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250416_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmU5ZWIwZS1kOTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BeJ5q3zebhIE1faS-hoqKbgRgdJa-6qTrEAR0q720lY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105942029/539893229/-1870564982?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250416_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmU5ZWIwZS1kOTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BeJ5q3zebhIE1faS-hoqKbgRgdJa-6qTrEAR0q720lY=)
