clean_body: | Peter, While Donald Trump and House Republicans conduct an all-out assault on our democracy, our economy, and our allies, they continue to quietly attack reproductive rights around the country. Republican legislatures at the state level continue to pass draconian abortion bans. And within 24 hours of his inauguration, Donald Trump restricted women’s access to information about their reproductive freedoms. That’s why my friend Rep. Jasmine Crockett and I recently reintroduced the Abortion Care Awareness Act — legislation that will make sure women have access to reliable and medically accurate information about abortion. This bill will also expose deceptive “crisis pregnancy centers” — clinics designed to spread misinformation to women about reproductive health. In fact, right now, there are more crisis pregnancy centers in New York City than there are actual abortion clinics. While Donald Trump and his far-right allies continue their attacks on women’s health, I’ll continue fighting to ensure that every woman has the resources and information they need to make their own personal choices. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: Connor Miller
subject: We’re a bit short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Campaigns like ours rely on grassroots contributions.
#
Hi, it’s Connor — Sarah’s Finance Director.
I’m proud to work for Sarah. She’s not in this for the headlines or the political points. She’s in this to do the real work. To show up, listen, and fight like hell for Delawareans _every single day._
**But Sarah relies on grassroots contributions to sustain this work, and right now, we’re a bit short of where we need to be at this point in the month.** That’s why we set a mid-April goal to raise $10,000 before midnight tomorrow to help us catch up.
[**If you believe in the work Sarah’s doing in Congress, will you pitch in to help us reach our mid-month fundraising goal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250416-1?refcode=em20250416-1904&amount=5&refcode2=1904_21716_r8BJb4&akid=1904%2E21716%2Er8BJb4)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250416-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250416-1904&refcode2=1904_21716_r8BJb4&akid=1904%2E21716%2Er8BJb4)**
Keeping our fundraising on track is essential for Sarah to stay focused on what she was elected to do.
And this work is more important than ever because here’s the truth: House Republicans are too busy sowing chaos, pushing cruel cuts, and picking fights that have nothing to do with _actually helping people._
Just last week, Republicans in the House advanced their budget plan to cut Medicaid and other essential services to pay for tax breaks for their rich friends. Meanwhile, Sarah is pushing back to save Medicaid, SNAP, veteran benefits, and more.
Every grassroots contribution helps Sarah hold House Republicans accountable and fight for serious legislation that benefits working people. [**Pitch in $5 now to help us hit our $10,000 goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250416-1?refcode=em20250416-1904&amount=5&refcode2=1904_21716_r8BJb4&akid=1904%2E21716%2Er8BJb4)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250416-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250416-1904&refcode2=1904_21716_r8BJb4&akid=1904%2E21716%2Er8BJb4)**
Thank you!
Connor Miller
Finance Director
Sarah McBride for Congress
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250416-1&t=1&refcode2=1904_21716_r8BJb4&akid=1904%2E21716%2Er8BJb4)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1904%2E21716%2Er8BJb4)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1904%2E21716%2Er8BJb4)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1904%2E21716%2Er8BJb4)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

Not because it will fund the whole campaign, but because it sends a powerful message: that you, and millions of other proud Americans, believe in what we're building TOGETHER. name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: The DCCC targeting me?
body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Peter,

Did you see the huge news from the DCCC last week?

House Democrats are planning to try and FLIP Republican-held districts right here in Texas – even some districts that President Trump won by more than 15 points,

And if that isn’t bad enough, my campaign just intercepted a poll trying to gauge the best lines of attack against me.

I fear that these lying attacks are imminent, and after the DCCC broke fundraising records last month, their warchest will be bottomless.

But with your help, we will fight these lies with the truth and the truth will win.

[So with lying attacks coming any day now, PLEASE make a contribution so that I’m able to fight back and hold the line for our shared America First values.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A )

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

[CONTRIBUTE >> $25](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=25)

[CONTRIBUTE >> $50](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=50)

[CONTRIBUTE >> $75](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=75)

[CONTRIBUTE >> $100](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=100)

[CONTRIBUTE >> $250](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=250)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=other)

Nancy Pelosi, Hakeem Jeffries, and the DCCC will do everything in their power to take me out and flip this district BLUE.

They want to destroy my reputation, take this seat, and send a message that strong conservatives — especially Trump allies — aren’t welcome in Congress.

But I’ve faced worse enemies than these.

As a Navy SEAL, I learned that you never win a fight alone — you win it with a team that has your back.

That’s why I’m asking: will you stand with me today?

Your support is how we punch back — with the truth, with strength, and with American grit.

[DEFEND THIS DISTRICT](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

When the radical Left targets a fighter like me, they won’t hold anything back. This district will be flooded with desperate attacks to defeat me.

But if we hold the line together — if patriots like you rise up — we will win.

[Please make a contribution so that I’m able to fight back and hold the line for our shared America First values.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A )

Dan Crenshaw

name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: Raised by my Mamaw
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/1H9_mYy1fDJxVMXfncsGarcObEB0NuwPPkS6sXIIr7gx2LIjNs6hMzRuhBZOfy1e6MH0R4Imdpxd9ncEN4IGkpKKBXYRk-mXpT1WXQ0iCq4mx8KCxrTPEmBaMXY8M3fKcSXcJX_tAKWnuQk0ZoEZ5ZkE16mH9cZro9rlQcb4U0X0JnNPrqU9J08vx7wCrD6kN44Zopgv5Hn7TcUKm6ypzj2LWLolOLW4_ut2_O6HJ8edWulBREsDdJGW0B6O9kc6CQRAoW9jn889RKzqLXdKh3CVPd3rePJdOZu8Gy2R5J5kbIeEZUjEnZ1ZH2wJP6QoHPjMpPCbxcmTtJB_exdo4-75-EN2YlBtHC1TqMwXFkmZkHbuSZ7LAH2amtxYeAeva766A_PEME2vSmuroZ9Qazy8ZBuwccI9R_ESWswaQ9x_G65R34sZFtyQsZ3UTsh49H_JIs1Lwz-zzFldXZGTxUSIXYknqfcCK9qnARVEuA/hEA7wu-Jg8MUuhvSgsmT5u6pg84uM92a/8 "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/AOGJrlpJYTLZkkFO4ZKypegbGdSBWDcu1sm2opAoCFrqNiAvKGN0Z9gF-LZVhw7X2MSp0jZoHvihSj_UsA_hLx_TJVeJiU18lU6t0aqn8Fvzc0c-Q35MmvCJx-tvur4jojNw3VPirVTC8oR-USTT5YPGanJS9pHVmCgVLvMEaLFjAbEQ0iqwWyrST2JWa75n18qPBPdRhrT7-xXaYIEyzV4HHB4fZXsV2idQvgOsabpfX7F6zoycslUoHBxD3AMu4_pTQA0IKh3x-era2JDODZEymtMm7NzvSQctIIl-XYj2QZD8sgPerdqvv3RBsNpdmMhhuAhRJxnfERcfkHofeTXdVofqjCVJiF4l5tYX5C_I-5wD1UOg2pSvQdkmiu0bXd96QnPdFRm3PQ5wSsSeb1bWXAbXmOXiBXX0ghfih1i4OmzSm8CQCu26WFTGasuymhdn7zTRV9egnsqlnNm0DtuPTJwRFHIHjTVv78Ui0Q/rc6k8MRiwXvizKT8xHWUFltbEqRlN_dg/8 "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/RmF8brH7vWJTCLbZXe7ZB7N_yR_-7C6Po-cIG3LeQhAwez0FqTkHt4QmKlWUL9cq9CCo_dv8cx_7uk04aUyeXC-Ylbycdp5xbYpvJmYu48QuA2SScKjpJFDBKRMtskmOBMf0jtrMI2RFGEfn3JM9FRz6uq2mVZFcaFE1SGgmKcG-lRFNYLjlrIkFT2JBRjz4fobRoY66NxI_WlZyuOYk8gT13cw8p9DRQ8F89R4gPigAWSgcaBADqX79Znl2DTPVFdBLLfuwZ9C3HCa48VHKyksiKQwzQV3ecMK0_UFE5DA9D6BHO63LbYL5UPDIilwZq7-OpTO4mEyNPIwkrBZBUsdpUnjOc_8HHzs4OnoffODWkTuCh8l8hSw2iHm6WrWd6wWHyufEtHkqhs3nl_ucqeHz2s3bJ53zqgScHjfCT3by28no7YoJex61Mcpa8iH2maQ2sRi2Wr2lWOkkN4rAYcoVIbHGvbbRxDwh_ZD3BQ/YB_7oCLi4wJqXbYJd05PvI8q2hzQK5y6/8 "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/BM2huY6RqhGvHmjqI-kMXlZcQdoAS_NzHM8Dnko6vDJYG52rFQ3pI1kcLwE4_faEtYCVbZwAUYEYkns6eEoa6jF7ujyg80UUTbOobzMAy3aKocGY-O7wqvHdJkdU_AWTvoM8_g7uf1MRbMENlJ5a6YPQumWwjPmzNT-vtRPyPCZsLmuKZGzv6dys9RPyfIWritaFTdwcfnfZhTQiwSFtFU4f3DVLaE40aACIAYQ8nzomWgFienkQeCL-VTlMw61FpAis0sJ6RiZnjijn7bXAHHSrOBZV1geAQ52hnH5006xZWprSgpO0Lm1_2tAKd4AHYxSLyDavI4vNBtug-eyJSS_fv9YzWydr6h06i0dcyPJvjJflsmF0m4bGp8TXyrr4XRDo0bEJDSxiZJVae5IWZ88gpQLk9v9SD72yVOl3AzKiB18wcUfrinY80p3tQ8Zkdegzs6p_KnMkl9jdwnc9ANPhBdlaElHH1adFqAJ9ag/IXLhjrsRVikGipe23AIstraBCCjbeG4-/8 "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/u8UvxdgN9DBggkcwzIzemjqTpef-0_N7DFlwS7VmgECdIOcpGyauz1N8pvXWZJdc3utGi-KIzIEPMJ4JEDa0s7YcvkY41nJahI196t47R1tcDa8ygwVKuIpGZX71sn-MT2hE9d6ZIa6MIMDO0NBJ0p2jdFGqdVW_plfEEAHWDVjQR4fFarhTxeoqoWagfe4NxC18K4TvzTjnXQ2RIy4ajV7IsoRsLx8tT35QU6R627RfXKMkrDC19KveKdQ30etYvySJC9u_XKTVyX8EyLbB9wiuJdb5fvZsnjrfwJ9m5S5RnBV0Bwf89cVTxIedSj1X_OxpPyMsmqYnTLIlS4XDGfL4LovsFp4FrStxbk9LU6fgvFp8yIsElbdYbEVFHyT8xU0XNY63j59lWVQUlS7kkZfW6DcrNE5L8Sq3SBDujreYXKEXhSE-N0-kP1lIsaNqk0lrFNp4fU-lDV3eZzDxKBCD2Le1px8XdOdDqExS-g/LcS62iy-hYxUg0grTeFM_Z7x4Yz6XTQv/8 "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/6GNswnzH6cXK7tUbEmBGX6TF8d9-MOtQaQKrl_8AXCMxLTH56DzlDx05SC_F8IFQeRo5ybM9iyZ7x8YNPLZg91bcuKOzZuQQHyt_LtcO1J-FZ7F5rpcrW2cIvP24C7vcrNhraDa_sEYJBy1OGzRIT4QcC821h35g117ENF3pFjj1yBMXxr16WNT0gWewJdPIgMaRJ8307NgEUfGqV6m1e-QH11D1f0CJ62qIj0U7IrhWio6YgniTy-_X3eKHWWJwW1PY3W86HmblwadPVcKJptFPq4rFk-h5ARSUJMZLtTzJldsWdtTJ0ZtYyh9g7e80bFysZqHbP6RdcGlHLjLqdMZfUmdfxAjWdxgdDz2pop-IgsvU78zlhg1BnBjvw00g-3HOQ5Vm2Wv_iqwZRaaLFWon_17RsN7ukzjd3CEsVtTLVV2opWAMgvYIiKrs87lt_MUBdo5-RR4joaxBQV5Y95Sn127udBbm23ZsODRUwQ/vZbpV38kC1VkZEbMsfW6dFnjbWlml1Bl/8 "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. clean_body: This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish: | | | | | | "Vice President JD Vance" My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance. "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish." It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today." We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month." I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated." Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. ---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105945794/539904791/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250416_f_FFTInvite_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTg5YTQ3NC1kZDFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zOh7ggwT2f6OSxUBvHHUXZ9bZLq2hq0tBRxkvaVznVI=&emci=955d2e47-d71a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7989a474-dd1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1037277)

| | Friend, At perilous times like these for our democracy, it’s critical for us all to come together in solidarity. That’s how we build our collective strength for the fights to come. And that’s why we’re glad to invite you — one of Fair Fight’s most dedicated supporters — to the next installment of our signature virtual conversation series, **“Fair Fight: Together,” with author and political analyst Joy-Ann Reid and Fordham University Associate Professor of Political Science Dr. Christina Greer.** [**We’d be honored if you could join us — it’s at 7:00 p.m. Eastern on Thursday, April 17. Click here to RSVP, and join the virtual event over Zoom.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105945795/539904793/-236118256?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250416_f_FFTInvite_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTg5YTQ3NC1kZDFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zOh7ggwT2f6OSxUBvHHUXZ9bZLq2hq0tBRxkvaVznVI=&emci=955d2e47-d71a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7989a474-dd1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1037277#/registration) | [YES, I'LL BE THERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105945796/539904795/-236118256?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250416_f_FFTInvite_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTg5YTQ3NC1kZDFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zOh7ggwT2f6OSxUBvHHUXZ9bZLq2hq0tBRxkvaVznVI=&emci=955d2e47-d71a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7989a474-dd1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1037277#/registration)
---
Joy-Ann Reid and Dr. Christina Greer will discuss the actions we can take to build a more equitable democracy, and the strategies that inform our collective fight for fair representation.

clean_body: We’d be honored if you could join us. | | | Friend, At perilous times like these for our democracy, it’s critical for us all to come together in solidarity. That’s how we build our collective strength for the fights to come. And that’s why we’re glad to invite you — one of Fair Fight’s most dedicated supporters — to the next installment of our signature virtual conversation series, “Fair Fight: Together,” with author and political analyst Joy-Ann Reid and Fordham University Associate Professor of Political Science Dr. Christina Greer. | Joy-Ann Reid and Dr. Christina Greer will discuss the actions we can take to build a more equitable democracy, and the strategies that inform our collective fight for fair representation. You’ll leave the virtual conversation with insight on how we got to the present moment — as well as inspiration for how we’ll build our way out. Whether or not you can make it, we want to thank you all for your support, which goes a long way toward making this type of programming possible. name: ICYMI
subject: Survey - Food Stamps and Soda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Future Prosperity Initiative
body:

**SHOULD UNHEALTHY FOODS AND SNACKS BE BANNED FROM SNAP?**
_**Do you support a complete and total ban on purchasing Soda, Candy, Dessert, and Salty Snacks with government welfare benefits like SNAP and food stamps?**_**

Select an option below:**
[** YES, BAN THESE PRODUCTS FROM PURCHASE WITH WELFARE BENEFITS! **](http://links.futureprosperityinitiative.co/u/click?_t=f00dcde1db774f098464bf29925dbc77&_m=63a9683912bb43eea01a51f2e8ab657c&_e=FcKyeFGBDvga6fq_mvgHA_UIQAwMyUInA-gV-90dYNrxZ0uREQrFSnHoKjC3EhBkUU85i1APF0CcUaJGLMfN4MDwqO2nHBouxVflkvKTt0FqaQ-vOzD3l6b7He95JRXOQnYzilto0gUkNUDpWzDiSSy4RVMCQTSuzAC2KGG2UwlfxsxV2hCdR_Fe4V2zoON0tzSCZNNecbL8reYY95NUIefcvhRwqOn3Sf6ALh4mSe5V1zfrp3OY674zNew9cCVtCHDoQpNWDsBhI3X3CBivDtWfqB7LLJnOEBL79doiETJHMWZKjSK7hBx6fJ8uFq-NRV3L2C1QtW5kdBUtVCkbSg%3D%3D)
[** NO, ALLOW THESE PRODUCTS TO BE PURCHASED VIA WELFARE BENEFITS! **](http://links.futureprosperityinitiative.co/u/click?_t=f00dcde1db774f098464bf29925dbc77&_m=63a9683912bb43eea01a51f2e8ab657c&_e=FcKyeFGBDvga6fq_mvgHA_UIQAwMyUInA-gV-90dYNrxZ0uREQrFSnHoKjC3EhBkUU85i1APF0CcUaJGLMfN4MDwqO2nHBouxVflkvKTt0FqaQ-vOzD3l6b7He95JRXOQnYzilto0gUkNUDpWzDiSSy4RVMCQTSuzAC2KGG2UwlfxsxV2hCdR_Fe4V2zoON0jFB3KAEtaCwSafQ5eg3YYJxfU_zQr8E6Z0Uiea_fz9kBTIpUoyyhYJdqp-gQQ5_nhZziJjRc9qShn7WNs3JA0rlJkvq_75p4-q4LNQxkpmMz9dtLXVzvE_tkA4ZlfVX3iaw8B0gYB12MmCe96wzUuA%3D%3D)
**[WE WANT TO HEAR FROM YOU!
CLICK HERE TO SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE ->](http://links.futureprosperityinitiative.co/u/click?_t=f00dcde1db774f098464bf29925dbc77&_m=63a9683912bb43eea01a51f2e8ab657c&_e=FcKyeFGBDvga6fq_mvgHA_UIQAwMyUInA-gV-90dYNrxZ0uREQrFSnHoKjC3EhBkUU85i1APF0CcUaJGLMfN4MDwqO2nHBouxVflkvKTt0FqaQ-vOzD3l6b7He95JRXOQnYzilto0gUkNUDpWzDiSWbk7UMrmIM45Cbdx5cxb-nxH5udM-EJ9KxHiRr0aP6LGTZKVrqbb2secIts3N5Va_SjIedYrcDSWjYu0aonpHQM-l6C9OSj1gHd5pqDiiBRgtDdABCKTW8iJ22IcsIQHYqUGwy9bauk6h45eTnFw6ZfC_dytGgqljwhPaCpm2Eb)**
Peter, many Americans support a **complete and total ban on the purchase of Soda, Candy, Dessert, and Salty Snacks with government benefits, like SNAP or food stamps.** They argue that taxpayer dollars should not be used to make America less healthy, and government food benefits should go toward pantry staples and healthier options like eggs, milk, bread, vegetables, and more.

Some even see it as a way to stick it to Big Food and fight back against soda manufacturers by hurting their sales with this ban, given that many of these companies have unprecedented market share and control of the soft drink industry.

**Opponents of the "unhealthy food" ban argue that Americans should be free to purchase whatever grocery they like, **whether that be a healthy or unhealthy option, and method of purchase - credit card, food stamps, SNAP, cash, or something else - shouldn't matter. Some say that banning Americans from purchasing these products is unfair to the companies that sell them, and legislation shouldn't be used to target these companies.

Thanks for your input,

Future Prosperity Initiative

[](http://links.futureprosperityinitiative.co/u/click?_t=f00dcde1db774f098464bf29925dbc77&_m=63a9683912bb43eea01a51f2e8ab657c&_e=FcKyeFGBDvga6fq_mvgHA_UIQAwMyUInA-gV-90dYNrxZ0uREQrFSnHoKjC3EhBkUU85i1APF0CcUaJGLMfN4MDwqO2nHBouxVflkvKTt0FqaQ-vOzD3l6b7He95JRXOQnYzilto0gUkNUDpWzDiSWbk7UMrmIM45Cbdx5cxb-kKPXQHyOpuOADPy6j4MzoeReLElMkrf7ujnAd2PXp72yDR0a4TnLoXCjXnM48D6Lu3DC9861atwxfUpth-0BeGrjegVhhkhVcZLQUZ3W4QAGQxQBcL10U5A8TnU_ZfmwU8cNEEnFlKogwQ57JkDBkO)

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105947346/539910377/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzA4YzkwOS1lMDFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cjVH-QROSKMbxXaH0ebhsGR_xqrsFd7gXpzQZSerdL8=)

| This is a longer email than I normally send, Peter. I hope you’ll read the whole thing to understand why, but if you don’t have time, [you can skip the email and click here to join our must-win fight before tonight’s must-hit mid-month goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105947348/539910379/-292812465?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250416_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzA4YzkwOS1lMDFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cjVH-QROSKMbxXaH0ebhsGR_xqrsFd7gXpzQZSerdL8=)
---
Peter, when it comes to poverty or inequality, food insecurity or housing, mental health or LGBTQ+ rights, I don’t _just_ think about policy — I think about my own lived experiences:

I grew up in public housing, raised by a single mother making minimum wage, which at the time was only $4.25 per hour. I’m the first openly LGBTQ, Afro-Latino member of Congress. I’ve had my own struggles with mental health.

**My upbringing wasn’t always easy, but it’s _these_ lived experiences that motivate me every single time I walk into my office in D.C.**

→ They drive me to fight to end child poverty.
→ They drive me to push for better LGBTQ+ protections.
→ They drive me to ensure fair, affordable housing for all.

[It’s not just policy, it’s _personal_ — and I refuse to give up. But Peter, I don’t do a second of call time, so I need _your_ support to stay on track. Before tonight’s mid-month deadline, can I ask you to join me in this fight by chipping in $3 or $7 to help us hit our goal? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105947350/539910381/-292812465?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250416_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzA4YzkwOS1lMDFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cjVH-QROSKMbxXaH0ebhsGR_xqrsFd7gXpzQZSerdL8=)

name: Brad Reed
subject: One day to make a big difference. Join us to do something about climate rollbacks.
body:
This is what you can do in Oregon to fight federal climate cuts.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105947333/539910362/1508761705?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0MDhjOTA5LWUwMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vMUVtHAudWkKj7IwARIRvLh4wTajYguDsEfqainfOC0=&emci=f876c25a-5f19-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d408c909-e01a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
Dear Peter, I’ll be honest with you: the current legislative session could go either way for us, and either way it will be historic. **Either Oregon will decide to reclaim our status as a climate leader right when this nation needs it the most, or we’ll see critical climate and energy programs get gutted here in Oregon (just like unelected billionaires are doing at the federal level) at the worst possible moment.** Legislators need to hear from community members like you as they decide the fate of bills and state investments aimed at lowering energy bills, strengthening climate resilience in communities across Oregon, and more. You’re exclusively invited to [attend the upcoming Building Resilience Lobby Day to tell our elected officials it’s time to step up for us, our neighbors and our climate](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105947335/539910364/1508761705?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0MDhjOTA5LWUwMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vMUVtHAudWkKj7IwARIRvLh4wTajYguDsEfqainfOC0=&emci=f876c25a-5f19-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d408c909-e01a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230). You're an OLCV member. As leading partners in the Building Resilience campaign, OLCV gave me permission to invite you to **advocate at the State Capitol with us on Wednesday, May 7th!** **WHAT: Building Resilience Community Lobby Day****WHEN:** Wednesday, May 7th, 9:00 am - 5:00 pm **WHERE:** State Capitol in Salem, ORLunch and light breakfast will be provided.
---
[**RSVP to Building Resilience's May 7th Lobby Day**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105947337/539910366/1508761705?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0MDhjOTA5LWUwMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vMUVtHAudWkKj7IwARIRvLh4wTajYguDsEfqainfOC0=&emci=f876c25a-5f19-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d408c909-e01a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
You’re invited because I know you care about this, and I think you want to do more to make sure Oregon leads the way. Whether you're experienced or this would be your first time visiting Salem **all you need to do is**[**sign up**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105947339/539910368/1508761705?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0MDhjOTA5LWUwMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vMUVtHAudWkKj7IwARIRvLh4wTajYguDsEfqainfOC0=&emci=f876c25a-5f19-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d408c909-e01a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)**and show up and we’ll do the rest.** We’ll pair you with an experienced guide and train you on how to be a community lobbyist. We’ll schedule meetings with your elected officials for you; and provide you with all the information you need for a successful visit. [**RSVP by Monday, April 30th to secure a spot!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105947341/539910370/1508761705?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0MDhjOTA5LWUwMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vMUVtHAudWkKj7IwARIRvLh4wTajYguDsEfqainfOC0=&emci=f876c25a-5f19-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d408c909-e01a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230) As a reminder, this is our chance to fight to protect funding for:1\. **Ensure Oregonians can heat and cool their homes affordably** – without having to choose between keeping the lights on or putting food on the table:**
* $30 million for Rental Home Heat Pump Program
* $15 million for Community Heat Pump Deployment Program
* Fund **One Stop Shop 2.0** to help people get direct assistance from someone in their area to make their home resilience upgrades more affordable.**

2.**Ensure our communities are prepared for extreme weather events:**
* $10 million for Community Resilience Hubs and networks across the state to coordinate and provide access to resources and services during disasters.

---
[**Secure your spot for Building Resilience's May 7th Lobby Day**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105947342/539910373/1508761705?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0MDhjOTA5LWUwMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vMUVtHAudWkKj7IwARIRvLh4wTajYguDsEfqainfOC0=&emci=f876c25a-5f19-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d408c909-e01a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)

clean_body: This is what you can do in Oregon to fight federal climate cuts.| | | Dear Peter, I’ll be honest with you: the current legislative session could go either way for us, and either way it will be historic. Either Oregon will decide to reclaim our status as a climate leader right when this nation needs it the most, or we’ll see critical climate and energy programs get gutted here in Oregon (just like unelected billionaires are doing at the federal level) at the worst possible moment. Legislators need to hear from community members like you as they decide the fate of bills and state investments aimed at lowering energy bills, strengthening climate resilience in communities across Oregon, and more. You’re exclusively invited to . You're an OLCV member. As leading partners in the Building Resilience campaign, OLCV gave me permission to invite you to advocate at the State Capitol with us on Wednesday, May 7th! WHAT: Building Resilience Community Lobby DayWHEN: Wednesday, May 7th, 9:00 am - 5:00 pm WHERE: State Capitol in Salem, ORLunch and light breakfast will be provided. You’re invited because I know you care about this, and I think you want to do more to make sure Oregon leads the way. Whether you're experienced or this would be your first time visiting Salem all you need to do is show up and we’ll do the rest. We’ll pair you with an experienced guide and train you on how to be a community lobbyist. We’ll schedule meetings with your elected officials for you; and provide you with all the information you need for a successful visit. As a reminder, this is our chance to fight to protect funding for:1\. Ensure Oregonians can heat and cool their homes affordably – without having to choose between keeping the lights on or putting food on the table: $30 million for Rental Home Heat Pump Program $15 million for Community Heat Pump Deployment Program Fund One Stop Shop 2.0 to help people get direct assistance from someone in their area to make their home resilience upgrades more affordable. 2.Ensure our communities are prepared for extreme weather events: $10 million for Community Resilience Hubs and networks across the state to coordinate and provide access to resources and services during disasters. | | I hope to see you there, Brad ReedCampaign Director | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida
subject: Trump & Musk's 'Efficiency' Is Hurting Us
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250416-1321-foote&t=1001&akid=1321%2E342411%2EZMXeBE ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

First, Trump and Musk created the “Department of Government Efficiency.”

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250416-movement.ZBJD1z&refcode=em20250416-1321&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1321%2E342411%2EZMXeBE ][IMG]

Then, just last month, they fired federal workers with such carelessness,
they had to scramble to rehire hundreds they let go just the day before.
Does that sound like government efficiency to you?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250416-movement.ZBJD1z&refcode=em20250416-1321&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1321%2E342411%2EZMXeBE ][IMG]

Now, we’re seeing what DOGE is actually bringing Americans – more hunger,
more poverty, and more insecurity.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250416-movement.ZBJD1z&refcode=em20250416-1321&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1321%2E342411%2EZMXeBE ][IMG]

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250416-movement.ZBJD1z&refcode=em20250416-1321&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=1321%2E342411%2EZMXeBE ]Our Squad is fighting back against Trump and Musk’s destruction, but we
can’t take on corrupt billionaires without a strong grassroots movement.
Will you chip in?

Let’s be clear, Peter,
government efficiency is important – but
this is not the way our government should run. Efficiency isn’t about
slashing budgets or dismantling crucial services that give citizens the
resources and protections they need.

True efficiency means a government that works for the people – protecting
rights, improving services, and ensuring tax dollars go to the public
good, not private profits. At the end of the day, DOGE isn’t working for
us — it’s all about serving Elon Musk.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250416-movement.ZBJD1z&refcode=em20250416-1321&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=1321%2E342411%2EZMXeBE ]We won’t stop fighting back against Trump’s agenda and pushing for a
government that supports working people. Will you chip in
$3 or whatever you can to power this fight?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250416-movement.ZBJD1z&refcode=em20250416-1321&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=1321%2E342411%2EZMXeBE ]Contribute ››

Together,

AOC, Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida

Patriot,

**I have some not-so-great news to share with you.**

I won't beat around the bush - I know you're busy.

My team anticipated meeting this goal and beginning our counterattack plan against the Left, but it didn't pan out.

name: Jane Fonda
subject: My thoughts on Trump defying the Supreme Court:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
It doesn’t end with an innocent man being wrongfully deported.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105947839/539911938/1328794144?refcode=ea.ece422fb-e01a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.ece422fb-e01a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjZTQyMmZiLWUwMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_DwTSI8iPqDYsNhrYP4vHNr0O0xEz1ZEfW8qK08A7uU=&emci=34c86c24-5e1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ece422fb-e01a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)
---
Our country is at an inflection point. Donald Trump just **defied** the Supreme Court’s 9-0 ruling to facilitate the return of a Maryland father after _wrongly_ deporting him to a mega-prison in El Salvador. I want to make sure people understand that when Trump said he would be a dictator on Day One, when he called for terminating the Constitution, that those weren’t off-hand comments. They were his roadmap. And he’s working day in and day out to fulfill that promise. So this isn’t a drill. Our watershed moment is here, and we must respond with strength. Each and every one of us. Because it doesn’t end with an innocent man – and others like him – being wrongfully deported. **As you read this, Trump is “looking into” deporting “homegrown criminals” who are American citizens._His words, not mine._** But here’s what I want you to remember: We are not powerless. This fight has always been about more than one person in one office. It’s about us — _all of us_ — coming together to build something bigger than ourselves. That’s exactly why I founded JanePAC: to elect leaders at every level of government who are not only committed to bold, fearless climate action, but — above all — a desire to serve the people who elected them. Each one is a piece of the firewall we’re building against Trump’s cruel agenda. Together, we’ve already proven that when we rise, we can win. And just like every generation before us, we have a choice to make. **Will we stand idly by while Donald Trump destroys the very bedrock of our democracy? Or, will we come together to speak out for the voiceless?** I know where I stand, and I think you do, too. So here are two actions you can take right now: | **#1: JanePAC is building the strongest possible defense against Trump’s agenda by electing leaders who refuse to back down. ****[If we’re going to keep up this fight — for our rights, our climate, and each other — we need you with us. clean_body: It doesn’t end with an innocent man being wrongfully deported. | Our country is at an inflection point. Donald Trump just defied the Supreme Court’s 9-0 ruling to facilitate the return of a Maryland father after wrongly deporting him to a mega-prison in El Salvador. I want to make sure people understand that when Trump said he would be a dictator on Day One, when he called for terminating the Constitution, that those weren’t off-hand comments. They were his roadmap. And he’s working day in and day out to fulfill that promise. So this isn’t a drill. Our watershed moment is here, and we must respond with strength. Each and every one of us. Because it doesn’t end with an innocent man – and others like him – being wrongfully deported. As you read this, Trump is “looking into” deporting “homegrown criminals” who are American citizens.His words, not mine. But here’s what I want you to remember: We are not powerless. This fight has always been about more than one person in one office. It’s about us — all of us — coming together to build something bigger than ourselves. That’s exactly why I founded JanePAC: to elect leaders at every level of government who are not only committed to bold, fearless climate action, but — above all — a desire to serve the people who elected them. Each one is a piece of the firewall we’re building against Trump’s cruel agenda. Together, we’ve already proven that when we rise, we can win. And just like every generation before us, we have a choice to make. Will we stand idly by while Donald Trump destroys the very bedrock of our democracy? Or, will we come together to speak out for the voiceless? I know where I stand, and I think you do, too. So here are two actions you can take right now: | #1: JanePAC is building the strongest possible defense against Trump’s agenda by electing leaders who refuse to back down. = | = #2: Feeling angry, exhausted, or heartbroken? Me, too. I’ve always turned to protests to channel my rage into action and stand in community with my neighbors. | I’ve marched, I’ve protested, and I’ve been arrested. I’ve sat across from people in power and demanded change. After all these years, I’m still at it because we are in our documentary moment. And right now, this movement needs you. In solidarity, xx Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

|

Hi! Just wanted to make sure you saw Yassamin’s note about our Democracy Summer Organizing Fellowship – the deadline to apply is **THIS FRIDAY**. We’re looking for high school and college-age individuals who are excited about getting involved in politics at the grassroots level. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105947915/539912046/-2091277465?refcode=DemocracySummer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWU3NWQwMS1lMTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5mgyD0UiZFz_o9coFhhRTfH2eRS0vioWbQ12bo4Y1MM=&emci=e69b9b31-4a1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d9e75d01-e11a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=45157234)** You can apply [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105947920/539912053/-2091277465?refcode=DemocracySummer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWU3NWQwMS1lMTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5mgyD0UiZFz_o9coFhhRTfH2eRS0vioWbQ12bo4Y1MM=&emci=e69b9b31-4a1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d9e75d01-e11a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=45157234) or reply to this email if you have any questions! With gratitude,** ** Anastasia Benavidez Team Yassamin \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Congresswoman Yassamin Ansari <info@yassaminforcongress.com> Date: Fri, Apr 11, 2025 at 02:00 PM Subject: We’re launching our Team Yass Democracy Summer Organizing Program! **To: **Peter** ** <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Hey Peter, I have some big news.** ** My campaign is teaming up with the 2025 National Democracy Summer School – a one-of-a-kind Democratic Fellowship founded by Congressman Jamie Raskin and expanded across the country – dedicated to recruiting thousands of high school and college-age students and training them as the next generation of Democratic political activists and leaders. I am looking for **10 dedicated high school and college students** to join me here in Arizona’s Third Congressional District as **Yassamin Ansari for Congress Democracy Summer Fellows**! With all the chaos led by Donald Trump and Elon Musk in Washington, it’s more important than ever for young people to get involved in politics, especially in a battleground state like Arizona. I can tell you first-hand as the youngest woman in Congress that it makes a difference when our voices are at the table. **[[APPLY HERE]](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105947921/539912056/-2091277465?refcode=DemocracySummer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWU3NWQwMS1lMTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5mgyD0UiZFz_o9coFhhRTfH2eRS0vioWbQ12bo4Y1MM=&emci=e69b9b31-4a1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d9e75d01-e11a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=45157234)** Ths six-week program will take place from **Monday, June 23rd to Friday, August 8th** and requires a commitment of **15-20** hours per week. Fellows will participate in exciting online seminars and a powerful curriculum designed by Congressman Raskin, while also organizing on-the-ground with my re-election campaign here in AZ-03. Throughout the academic portion, Fellows will learn from academic luminaries, inspiring political leaders, policy experts, issue advocates and top community organizers from all across the country. Past Democracy Summer speakers have included House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Professor Laurence Tribe, Senator Elizabeth Warren, Rep. Bennie Thompson, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and the late Rep. John Lewis. Not to mention, Fellows will also learn state-of-the-art skills in phone-banking, text-banking, canvassing, on-line organizing, low-dollar fundraising and voter registration—all the necessary ingredients for a thriving field operation! clean_body: | Hi! Just wanted to make sure you saw Yassamin’s note about our Democracy Summer Organizing Fellowship – the deadline to apply is THIS FRIDAY. We’re looking for high school and college-age individuals who are excited about getting involved in politics at the grassroots level. You can apply or reply to this email if you have any questions! With gratitude, Anastasia Benavidez Team Yassamin \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Congresswoman Yassamin Ansari <info@yassaminforcongress.com> Date: Fri, Apr 11, 2025 at 02:00 PM Subject: We’re launching our Team Yass Democracy Summer Organizing Program! To: Peter <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Hey Peter, I have some big news. My campaign is teaming up with the 2025 National Democracy Summer School – a one-of-a-kind Democratic Fellowship founded by Congressman Jamie Raskin and expanded across the country – dedicated to recruiting thousands of high school and college-age students and training them as the next generation of Democratic political activists and leaders. I am looking for 10 dedicated high school and college students to join me here in Arizona’s Third Congressional District as Yassamin Ansari for Congress Democracy Summer Fellows! With all the chaos led by Donald Trump and Elon Musk in Washington, it’s more important than ever for young people to get involved in politics, especially in a battleground state like Arizona. I can tell you first-hand as the youngest woman in Congress that it makes a difference when our voices are at the table. [[APPLY HERE]]() Ths six-week program will take place from Monday, June 23rd to Friday, August 8th and requires a commitment of 15-20 hours per week. Fellows will participate in exciting online seminars and a powerful curriculum designed by Congressman Raskin, while also organizing on-the-ground with my re-election campaign here in AZ-03. Throughout the academic portion, Fellows will learn from academic luminaries, inspiring political leaders, policy experts, issue advocates and top community organizers from all across the country. Past Democracy Summer speakers have included House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Professor Laurence Tribe, Senator Elizabeth Warren, Rep. Bennie Thompson, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and the late Rep. John Lewis. Not to mention, Fellows will also learn state-of-the-art skills in phone-banking, text-banking, canvassing, on-line organizing, low-dollar fundraising and voter registration—all the necessary ingredients for a thriving field operation! You can click the link and scroll down to find the application for our campaign. If you know a student who may be interested in this life-changing and America-changing program, please forward them this email—they won’t want to miss out! Can’t wait to change our community together, Yassamin Ansari Congresswoman, AZ-03 P.S. If you would like to help fund our campaign as we mobilize our Fellows this summer, please click the link=. Your support would be immensely appreciated. Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

As Secretary of State, I’ve been on the frontlines of pushing back on election lies and standing up to those who want to sow doubt and chaos.
I’ve faced attacks, threats, and pressure—**but I’ve never backed down, and I never will.**
Because what’s at stake is bigger than any one election.
It’s about trust.
It’s about truth.
And it’s about whether we allow fear and intimidation to silence public servants who speak honestly.
We can’t afford to stay quiet. Not now. Not ever.
[**With your support, we can make sure that truth still matters in this country. Will you stand with me?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105948523/539914307/-1506296379?amount=25&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_250416&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2IwNjIwNjQtZTMxYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LazLinkRkeUBv73NeK7N7VjLX37Qe8HPJnQjkOFgcpM=)
Thank you for believing in this work,
Steve

name: Tim
subject: This moment demands action
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
Last night, I joined Chris Hayes on MSNBC to talk about the extraordinary energy I’ve seen firsthand at these townhalls across the country.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105948626/539914619/-246244348?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmI5ZWRjNi1lMzFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wR5sfj4y9fXn5rNHQmif3GaH8I48LAGcsqqXV3_7qwI=)
---
Peter,
Last night, I joined Chris Hayes on MSNBC to talk about the extraordinary energy I’ve seen firsthand at these townhalls across the country and why I believe this moment demands action.
I’ve heard one message loud and clear—people are angry, hurting, and fed up. They’re watching Donald Trump and Elon Musk gut our retirement plans, our schools, and our health care. And now, Trump and his henchmen are openly defying the courts and the rule of law.
The Trump administration wrongfully deported a legal Maryland resident and is ignoring the Supreme Court’s order to secure his return to the United States. If we don’t speak up for him, who will be left to speak up for us?
**People are tired of being ignored and wondering if anyone in power actually cares. I’m doing everything in my power to show we’re listening and we’re ready to fight back, but I can’t do it alone. **

clean_body: Last night, I joined Chris Hayes on MSNBC to talk about the extraordinary energy I’ve seen firsthand at these townhalls across the country. | = Peter, Last night, I joined Chris Hayes on MSNBC to talk about the extraordinary energy I’ve seen firsthand at these townhalls across the country and why I believe this moment demands action. I’ve heard one message loud and clear—people are angry, hurting, and fed up. They’re watching Donald Trump and Elon Musk gut our retirement plans, our schools, and our health care. And now, Trump and his henchmen are openly defying the courts and the rule of law. The Trump administration wrongfully deported a legal Maryland resident and is ignoring the Supreme Court’s order to secure his return to the United States. name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Why I’m endorsing Juan Sanchez for New Mexico’s next Land Commissioner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Juan will fight for New Mexico's Public Lands [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105948944/539915977/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250416_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTk0YTYzYi1lNDFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jsrupEg5k83SZ5I6hD7YmHFF7azWuVt5GLBBUYgvBUY=&emci=b3ffda8e-201a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6a94a63b-e41a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=252045)
---
Folks: We know that our public lands, waters, and wildlife are an important part of our identity, heritage, and future in New Mexico. With Republicans’ growing attacks on public lands and their stewards, fighting to keep public lands in public hands has never been more important. **That’s why I am supporting Juan De Jesus Sanchez as our next State Land Commissioner.** Juan knows how to bring people together to deliver results. With oversight of 9 million acres of land and 13 million mineral acres, he’ll be a steadfast leader for our state, balancing the needs of our people and our economy while protecting our lands, water, and wildlife for future generations. There is no one I trust more than Juan to do this critical job. **Juan De Jesus Sanchez can win this seat.** I’ve known Juan for a long time, from his work with the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers, to the New Mexico Acequia Commission, to working with me to elect champions for conservation across the state. **I know he’ll put in the work to win this race — and he needs us to join him in that effort. That’s why I’m endorsing him today — early in this race, because we have no time to lose. ** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105948949/539915982/-1691945659?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250416_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTk0YTYzYi1lNDFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jsrupEg5k83SZ5I6hD7YmHFF7azWuVt5GLBBUYgvBUY=)
---
**[This will be a competitive race with the Republicans targeting the seat in 2026. But with a strong grassroots team, Juan can make it past the finish line. Please, send a donation of any amount to help elect Juan to the Land Office so we can fight for New Mexico and our Public Lands together:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105948955/539915988/-1691945659?amount=&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250416_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTk0YTYzYi1lNDFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jsrupEg5k83SZ5I6hD7YmHFF7azWuVt5GLBBUYgvBUY=)**

Yesterday, our team filed our fundraising report and because of your support and many others that in 13 days we raised at a faster clip than any other candidate in the race. # [#] Since we launched this campaign we have demanded representation that will place people over politics and finally deliver the results our community deserves. Every donation large and small helps this campaign with the necessary resources so we can carry our message to every voter. Thank you again for your support and for being on Team Edwards! Onwards, Amanda K. Edwards Donate! [] Amanda K. Edwards has the experience and innovative vision to move Houston forward. To learn more, visit our website. name: Gary Sinise
subject: Help me celebrate 20 years of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
This could be the last chance to honor WWII veterans on Memorial Day
It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ace49cde58ef447b912d56bf95c8cd6e&_e=P6Wo8e1iuq1c_NdAx4Ptp2ZfT1KpAf7B33dLNp1vMznfHF0i_OzY1rkDOdf6vMfVGNBNcHhYZGgWNKV1E0kZ_PMi3dMfoPy-OPA5sj5C81antVaS4s6KVZEUkposBSucDHDuNowtpvMJatGi2HKB5j2lBEt7uTgVWu3dVfaxfFRrv3HCdNaTmdrhWH6qA0PdVsdFz6KZevMODzMDqjYGkvng5NBKft5PbIYbJWdJ0fuBBUt5fdLdwPA4mG8Gj6X84i975QyNbby9Odb5baaN40ekNQX1wQAw7KyC1r_MafRhiRrlwENlSeyQEWtblCbE)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ace49cde58ef447b912d56bf95c8cd6e&_e=P6Wo8e1iuq1c_NdAx4Ptp2ZfT1KpAf7B33dLNp1vMznfHF0i_OzY1rkDOdf6vMfVGNBNcHhYZGgWNKV1E0kZ_PMi3dMfoPy-OPA5sj5C81antVaS4s6KVZEUkposBSucDHDuNowtpvMJatGi2HKB5j2lBEt7uTgVWu3dVfaxfFRGo2me2CHaNPO2f1GCw0x9RIdOIHvp05FhWj708NiL3DBaKxR8-ucnq5cfxM-3a7uXjNyqiHOXWzzSfnZaMkcoEu0fcYD-BToxaJUa0EWssTqU1IYa1oMRrCYjxNg17EK4aOTsJJ12nTLaapb9TsDq)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ace49cde58ef447b912d56bf95c8cd6e&_e=P6Wo8e1iuq1c_NdAx4Ptp2ZfT1KpAf7B33dLNp1vMznfHF0i_OzY1rkDOdf6vMfVGNBNcHhYZGgWNKV1E0kZ_PMi3dMfoPy-OPA5sj5C81antVaS4s6KVZEUkposBSucDHDuNowtpvMJatGi2HKB5j2lBEt7uTgVWu3dVfaxfFQdZvUHkcq4GrdbkdNpyH5HecAs6ZWK1qhMHnqkPCGFTaPRbrPbv_PPb5CCRqvqd9kYzcikkbzGfsKFhQM6JmcVf14lJqNJn-CxbicmjvMxVibXJCdmopzVuf3GXpeLlFFxxvrFO36vDCbVPUgPbDj8)
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ace49cde58ef447b912d56bf95c8cd6e&_e=P6Wo8e1iuq1c_NdAx4Ptp2ZfT1KpAf7B33dLNp1vMznfHF0i_OzY1rkDOdf6vMfVGNBNcHhYZGgWNKV1E0kZ_PMi3dMfoPy-OPA5sj5C81antVaS4s6KVZEUkposBSucDHDuNowtpvMJatGi2HKB5j2lBEt7uTgVWu3dVfaxfFTet41Er3Tg4rGriSuNdYZE4mvO80v-0BV1F3tNh5KK3VoBoUeuejt1qXSa1LeuDcjZkmwlrMmBcmQex1_u-QT9g1k9jEWTBmwOSJAT9vIAZkMPr6bBbsp4KTjUFCqn8ofkYCoW5jijf2-B_i9WnmTN)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ace49cde58ef447b912d56bf95c8cd6e&_e=P6Wo8e1iuq1c_NdAx4Ptp2ZfT1KpAf7B33dLNp1vMznfHF0i_OzY1rkDOdf6vMfVeacUrlBZE7MiMyAawvIIckeAYvd5efXYHwkB45fi1IS8YuEQp8VGAFNeRU95_SVeqJzxNHZPUqamoikdxfLhW-j3jApRU2V33WxVWOmN2-Eu03lnHxPMg_6J8tGRdLZogloWfOAisRcMkTQ5k38Py7OiD3QUOkRDCfLfU9A4P_UpZeh5CLBOg5ks_YSHz1DG1Lh3cUZq4IXTDC7mCaqKsqbRvARi-Vq0mxoFIY5iJPE%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ace49cde58ef447b912d56bf95c8cd6e&_e=P6Wo8e1iuq1c_NdAx4Ptp2ZfT1KpAf7B33dLNp1vMznfHF0i_OzY1rkDOdf6vMfVGNBNcHhYZGgWNKV1E0kZ_PMi3dMfoPy-OPA5sj5C81antVaS4s6KVZEUkposBSucDHDuNowtpvMJatGi2HKB5j2lBEt7uTgVWu3dVfaxfFQ1Y0vde72kWJ01BXXHu6mbwU8BxvKr_qrsIZBl24B3jVwtVOayHKr6y-6Vv7rp8UNnxkxy8qLlkb22G8ql5tkpDkLiSh0Jpo7ug-1fWFRVJduMq_nY-LKG14nv6wZ-o_cOw4qPWqHcCwpDrtMcIZHX) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ace49cde58ef447b912d56bf95c8cd6e&_e=P6Wo8e1iuq1c_NdAx4Ptp2ZfT1KpAf7B33dLNp1vMznfHF0i_OzY1rkDOdf6vMfVGNBNcHhYZGgWNKV1E0kZ_PMi3dMfoPy-OPA5sj5C81antVaS4s6KVZEUkposBSucDHDuNowtpvMJatGi2HKB5j2lBEt7uTgVWu3dVfaxfFQ1QWFKAlX6mmRXJgyIxHcLpUIA1rMBSXh71BCZUVzX1u0ZpKU4t5COknK7f2DI0vINRT0t_9ofcqPoMtHzcBeAheizFrp620OkV4HuOptbeRxUssDgreLC0iglDAcKREiVWGi3T5amV-4lPNluQNoW)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ace49cde58ef447b912d56bf95c8cd6e&_e=P6Wo8e1iuq1c_NdAx4Ptp2ZfT1KpAf7B33dLNp1vMznfHF0i_OzY1rkDOdf6vMfVGNBNcHhYZGgWNKV1E0kZ_PMi3dMfoPy-OPA5sj5C81antVaS4s6KVZEUkposBSucDHDuNowtpvMJatGi2HKB5j2lBEt7uTgVWu3dVfaxfFRIt5M4pbSLty9tZCdzRmP1GK-pWWGby9H_wmPQ2sqG16IW7QUnsxcp7Twmew7Uybv_j8MT6xXmWnsKc320km5p6081hj9AZu9Li-pOd5ioDK6WZ618N42gnIcwLfZC9VRj6z-EozYFecFwWIruH13O)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ace49cde58ef447b912d56bf95c8cd6e&_e=P6Wo8e1iuq1c_NdAx4Ptp2ZfT1KpAf7B33dLNp1vMznfHF0i_OzY1rkDOdf6vMfVGNBNcHhYZGgWNKV1E0kZ_PMi3dMfoPy-OPA5sj5C81antVaS4s6KVZEUkposBSucDHDuNowtpvMJatGi2HKB5j2lBEt7uTgVWu3dVfaxfFT9TPjYC7v4QjSZTkz-_g4nB-hcL0AoeHWqPJKwKVtzXMoo49Ho5JbrmfWADSLgSmzIw147VgKyU6_NEyfoEr3keIyIPt8fg0j6zehnvpyaa-bkrCEZ7dGIgBaKzn6H5dMEHHsaAjyiAa9nQaeEQJD5)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ace49cde58ef447b912d56bf95c8cd6e&_e=P6Wo8e1iuq1c_NdAx4Ptp2ZfT1KpAf7B33dLNp1vMznfHF0i_OzY1rkDOdf6vMfVGNBNcHhYZGgWNKV1E0kZ_PMi3dMfoPy-OPA5sj5C81antVaS4s6KVZEUkposBSucDHDuNowtpvMJatGi2HKB5j2lBEt7uTgVWu3dVfaxfFSewIsAaS1oEqxFULunest1uhZVcyJ3a72un5gDn-ArsrVXvS0AqIH4IXBUnVHNbCHOzEG2D4_XjWPFBwvqssXGLLYLZ58VtaC8_gmkV4lKZPVyf-wNBtlSDVDiYK2LZwoZYCwHp5kmdZ86f_f_mshr)
---

name: Zee
subject: Trump just declared war
body:
| |
---
Trump just declared war. No, not against Greenland, or Canada, or Mexico. At least not yet. He has declared war against us. Against America. It's time we wake up and declare a war of our own. We won’t let Trump continue to wage his war on America without fighting back. | [View in browser](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUxODU3Nzc0NTI5MDg2NDkxLFwiclwiOjE1MTg1NzgyODQ1ODM5ODk3M30iLCJzIjoiZTQ3Y2QwMzEyYWNiZTQ3NiJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUxODU3Nzc0NTM3NDc1MTAwLFwiclwiOjE1MTg1NzgyODQ1ODM5ODk3M30iLCJzIjoiZTU5YTU0YTZmMGM0NGEyNiJ9)
---
|
Team,

**Trump just declared war.** No, not against Greenland, or Canada, or Mexico. _At least not yet._ He has declared war against us. Against America.

For starters, Trump sycophant Steve Bannon has declared that**Trump will run for a third term,** a move so blatantly unconstitutional it should be viewed as a declaration of war against the American people.

---
|
---
| [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUxODU3Nzc0NTQ1ODYzNzEwLFwiclwiOjE1MTg1NzgyODQ1ODM5ODk3M30iLCJzIjoiNTE2OGYzNWRhODg5YTU2NiJ9)
---
|
And just this week, Trump was caught on a hot-mic telling El Salvadorian dictator Nayib Bukele that he wants him to build more prisons for “home-growns” aka U.S. citizens. **You got that right, Trump plans to illegally send U.S. citizens to torture prisons in El Salvador without due process.

** This comes as Trump refuses to return illegally deported and imprisoned Maryland father Kilmar Abrego Garcia from El Salvador - in direct defiance of the Supreme Court’s order to have him returned. All whilst the Trump administration continues to target foreign students who protest—sending unmarked cars with masked agents to arrest them.

---
|
---
| [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUxODU3Nzc0NTUzMjAzNzQ1LFwiclwiOjE1MTg1NzgyODQ1ODM5ODk3M30iLCJzIjoiNjI0N2YzZmE4YjUzZDBmOSJ9)
---
| As Trump continues his all out war on America, the "very smart people" leading our movement in DC are twiddling their thumbs - totally incapable and unfit for this moment.**We can’t afford to wait around until 2028 for the next anointed savior of the party and National Ground Game PAC isn’t planning on it.

** We just got out of the trenches in the FL special elections, where thanks to the millions of doors we knocked, we **helped Democrats shock the nation** with a 22% (FL-01) and 15% (FL-06) improvement in Dem voter turnout which if replicated across the 2026 midterms will mean dozens of House seats flipping blue.

And without skipping a beat, next week, we will be on the ground at Texas A&M, confronting fascist Charlie Kirk and organizing students to resist the Trump administration on their deep red campus.

**We won’t let Trump wage his war on America without fighting back. **[National Ground Game has boots on the ground across the nation, doing the only type of organizing that will save our country from the clutches of the fascism (no one else, including our party is doing this) - can we count on you to support our critical work with a donation of whatever you can spare?](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUxODU3Nzc0NTYxNTkyMzU1LFwiclwiOjE1MTg1NzgyODQ1ODM5ODk3M30iLCJzIjoiN2JlNWE1MGU3MDBkYjdlNSJ9)

---

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Yesterday, we got some big news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
We know that Republicans are seriously trying to flip New Mexico red, and we can expect them to spend a lot of money to do it.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1371%2E400544%2EzMBFfJ)
Hi, it’s Deb Haaland. Yesterday we got some big news: A Republican challenger has entered the race for Governor of New Mexico.
We know that Republicans are trying to flip New Mexico red, and we can expect them to spend a lot of money to do it. **That’s why yesterday, my team set an emergency fundraising goal to raise $100,000 in 48 hours to fight back.**
**[Can I count on you to pitch in $5 today to help us reach this goal and show the Republicans the strength of our grassroots movement?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250416_1_opponent?amount=5&refcode=em20250416-1371&refcode2=1371_400544_zMBFfJ&akid=1371%2E400544%2EzMBFfJ)**
With Donald Trump and his party in power in Washington, we know what the Republicans have to offer: chaos, corruption, and policies that advantage billionaire insiders over regular New Mexicans.
**We can’t let them bring the same playbook to the governor’s office.**
As governor, I’ll focus on finding real solutions to our challenges instead. And I’ll fight to make sure the system works for everyday people the way it should.
But I’m counting on your support to keep growing this campaign and win next November, and reaching our emergency $100,000 fundraising goal is critical.
**[Will you pitch in $5 today to help us reach this goal? Together we can change the game for New Mexico.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250416_1_opponent?amount=5&refcode=em20250416-1371&refcode2=1371_400544_zMBFfJ&akid=1371%2E400544%2EzMBFfJ)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250416_1_opponent?amount=5&refcode=em20250416-1371&refcode2=1371_400544_zMBFfJ&akid=1371%2E400544%2EzMBFfJ)**
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250416-1&t=2&refcode2=1371_400544_zMBFfJ&akid=1371%2E400544%2EzMBFfJ)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=1371%2E400544%2EzMBFfJ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=1371%2E400544%2EzMBFfJ)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: I want to share a secret with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
We can’t let the Democrats find out about this.
| **__A Secure Note from the Desk of Kellyanne Conway__**
---
Friend,
---
A lot of pundits and talking heads have been asking how Republicans were able to overcome the Democrats’ record-breaking spending last November.
---
Part of it is the simple reality that President Trump’s America First agenda is popular with voters, and no amount of money can whitewash the disastrous consequences of the Democrats’ socialist agenda.
---
_But that’s not our only advantage, Friend..._
---
As President Trump’s former campaign manager in 2016, I want to let you in on a little secret.
---
**_A huge part of President Trump and the GOP’s success in 2024 was due to the superior voter data and polling infrastructure that we’ve spent years perfecting._ **
---
_Unlike the Democrats, who try to win elections by spending as much as possible as quickly as possible, we focus our efforts on gathering direct feedback from Republican voters so we know exactly what we need to do – _and where we need to target_ – to win elections. _
---
There’s just one thing that can cause our infrastructure to completely fall apart: **__Voter apathy__**.
---
Which is why, when I heard that millions of GOP voters still haven’t updated their voter records for 2025, I knew I had to reach out directly and ask _YOU_ to complete the [**OFFICIAL 2025 GOP VOTER VERIFICATION SURVEY**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2a982b6a8286482080228a820d5d445f&_e=EIVMJIIbINJj5ZqUX7zJBbnUHyuwLiis3jBo_s8_IGQkYQq0MJRjx5ksOGZdBd-6S2sLiQhKx-Hmw_nTzKkpngYgjfLUuFX9iLlhGbJlJb8jdvact8rK4_8cZe753MizDMEbqgA0l4Pt9ZPzm8CykJIpHrCUsGprmNstq2JiDgZCGuizYy-qMeC1LSqycXDpcF3C__nm1P6CXtcEOJ9NSgCeKLfJ7ETCg4YHE9ywcyuP2D0paWpp_-MJYnNt0oUOD-hplnQgRSCn-qRPweVzRIkkusZnHEcTk_xVa_IMzSTRXZPGRxgbF8Q6h_Uli2IFxioW-DVHeO2XiTiL9IAvIVGusXhPZcWlnEAnJLr7Yb8%3D) as soon as possible.
---
Our future success all depends on you completing this critical survey today.
---
[**Please complete the OFFICIAL 2025 GOP VOTER VERIFICATION SURVEY to update your GOP voter records for the new year.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2a982b6a8286482080228a820d5d445f&_e=EIVMJIIbINJj5ZqUX7zJBbnUHyuwLiis3jBo_s8_IGQkYQq0MJRjx5ksOGZdBd-6S2sLiQhKx-Hmw_nTzKkpngYgjfLUuFX9iLlhGbJlJb8jdvact8rK4_8cZe753MizDMEbqgA0l4Pt9ZPzm8CykJIpHrCUsGprmNstq2JiDgZCGuizYy-qMeC1LSqycXDpcF3C__nm1P6CXtcEOJ9NSpt5Cn9U3_8MlwY4nczp9mOUmd4r7GwvoxKOWNVeg2QK796dTceH3nQEo8yWwabesyUvLw1zjc1Fk5WBzHFWxDZfpO7Qyzpkla9zRREF9HUZKYsFSqGplLNBufavoswEvC4uDj7wRyi2xGJHOCLHDnA%3D)

body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.

name: Jeff Person, Able Dems
subject: I delivered your Social Security letters to Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | It’s Jeff Person, executive director of Able Dems.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQspAbPSpPuaj1jgwGWpjiBAgePscIpYXv9ygB3e1J1-ofldDfPIzOIMQlLP18Jn8YfJ6FdO4z5Q1z1bBnTP8kn55xxQFHF42jurtC7yQNhWaNBx-ZH7srBZde6kW0SW8pl3lOvMizM4UW9K-AFqmsgNdKDVGaQVa-JTDauijwRW_nF81QPpoik3GSrl-eDFi-Y8jpy-1kxKfmISI2KwOdB1OHbiasPoBOYDboAQp88LAwPlpiNtJFWvbFvieANw-KogJQG4nRr8mWkPf7jXgNkzknqINsSlP8zj_UX2pfSJfV8fe2_tzUwVBdSZID036ZjUCZ-5xNBmci66QlPSkGLBg/4fp/3u7_khQUS0e3I8ZeafkDdQ/h0/h001.ell3mbC1VWZzSMVdZSjLk4q2ISXWB77X1NZ7xslJMc4)
**I just delivered over THREE HUNDRED hand-written and hand-signed letters from Able Dems supporters demanding NO cuts to Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid.**
Our team hand-delivered your messages to over 160 Congressional offices in Washington, DC, with personal stories of why Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid matter to our lives.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQshfxOMHBXLnsHYw0j60qSdRgDiMik5t7pSMY0qu0aw9THQ9bGsQR8G2U9-_AZkLFcSzgOvaKukkllACdq2W1GjtDWtjSzO2TkyJ48-s3kGhgLrWyB-ZmZmpMdvhYhxniV3dmK7_owxlhfmobNc6jWFzcVGPWZWPotqgOVyviY7tbPzi4mp7mlOV5IR9SneuUMd59WB9KZAzwEgl3mbnOw10Ju9JWhDaKpKkmWQ4ZuwAsyPWaOcGUpwnItIVpM5qQkRX3_uw3N50XlS3HDRWaKQQOf8p6LFnwK5_Oiu4-X6hO6ssa4QoZcMDAlBLlwfnxm7OotgdappW3epbF7r2WMlc/4fp/3u7_khQUS0e3I8ZeafkDdQ/h1/h001.Yo0sanYqz1oyY-0X8BhpyKT3HOIYos4BjwbwJZe9mPI)
Friend, when I see letters from supporters like you, I know I’m not alone in this fight.
As an American with a disability, Social Security and Medicaid are _lifelines_ for me.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsv6G13xDJkcAT3eWN2WUkZ5RZdU1bDt9STNIU2detLRXk_xEiRU5N_PG5ec77Ha8Qh9jkKzoHgDlenfIyxDNP3VsoXmzLK4_KSGyg_gLI6hLQ1l9I5DuhUglITKrOb3Mlj5IOkBvzMxf8sJpAdTuVz7mYuMrU6PuO-qFKp95oegHnAE60Xze3oPT19KhXG1FJUsUyNyz-FGiGFvTofoAraI7zxbbFplSOxf-9v1j0c7uAcvHjpCTVJ2SP8s0DcjEPqGqsBT3T6i41BPmJEcLF-hyg8CWPQNVkcc0DlOCKYV5q5JAQRmUWZH7awS-CNwSydX0yRwv6rr2AhhUQB2S36c/4fp/3u7_khQUS0e3I8ZeafkDdQ/h2/h001.4LZd1UAQO4mIX2XJx6cFPTxS66qraMCaG9Cfznn1rdc)
At Able Dems, we’re working to STOP devastating cuts to programs we rely on, and FIRE the Republicans that want to take our hard-earned benefits away.
**In a moment, I’ll share some powerful parts of the letters we delivered.[But if you’re ready to help us DEFEAT MAGA, DONATE NOW!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsuACinv7O4Qklf4XmypE-q1VXBmLsuiSQMbsBzKUraEq9O5ZZi5pktp6oERprrQiTO9KySzOKoHWC2zeGvl5cWhEL09EDMWb5i3BvReg_iwdaPfWbAsG1j2QvcHZh1bB6N0pohL_pRz-1Q1aAzTTotsmXISZbrbpVLZXOgU6mbT01vBCGMjRap5k5PGugeN7WRrMsU9YnW7Q0i0ilKfeUFRQPC3iZt1Z-K7T-u9BIKhINb8zmQla_4JQ6hI4ui3GOm7wetbcWNdQlKwAwVVo1fQYZAQ68YsNHsh9qD9xYm5QErD0UDq7yoX7YPnqQLaqrl9tlcN4T0YE3ZbFKdXInHo/4fp/3u7_khQUS0e3I8ZeafkDdQ/h3/h001.Ktl8somjydTGotrl0HUvaIjWm_bGMtBtLk4e-j9lD-c)[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsrzvnublG4NQmalpPnemC9NNCo6VpjUku_tXBMW690v10M-8svsYtMHdyj2HrS2VLN8qlCcjVoosxbL905XdwYqCV9-da3PIgiYfYjGljn5vhzVc18FKks8osH_uqsSfZ9SGB2JltMOosjZMJb-5U1qdGFZfHucYHNqhrIke3qdllopvJAHb1Ez6fpm163OuTriNYJ-iV1kGl6jc3848NiR9UVVNxKcAxyc__qybaefdW_HsAzFnxL1slAzsjcERKMe3VrTX_0XWqcOZ6oH2pzg10AgFhBWwm2Z7BzjZUaVID9DJ9SCVaa1xCsENBOVFrtlI8gucr_rON6b8LuSPxEg/4fp/3u7_khQUS0e3I8ZeafkDdQ/h4/h001.MBcGEFEKyJoHB3DAicEfTxcYkwQC8z5lenwbxsaBTyU)**
