clean_body: | | | It’s Jeff Person, executive director of Able Dems. I just delivered over THREE HUNDRED hand-written and hand-signed letters from Able Dems supporters demanding NO cuts to Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. Our team hand-delivered your messages to over 160 Congressional offices in Washington, DC, with personal stories of why Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid matter to our lives. Friend, when I see letters from supporters like you, I know I’m not alone in this fight. As an American with a disability, Social Security and Medicaid are lifelines for me. At Able Dems, we’re working to STOP devastating cuts to programs we rely on, and FIRE the Republicans that want to take our hard-earned benefits away. In a moment, I’ll share some powerful parts of the letters we delivered. We delivered hundreds of messages from supporters like you reminding Congress why Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid matter. To Rep. Scott Peters: To Rep. Gus Bilirakis: To Rep. Don Bacon: To Rep. Brad Schneider: To Rep. Greg Murphy: To Rep. Greg Meeks: These are just a sampling of the letters we just delivered to Congress. At Able Dems, we’re proud to amplify YOUR voice as we fight Donald Trump and Elon Musk, and we’re funded entirely by grassroots donors like you. From recruiting thousands of donors to win crucial races for Congress, to delivering hundreds of handwritten letters and tens of thousands of electronic messages to your representatives, it’s all backed by supporters like you. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Jeff Person, Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. Yadira's already proven she can beat the odds. In 2022, when pollsters didn’t give her a shot, she won this seat and became the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress.

In 2024, she came up just short of winning one of the toughest races in the country. Now she’s running for Congress to ensure Colorado’s 8th District has a leader in Congress who will fight for them – not give handouts to big billionaires.

name: Randy Villegas
subject: my announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T052303ba-b9bf-4747-bbfc-0a5bd0c9887b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf0a9230a-c0ac-4c10-92b9-e1599d46cf00/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, this is Randy Villegas. I’m a son of the Central Valley, a college professor, and the proud child of Mexican immigrants who came to this country with nothing but hope and grit. Today, I’m proud to announce that I’m running for Congress in California’s 22nd District -- one of the most competitive races in the country, and one that could make or break the Democratic majority in the House. [If that’s all you need to hear, I’m humbly asking you to chip in $10 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action. Every contribution -- no matter the size -- will help power a grassroots campaign fueled by working people, not corporate PACs.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1d4b3e4a-34e4-49ca-aa29-70f0afe35a67/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN $10 >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfae5b323-6cab-4190-80a8-5b9c4d3e12cf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN $20 >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T14f08d63-d35f-4ce0-8398-0bd53f886595/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN MORE >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teb7df17b-1af6-42af-9c4c-56f343859fc3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| For far too long, our Central Valley home has been left behind by politicians more in love with power than people -- and billionaires who put profits ahead of our communities. Like most here, I was born into a working-class family. I went to public schools in the Valley -- Everything I am and everything I have is because of this incredible place I get to call home. But while our Valley feeds the world, our workers are struggling to feed their families. Wages stay the same while costs keep rising. Meanwhile, Donald Trump has given the world’s richest man free rein to gut Social Security and Medicaid. They want to strip millions of their health care and take food out of hungry kids’ mouths -- all to pass more tax cuts for billionaires. It’s sick, Peter, and our representative, David Valadao, should be fighting back. Instead, he’s been silent -- because the same billionaires hurting us are funding his campaign. Working people deserve a champion in Congress. We need a government that works for us -- not against us. Our families, our farmers, our veterans, and our kids deserve better. That’s why I’m running, and I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money -- because I want to be part of the solution, not another part of the problem. [If you're with me, please chip in $10 right now between my campaign and Blue Amp Action. Help us flip CA-22, retake the majority, and put working people front and center in Washington.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2ba68ded-53b1-4feb-b684-6f9f138d1aa6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for believing in me -- and in this movement. More soon, -Randy

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T105eecb9-19e6-4b2d-a78e-7acc50a29fb1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: JanelleBynumForCongress.com
subject: The truth is in the numbers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
The numbers don’t lie. This will, once again, be one of the most competitive swing districts in the country, and could very well hold the key to the Democratic House Majority. With so much on the line, we absolutely can’t afford to fall short next November.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105952402/539928579/476240568?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2025.04.16_b1_jbfcdc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQzN2IxMGUtZWMxYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UfpOSjMwja6si-7CsdVsIKLNunm2S8208Q9X76i8wEs=) When we tell you that this is going to be one of the most competitive races in the country once again, we really mean it.

[**$25,000,000**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105952403/539928580/476240568?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2025.04.16_b1_jbfcdc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQzN2IxMGUtZWMxYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UfpOSjMwja6si-7CsdVsIKLNunm2S8208Q9X76i8wEs=): The grand total of outside spending in our district in 2024. → Far-right MAGA Republicans fought hard to keep this seat red... and they put their money where their mouth was. We know they’ll do it again. [**10,945 votes**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105952404/539928581/476240568?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2025.04.16_b1_jbfcdc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQzN2IxMGUtZWMxYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UfpOSjMwja6si-7CsdVsIKLNunm2S8208Q9X76i8wEs=): Janelle’s vote margin of victory against Lori Chavez-DeRemer last November. → In a Presidential election year where over 400,000 voters cast ballots in OR-05, Janelle narrowly won by just a few thousand votes. It doesn’t get much closer than that. body:
Even after agreeing to the Electoral College, founder James Madison said the constitutional congress delegates were impaired by “ the hurrying influence produced by fatigue and impatience .”
Yes -- even the person who created it didn't like it and thought it was a cop-out.
We can't allow ourselves and our elections to be held back by this antiquated, backward system for even one more election. Pitch in $25 or more to help rid us of the Electoral College forever >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=25.00&contactdata=xX8AfItJ3hYvVo1Ieeo6q95P6o6eGv8Fyzrk0E2AdqIuIv6o2EAP2/5BUwS/JbLv0GvMZOY8FR2Owh7DRsULPF42hY60dllIpoOrYn68K5w=]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=xX8AfItJ3hYvVo1Ieeo6q95P6o6eGv8Fyzrk0E2AdqIuIv6o2EAP2/5BUwS/JbLv0GvMZOY8FR2Owh7DRsULPF42hY60dllIpoOrYn68K5w=]
New Yorker: The Case for Dumping the Electoral College [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=25.00&contactdata=xX8AfItJ3hYvVo1Ieeo6q95P6o6eGv8Fyzrk0E2AdqIuIv6o2EAP2/5BUwS/JbLv0GvMZOY8FR2Owh7DRsULPF42hY60dllIpoOrYn68K5w=]
The Electoral College has been described as “ a loaded pistol pointed at our system of government. ” They warned that it created “a game of Russian roulette” because the way it distorts the will of the people could threaten our democracy.
We've already seen the popular vote loser win the White House five times, including twice in the last twenty years .
And this obtuse system of choosing a national leader led directly to the former President -- one of those five who lost the popular vote (in 2016) but still won the office -- attempting to subvert the will of the people by twisting the Electoral College into a mess and when that didn't work, fomented a literal insurrection with supporters breaking into the Capitol Building to disrupt certification of the election.
Opponents of voting rights have shown they'll bend these rules and go to any length in order to win. RUSH $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College once and for all >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=25.00&contactdata=xX8AfItJ3hYvVo1Ieeo6q95P6o6eGv8Fyzrk0E2AdqIuIv6o2EAP2/5BUwS/JbLv0GvMZOY8FR2Owh7DRsULPF42hY60dllIpoOrYn68K5w=]

We MUST stop them from rigging the game in a handful of states and cementing their grip on power through this outdated system that prioritizes empty land and lines drawn on a map over equally counted votes and makes a vote in Montana worth more than a vote in California.
We're getting close to ending this once and for all! Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

name: MTG
subject: I can’t keep up
body:
I’m in a bad position right now, and I need a helping hand.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/akQr/?__vbtrk=Mjg1NTQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1NTQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend – I have always been upfront with you, and I’m not going to stop now.
_**The truth is that I am more vulnerable right now than I have been in a very long time and I need you to understand what’s going on.**_
I know you’re sick and tired of politicians reaching out to you and acting like it’s the end of the world if you don’t chip in to their campaign.
They’ll claim _anything_ and tell _any kind of story_ if it means they get a few extra dollars from you that they can throw on top of the cash they get from **corporate lobbyists** and **special interest groups** _._
I know you’re sick of the games from most Republicans – trust me, I am too.
I don’t take a dime from any of those groups... _**Believe me, they’ve offered.**_ Campaign finance reports are all public record, so you can believe me when I say _**I am funded by _you_ and _nobody else_.**_
But here’s what else that means: Every time fundraising reports come out, Special Interest Groups, swampy political consultants, corporate lobbyists, and the DNC go over mine with a fine-toothed comb trying to find any kind of vulnerability. And this time around, _**I’m afraid that they’re going to find one.**_
The first quarterly numbers of 2025 are coming in and I’ve been so busy fighting for President Trump’s agenda in the House that _**I haven’t had the time to fundraise the way I need to**_.
Other politicians don’t need to worry about that but** _I am funded 100% by grassroots donors like you_** so I very much do.
Once they see how little money I have on hand, and **_how difficult it would be for me to defend myself_ ,** they are going to smell the blood in the water and throw everything they have at me:**Legal battles** , **attack ads** , **billboards**... the whole nine yards.
I understand if this isn’t a time when you’re able to chip in.
But if you want to see me keep fighting in the House **_for _you__ , __your family__ , _the _Trump agenda__ ,** and _**_everything we believe in_ ,**_**then** __**[I’m asking my top supporters to chip in to this fight and help make sure that I’m able to defend myself](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/akQr/?__vbtrk=Mjg1NTQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1NTQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__**.**
I'm not sure exactly what to expect, but I do know this:__**[I need to be ready](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/akQr/?__vbtrk=Mjg1NTQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1NTQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__**.**
[CHIP IN NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/akQr/?__vbtrk=Mjg1NTQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1NTQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Whether you chip in or not, I want you to know that I will never stop fighting, even if the fight needs to take a different form after this.
From the bottom of my heart - _**thank you.**_
_Yours,_
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/akQr/?__vbtrk=Mjg1NTQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1NTQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314
clean_body: I’m in a bad position right now, and I need a helping hand. | | | | Friend – I have always been upfront with you, and I’m not going to stop now. The truth is that I am more vulnerable right now than I have been in a very long time and I need you to understand what’s going on. I know you’re sick and tired of politicians reaching out to you and acting like it’s the end of the world if you don’t chip in to their campaign. They’ll claim anything and tell any kind of story if it means they get a few extra dollars from you that they can throw on top of the cash they get from corporate lobbyists and special interest groups . I know you’re sick of the games from most Republicans – trust me, I am too. I don’t take a dime from any of those groups... Believe me, they’ve offered. Campaign finance reports are all public record, so you can believe me when I say I am funded by you and nobody else. But here’s what else that means: Every time fundraising reports come out, Special Interest Groups, swampy political consultants, corporate lobbyists, and the DNC go over mine with a fine-toothed comb trying to find any kind of vulnerability. And this time around, I’m afraid that they’re going to find one. The first quarterly numbers of 2025 are coming in and I’ve been so busy fighting for President Trump’s agenda in the House that I haven’t had the time to fundraise the way I need to. Other politicians don’t need to worry about that but I am funded 100% by grassroots donors like you so I very much do. Once they see how little money I have on hand, and how difficult it would be for me to defend myself , they are going to smell the blood in the water and throw everything they have at me:Legal battles , attack ads , billboards... the whole nine yards. I understand if this isn’t a time when you’re able to chip in. But if you want to see me keep fighting in the House for you , your family , the Trump agenda , and everything we believe in ,then . I'm not sure exactly what to expect, but I do know this:. Whether you chip in or not, I want you to know that I will never stop fighting, even if the fight needs to take a different form after this. From the bottom of my heart - thank you. Yours, Marjorie Taylor Greene _ | 215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Care in Action
subject: Check who supports cutting Medicaid
body:
Find out now and take action today.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105954008/539934667/664783965?ms=041625_votetracker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzY3NTRiMS1lZTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TTpj-xa-hFmsC4flQxC8lNKPzk5ourOh4pOq_rrWM2w=&emci=aecd655f-cc1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=fc6754b1-ee1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)
Peter, Republicans just pushed through the framework for a dangerous budget resolution that could **slash nearly a trillion dollars from Medicaid, endangering millions of lives and countless livelihoods!**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105954010/539934668/701630626?ms=041625_votetracker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzY3NTRiMS1lZTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TTpj-xa-hFmsC4flQxC8lNKPzk5ourOh4pOq_rrWM2w=&emci=aecd655f-cc1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=fc6754b1-ee1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)
These cuts would be a disaster for the health of our communities, and we know that Black, Latina, immigrant, and poor communities of care workers will be among the first to pay the price.
Crucially:**Republicans in Congress *know* how unpopular these cuts would be, which is why many don’t want to discuss it in public – that’s why we’ve set up a Medicaid vote tracker on our website.**
It shows exactly which lawmakers are for – and against – the plan for massive Medicaid cuts, and shines a spotlight on which of our representatives need to hear from us.
**[**_TAKE ACTION NOW: Check your representatives’ position, then urge them to do all they can to protect Medicaid >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105954012/539934670/701630626?ms=041625_votetracker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzY3NTRiMS1lZTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TTpj-xa-hFmsC4flQxC8lNKPzk5ourOh4pOq_rrWM2w=&emci=aecd655f-cc1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=fc6754b1-ee1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)**

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105954017/539934676/701630626?ms=041625_votetracker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzY3NTRiMS1lZTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TTpj-xa-hFmsC4flQxC8lNKPzk5ourOh4pOq_rrWM2w=&emci=aecd655f-cc1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=fc6754b1-ee1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)
**_**********__[Check the vote tracker](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105954019/539934679/701630626?ms=041625_votetracker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzY3NTRiMS1lZTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TTpj-xa-hFmsC4flQxC8lNKPzk5ourOh4pOq_rrWM2w=&emci=aecd655f-cc1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=fc6754b1-ee1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)__**********_**
**_**********__[Contact your representatives](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105954020/539934680/29127930?ms=041625_votetracker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzY3NTRiMS1lZTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TTpj-xa-hFmsC4flQxC8lNKPzk5ourOh4pOq_rrWM2w=&emci=aecd655f-cc1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=fc6754b1-ee1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)__**********_**
The proposed $880 billion cut to Medicaid would rip health care away from millions, especially seniors, people with disabilities, and low-income children and families.
**If your representative voted to cut Medicaid:** Ask them not to abandon the millions of Americans who stand to lose their health care, and to change their position before the budget is finalized.
**If your representative voted to protect Medicaid:** Urge them to keep up the fight, and to keep in mind the millions of Americans counting on them to protect our health care.
Either way, now is the time to pile on the pressure to make sure all our representatives know that protecting Medicaid is a huge public priority.

clean_body: Find out now and take action today. Peter, Republicans just pushed through the framework for a dangerous budget resolution that could slash nearly a trillion dollars from Medicaid, endangering millions of lives and countless livelihoods! These cuts would be a disaster for the health of our communities, and we know that Black, Latina, immigrant, and poor communities of care workers will be among the first to pay the price. Crucially:Republicans in Congress know how unpopular these cuts would be, which is why many don’t want to discuss it in public – that’s why we’ve set up a Medicaid vote tracker on our website. It shows exactly which lawmakers are for – and against – the plan for massive Medicaid cuts, and shines a spotlight on which of our representatives need to hear from us. ************ ************ ************ ************ The proposed $880 billion cut to Medicaid would rip health care away from millions, especially seniors, people with disabilities, and low-income children and families. If your representative voted to cut Medicaid: Ask them not to abandon the millions of Americans who stand to lose their health care, and to change their position before the budget is finalized. If your representative voted to protect Medicaid: Urge them to keep up the fight, and to keep in mind the millions of Americans counting on them to protect our health care. Either way, now is the time to pile on the pressure to make sure all our representatives know that protecting Medicaid is a huge public priority. ************ ************ Thank you for standing up to protect our health care. Care in Action

name: Team Wiley
subject: What comes next is critical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
It’s on us to do this work, and we can’t do it without you, Peter. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105955010/539938166/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20250416_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjg3YmYwZi1mMTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QZ4L6KjgFt7KNYI0801XmiAUsTuRMKPyV18aPDvUWkI=)
---
Hi Peter — Wiley’s campaign for the U.S. Senate is off to an incredible start. Our first week has shown us that people are ready for the bold leadership North Carolina deserves. What comes next is critical. We must build a powerful movement that amplifies our message and rallies even more people to our cause. **_We_** are the change we’ve been waiting for. This campaign is about each of us doing our part to ensure a better future for North Carolina — a future that Wiley is ready to fight for where working families are prioritized, healthcare is affordable, and voting rights are protected. **We need your help. It’s on us to do this work, and we can’t do it without you, Peter. Every donation, no matter the amount, helps us build the momentum required to overcome the deep pockets of Thom Tillis and his billionaire backers.** **[Will you join us in this fight? name: NPR Protection Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Take URGENT Action: Save NPR and PBS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

!!!!News just leaked that the Trump administration is sending Congress a
formal request to defund PBS and NPR. !!!!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25118?source=email-f04162025b&t=1011&akid=8257%2E5885482%2EWcbE84 ][IMG]

Sources say Congress will receive the official White House request when it
returns to DC ...and then all it will take to pass is a simple majority in
the House and Senate.

A vote could happen in mere weeks so if we’re going to save NPR and PBS it
has to be NOW – and we have to act INCREDIBLY fast.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25118?source=email-f04162025b&t=1012&akid=8257%2E5885482%2EWcbE84 ]Will you urgently help us send an OVERWHELMING message to Congress:
Save NPR and PBS NOW?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25118?source=email-f04162025b&t=1013&akid=8257%2E5885482%2EWcbE84 ]ADD YOUR NAME

Make no mistake: Trump’s colossal $9.3 billion cut to funding for NPR,
PBS, and the State Department isn't just a budgetary adjustment – it's an
outright assault on the independent voices and public media we hold dear.

But here’s the other thing: Trump’s not stopping there. Over the weekend
he went on an angry tirade because he didn’t like how 60 Minutes was
covering him, calling on the Federal Communications Commission to impose
maximum fines and punishment “for their unlawful and illegal behavior.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25118?source=email-f04162025b&t=1014&akid=8257%2E5885482%2EWcbE84 ][IMG]

It’s all part of Trump’s plan to completely GUT our independent media. And
it’s straight out of an authoritarian playbook – stifle the truth so the
ONLY source of information people have is from Trump approved sources that
he completely controls.

It’s a chilling reminder why this fight to save NPR and PBS is so
important. Which is why Congress must hear from ALL of us ASAP.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25118?source=email-f04162025b&t=1015&akid=8257%2E5885482%2EWcbE84 ]To win, we only need to push a few Republicans to say ‘no’ to Trump’s
terrifying funding request. Our Revolution has already rallied in front of
NPR and sent tens of thousands of messages to Congress – and we’re not
stopping now. Will you act now to save NPR and PBS from Trump?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=8257%2E5885482%2EWcbE84 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=8257%2E5885482%2EWcbE84 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=8257%2E5885482%2EWcbE84 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=8257%2E5885482%2EWcbE84 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=8257%2E5885482%2EWcbE84 ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=8257%2E5885482%2EWcbE84 ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=email-f04162025b.ZxRaYC&t=1007&akid=8257%2E5885482%2EWcbE84 ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-f04162025b.-qDgTt&t=1008&akid=8257%2E5885482%2EWcbE84 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=email-f04162025b.8E48_K&t=1009&akid=8257%2E5885482%2EWcbE84 ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=email-f04162025b.K4V0sj&t=1010&akid=8257%2E5885482%2EWcbE84 ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

Friend,
Tax Day may be behind us, but you can still get a refund! Through Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund program, you can donate $75 (or $150 per couple) once per year and have it refunded to you by the state.
It’s easy: once you make your donation, we mail you your receipt and your refund form. Then, you just need to fill out and mail in your form to get your refund!
Will you make your refundable donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april2025?refcode=041625]

body:

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: What my 2025 race means for the 2026 midterms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
The bigger we win in Virginia in 2025, the louder a message we’ll send about the 2026 midterms.
Peter,
On Election Day this November 2025, I don’t just want to win — **_I want to win big._**
Because as Democrats, the bigger we win in Virginia in 2025, the louder a message we’ll send about the 2026 midterms.
People in Virginia and across the country are looking at our race as a bellwether for Democrats. In every zip code and every community, Democrats are understandably frightened and angry about the chaos coming out of Washington. And to them, our race is a beacon of hope. It’s an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our nation’s history.
And can I be honest for a minute? That’s a lot of weight on my shoulders. But I’m ready to seize the moment and win big. I feel honored that people have put so much hope into our campaign, and it’s a big reason why I’ve worked to stay above the fray and focus on what matters: **winning big and delivering real, meaningful change when we do.**
And I hope that as you read this email, you’ll buy into that vision too. Because there is light at the end of the tunnel. We just have to keep going. So let’s win big in 2025 — so we can win big in 2026, and 2027, and 2028, and beyond.
**[But we can’t do it without you! Will you split a donation between Heartland Patriots and my campaign today to make sure we have what it takes to win big this November?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87887?refcode=em20250416-8884&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8884%2E614464%2EnD1VeS)**

If you're looking for a fun way to close the summer, look no further!

Virginia Moms for America is inviting you to attend their one-day summit at Regent University in Virginia Beach on Friday, August
1st. Come be encouraged and uplifted by messages of unity, light, and purpose offered by Moms for America’s founder and president,
Kimberly Fletcher, and Lead Cottage Meeting Instructor, Juleen Jackson. Dr. Kelly Kohls, the founder of the National Schoolboard
Leadership Council, will also attend to help concerned parents learn how to get involved with their local schoolboards from
general attendance to running for office.

Moms for America is dedicated to helping moms, future moms, and Grammy Grizzlies of all ages, circumstances, and demographics
learn to address and combat the negative influences infecting our modern culture. Come meet and mingle with like-minded women as
you learn what it is you can do for your Country, State, or County right from your own kitchen table!

clean_body: Join Moms for America for a One Day Virginia Summit - Friday, August 1, 2025 If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] If you're looking for a fun way to close the summer, look no further! Virginia Moms for America is inviting you to attend their one-day summit at Regent University in Virginia Beach on Friday, August 1st. Come be encouraged and uplifted by messages of unity, light, and purpose offered by Moms for America’s founder and president, Kimberly Fletcher, and Lead Cottage Meeting Instructor, Juleen Jackson. Dr. Kelly Kohls, the founder of the National Schoolboard Leadership Council, will also attend to help concerned parents learn how to get involved with their local schoolboards from general attendance to running for office. Moms for America is dedicated to helping moms, future moms, and Grammy Grizzlies of all ages, circumstances, and demographics learn to address and combat the negative influences infecting our modern culture. Come meet and mingle with like-minded women as you learn what it is you can do for your Country, State, or County right from your own kitchen table! Join us for an infusion of inspiration and encouragement! [] [] SUMMIT LOCATION [] Regent University Library 1000 Regent University Drive Virginia Beach, VA * Prizes & Treats • Breakfast & Lunch Included Meet Like-Minded Moms CHECK OUT OUR EARLYBIRD REGISTRATION PRICES! REGISTER TODAY! [] Room Block If you’re looking for a convenient place to stay, look no further than the Founders Inn and Spa! Located right on Regent University’s beautiful campus, this Hilton-run property has a fabulous restaurant, two pools, a fitness center, and some of the best inland views available! Virginia Moms for America has a discounted room block available on a first-come-first-served basis until July 2nd. Rooms sell out fast, so book your stay today! Book Your Room Now! [] [] Take advantage of this opportunity to connect and rejuvenate with your peers, then enjoy the weekend with your family! Virginia Beach is a beautiful hub for various destinations including world-class beaches, Busch Gardens, Colonial Williamsburg, and much more. * We look forward to seeing you there! REGISTER TODAY! [] Moms for America® Empowering Moms, Promoting Liberty and Raising Patriots! PLEASE CHECK OUT MOMS FOR AMERICA'S UPCOMING EVENTS! We’ll only win if we have the resources to connect with every last voter in these battleground districts. = | = = | = = | = = Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. | | Peter, it’s Austin Davis. Recently, I had the honor of doing a ride-along with my dad to rally support for investments in our public transit system. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105957093/539945082/-506454062?source=SBD_AD_EM_ENG_041625_RIDEALONG_30DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDVhOWU2NS1mNTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qRBI0RtN2D5vJDmuDHIZQZMYUXP2uxYxcVvcuKirGcg=&emci=2d1b875f-f51a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ed5a9e65-f51a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=31337995) My dad, Ankarie Davis, is a union bus driver, and a member of ATU Local 85. He’s one of the hardest workers I know, and I owe a lot to him and my mom. Right now, we need to be working hard to fight for unions like my dad’s. In the face of a federal government who will happily put companies over people, we can’t back down. We must stand strong in our support for organized labor. **Everyone deserves a safe work environment, where the benefits and pensions they’ve worked hard to earn are protected. ** [**Unions are what make PA strong, and we need to show our support. Will you stand with me by adding your name in support of union members like my dad and defend their right to organize?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105957094/539945085/-219577924?source=SBD_AD_EM_ENG_041625_RIDEALONG_30DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDVhOWU2NS1mNTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qRBI0RtN2D5vJDmuDHIZQZMYUXP2uxYxcVvcuKirGcg=&emci=2d1b875f-f51a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ed5a9e65-f51a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=31337995) | | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105957095/539945088/-219577924?source=SBD_AD_EM_ENG_041625_RIDEALONG_30DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDVhOWU2NS1mNTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qRBI0RtN2D5vJDmuDHIZQZMYUXP2uxYxcVvcuKirGcg=&emci=2d1b875f-f51a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ed5a9e65-f51a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=31337995)

name: Yadira Caraveo HQ
subject: We lost by just 0.74%
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
That’s all that separated Yadira from a win in 2024.
| [ ](https://udpac.us/l/MZs3wa1gTlpB?t=N1NLwgd7Wfzz)
---
Hi Peter, we want to be upfront with you:

**In 2024, Yadira Caraveo came up short by just 2,449 votes—less than one percent. That’s how close we were to keeping Colorado’s 8th District in the hands of someone fighting for working families.**

Yadira is officially running to win back CO-08—and with margins this tight, we’re going to need every ounce of support starting right now.

[**Will you split a donation today between Yadira’s campaign and UNITEDemocrats to help us flip Colorado’s 8th district?**](https://udpac.us/l/4nKKLoaajHBs) | **[DONATE NOW »](https://udpac.us/l/tBbDMSmOmYvJ)**
---
Gabe Evans is now our representative in Congress—and he’s gone all-in with Donald Trump and the extreme MAGA agenda.

While Yadira Caraveo delivered results for our community—working to lower the cost of prescription drugs, cap insulin prices, and expand access to health care—Gabe Evans is voting to take that progress away.

Yadira has never backed down from a tough fight. She’s running again because she knows this district deserves a representative who listens to every family—no matter their party—and actually delivers results.

CO-08 will once again be one of the most competitive districts in the country. And with a margin of just 2,449 votes last cycle, we know what it’ll take to win.

If everyone reading this email chips in, we will hit the ground running.
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Yadira Caraveo and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately:

name: Team Kaptur HQ
subject: 2,382 votes.
body:
That was the margin between victory and defeat in our 2024 race, friend.

| |
---
Friend, When we say that our race is one of the most competitive in the country, we're not exaggerating. **[Just 2,382 votes made the difference between victory and defeat in our 2024 election. I’ll be blunt: **Elections have consequences.** And we’re starting to see just how disastrous those consequences will be for our country now that Trump is president again: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105957594/539946882/-225299136?refcode=250416_Serve_Crockett_Consequences&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2EwZjljZi1mNTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S_-YtVh3yCQeT4X2_mO39IITeT2FQ3ib7bSIbgRVFD0=) Standing up to Trump’s ridiculous tariffs shouldn’t be partisan — it’s about right and wrong. And it is flat out WRONG to unilaterally and randomly start a tariff war with some of our closest allies. Trump’s tariffs will destroy our alliances around the world, tank our own stock market, and raise prices for everyday Americans — all while accomplishing nothing of value for our country or the world. But we already know that congressional Republicans will never stand up to Trump or his disastrous agenda, which means it’s on Democrats (as usual) to fix what Republicans broke. [**To do that, we need to win back our House Majority, which is why I’m reaching out today and asking you to chip in $5, $10, or more -- split with Serve America -- to help us do just that. name: VoteVets HQ
subject: A Military parade is something special.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
The United States Military does not march in parades to honor any elected office, or any person. The United States Military marches for the American people, their comrades in arms, and the country they serve.
#
There are a few things we throw big Military parades for in the United States.
Winning a global conflict with fascism, for instance.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250416-1-120&t=1&akid=34352%2E3013755%2EhTy4GY)
Or defeating Sadam Hussein and liberating Kuwait.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250416-1-120&t=2&akid=34352%2E3013755%2EhTy4GY)
Fourth of July, you’ll get some of the Troops showing up in your local parade.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250416-1-120&t=3&akid=34352%2E3013755%2EhTy4GY)
They’ll be around for Memorial Day as well, to honor the fallen.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250416-1-120&t=4&akid=34352%2E3013755%2EhTy4GY)
The United States Military does not march in parades to honor any elected office, or any person. The United States Military marches for the American people, their comrades in arms, and the country they serve.
A Military parade is something special.
In some cases it’s a celebration of victory — the victory of democracy over tyranny, liberation over repression. In others it is to celebrate our nation — the ideals we stand for, the things our forefathers fought for, the future we hope for. It allows a grateful nation to remember the men and women who gave their lives for freedom, too.
A Military parade is **_NOT**_ a birthday gift for a dictator bent on destroying everything the Military fought for. And we’ll be damned if we’re going to let Trump turn the finest armed forces in the world into his toy without fighting back.
If you’re in a position to make a donation, please: [**Chip in to VoteVets as we work against Trump and his administration. This is going to take an absolutely massive team, and we need you to be a part of it.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250416-1-120&t=5&akid=34352%2E3013755%2EhTy4GY)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

body:
| | | |

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4f97e4cf-40d5-4870-a983-5e04d66e31fe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T10f0c509-6e77-4418-8ef0-48e4856f4459/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I’ve seen a lot of tough races in my time, but let me tell you: this one is as important as it gets. The Virginia Governor’s race isn’t just about the future of Virginia – it's a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election after Trump’s inauguration, and it could set the stage for Democrats in 2026. If we don’t win big here, we’ll be facing a rough road ahead. [So, before I continue, can I count on you to split a contribution to Abigail Spanberger’s campaign for Governor of Virginia?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3453813b-f0b9-46d8-b01d-737ee261eacf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taefeb724-299a-44d5-bc71-0d6774e2cc42/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Here’s what’s got me terrified: The Cook Political Report has called this race a TOSS-UP, and I couldn’t agree more. Polls are going to stay tight, and this race is going to be one of the hardest-fought in the nation. Republicans are going to flood the state with millions of dollars through their super PACs, trying to keep the Governor’s seat red. They know this race is everything to them – and we need to match their energy, their money, and their commitment. Remember, this race is the only opportunity to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025. If we don’t win this one, we’ll be handing Republicans a major victory ahead of 2026, and trust me – we can’t let that happen. Right now, Democratic Governors are our last line of defense against the reckless policies coming out of the Trump administration, and Abigail Spanberger is the leader Virginia needs at this moment. That’s why I’m asking you to step up today. We can’t win this without your help. The money that’s coming from the other side is going to be massive, and we need to be able to push back. Every dollar you contribute will make a difference in keeping Virginia blue and in keeping the Democrats on track for victory in 2026. [Will you contribute right now to Blue Amp Action and Abigail Spanberger to help Abigail Spanberger win this race and deliver a major victory for Democrats?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T19c22f3a-357e-49db-815b-a5b2f3a2085a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d23204e-4742-4dc4-bdd6-4b208c8d4873/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | Peter, I’ve seen a lot of tough races in my time, but let me tell you: this one is as important as it gets. The Virginia Governor’s race isn’t just about the future of Virginia – it's a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election after Trump’s inauguration, and it could set the stage for Democrats in 2026. If we don’t win big here, we’ll be facing a rough road ahead. | | | Here’s what’s got me terrified: The Cook Political Report has called this race a TOSS-UP, and I couldn’t agree more. Polls are going to stay tight, and this race is going to be one of the hardest-fought in the nation. Republicans are going to flood the state with millions of dollars through their super PACs, trying to keep the Governor’s seat red. They know this race is everything to them – and we need to match their energy, their money, and their commitment. Remember, this race is the only opportunity to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025. If we don’t win this one, we’ll be handing Republicans a major victory ahead of 2026, and trust me – we can’t let that happen. Right now, Democratic Governors are our last line of defense against the reckless policies coming out of the Trump administration, and Abigail Spanberger is the leader Virginia needs at this moment. That’s why I’m asking you to step up today. We can’t win this without your help. The money that’s coming from the other side is going to be massive, and we need to be able to push back. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. name: David Hogg
subject: We’re going to primary out-of-touch Democrats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Will you help us rebuild the Democratic Party with younger leaders?
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250416-1&t=1&akid=1990%2E587540%2EeF9jm_)
Peter, we have some big news to share:
**Leaders We Deserve is launching a $20 million investment to usher in the next generation of Democrats** who will go to the mat every day for the American people and use every tactic and tool to stop Trump’s radical right-wing, economically illiterate agenda.
**[Will you pitch in $5 to help us primary out-of-touch, ineffective Democrats and rebuild the party with the next generation of leaders?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250416-1?refcode=em20250416-1990&amount=5&refcode2=1990_587540_eF9jm_&akid=1990%2E587540%2EeF9jm_)**
Today’s party politics has an unwritten rule on both sides: **If you win a seat, it’s yours for life.** No one serious in your party will challenge you. That is a culture that we have to break.
And while we need to continue to pressure our current leaders to do more, part of the pathway forward requires us to start mounting primary challenges to Democrats in solidly blue districts who are failing to deliver for the people.
Too many elected leaders in the Democratic Party are either unwilling or unable to meet the moment and are asleep at the wheel while Trump is demolishing the economy, challenging the foundations of our democracy, and creating new existential crises for our country by the day.
**Younger leaders simply bring a different level of urgency that we just aren’t seeing in our politics right now.** We grew up with the existential threat of climate change bearing down on us. Adolescence today means active shooter drills and wondering if you’re going to survive math class. And we are told every election is the most important of our lifetime — that we must protect democracy at all costs — all while democracy continues to fail us.
It’s not because democracy can’t work, but because our politicians have failed to make it work for the people, and instead made it work for the special interests destroying our future.
**We can do something about it, Peter. We can ensure that Democrats are fighting for us —** **or we can replace them with younger leaders who will.**
**[Can you pitch in $5 now to help us power this game-changing fight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250416-1?refcode=em20250416-1990&amount=5&refcode2=1990_587540_eF9jm_&akid=1990%2E587540%2EeF9jm_)**
Like so many, I care deeply about this party. I want this party to be strong. It’s personal to me. When my father was diagnosed with Parkinson’s almost 15 years ago, the only reason my family stayed afloat was Social Security. And the only reason we were able to get Social Security was because the Democratic Party fought for it.
With all its flaws, the Democratic Party has played a critical role for progress in this country. Revitalizing and rebuilding it is important work. **This party is worth fighting for, and not just for the sake of opposing Trump. What that looks like right now is electing younger leaders who have the energy, passion, and vision to meet this moment with the urgency our country deserves.**
Through all of this, some incumbents will rise to the challenge and emerge stronger. Others will demonstrate why they should be replaced.
**Either way, we all win.**
**[If you’re ready to jumpstart the next generation of Democratic leadership, please donate $5 right now to stand with us in this important fight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250416-1?refcode=em20250416-1990&amount=5&refcode2=1990_587540_eF9jm_&akid=1990%2E587540%2EeF9jm_)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250416-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250416-1990&refcode2=1990_587540_eF9jm_&akid=1990%2E587540%2EeF9jm_)**
Thank you for your support,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250416-1&t=2&refcode2=1990_587540_eF9jm_&akid=1990%2E587540%2EeF9jm_)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1990%2E587540%2EeF9jm_)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1990%2E587540%2EeF9jm_)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)

name: Ron Wyden
subject: One tax code for the rich, one tax code for the rest of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
I can tell you which one Donald Trump favors...
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105958261/539949395/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTJkNDEyZS1mOTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydxr41u1_Aq7Busb8yFOKgbJPAenPjWllAW-OMIC8hw=&emci=31aacf4f-d21a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=da2d412e-f91a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Yesterday marked the end of tax season. And I'm especially enraged by this harsh reality that **our country is a tale of two tax codes: one where teachers, firefighters, and hardworking Americans pay taxes out of each paycheck **–** and one that favors the ultra-rich and allows them to get away without paying their fair share. ** Before Trump's second term, Democrats made big progress to hold tax cheats accountable and ensure everyone pays what they owe. Democrats gave the federal government the resources it needs to go after tax cheats and hold them accountable. So you can guess what was first up on the chopping block when Elon Musk and his DOGE cronies made it to the IRS. Yep, you guessed it. They immediately moved to gut the enforcement mechanisms at the IRS that allow them to identify and go after wealthy tax cheats. **It's a tale as old as time: nothing unites Republicans like making it easier for rich people to cheat on their taxes.** This isn't just unfair to the millions of hardworking Americans who dutifully pay taxes out of every single paycheck — it's damaging our economy at a time when Trump is doing everything he can to destroy it. **According to Treasury and IRS officials, the Trump administration's gutting of federal enforcement could cost our country more than**** _half a trillion dollars_****in revenue this year.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105958262/539949396/-2044921950?refcode=2025-04-16-revenue&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=da2d412e-f91a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTJkNDEyZS1mOTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydxr41u1_Aq7Busb8yFOKgbJPAenPjWllAW-OMIC8hw=) Countless programs that Trump and Elon Musk are dismantling could thrive with an extra $500 billion. Child care, early education programs, Social Security, Meals on Wheels, you name it. But for Trump and DOGE, giving billionaires a free pass to cheat on their taxes is at the top of the to-do list. For an administration that claims to care about rooting out fraud and waste, it sure doesn't seem interested in collecting revenue from wealthy people cheating on their taxes. **It is critical that we work to fix the damage Trump has done to the IRS.** I'll continue demanding transparency and standing firm for policies that make sure _everyone_ plays by the same rules, and I'll keep shining a spotlight on Trump's deliberate sabotage of our government and economy. If Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress think the American people aren't going to notice this, they couldn't be more wrong. clean_body: I can tell you which one Donald Trump favors... | | | | Yesterday marked the end of tax season. And I'm especially enraged by this harsh reality that our country is a tale of two tax codes: one where teachers, firefighters, and hardworking Americans pay taxes out of each paycheck – and one that favors the ultra-rich and allows them to get away without paying their fair share. Before Trump's second term, Democrats made big progress to hold tax cheats accountable and ensure everyone pays what they owe. Democrats gave the federal government the resources it needs to go after tax cheats and hold them accountable. So you can guess what was first up on the chopping block when Elon Musk and his DOGE cronies made it to the IRS. Yep, you guessed it. They immediately moved to gut the enforcement mechanisms at the IRS that allow them to identify and go after wealthy tax cheats. It's a tale as old as time: nothing unites Republicans like making it easier for rich people to cheat on their taxes. This isn't just unfair to the millions of hardworking Americans who dutifully pay taxes out of every single paycheck — it's damaging our economy at a time when Trump is doing everything he can to destroy it. According to Treasury and IRS officials, the Trump administration's gutting of federal enforcement could cost our country more than half a trillion dollarsin revenue this year. = Countless programs that Trump and Elon Musk are dismantling could thrive with an extra $500 billion. Child care, early education programs, Social Security, Meals on Wheels, you name it. But for Trump and DOGE, giving billionaires a free pass to cheat on their taxes is at the top of the to-do list. For an administration that claims to care about rooting out fraud and waste, it sure doesn't seem interested in collecting revenue from wealthy people cheating on their taxes. It is critical that we work to fix the damage Trump has done to the IRS. Since Trump has been in office, he’s been doing exactly what he said he would – _and it’s already hurting Americans._ Prices are up. Stocks are down. Uncertainty is _everywhere_. **And now, even grassroots fundraising has slowed down as we work to elect state Democrats who will stop the MAGA agenda.** Here’s how that cycle could be dangerous: 🔄 When Trump enacts extreme policies that hurt working families... 🔄 People pull back financially to protect themselves, meaning... 🔄 Organizations like ours struggle to fund the fight, and... 🔄 State Democrats are left overlooked and underfunded. 🔄 **This results in Trump and his MAGA allies facing _less_ resistance – making it easier to push their extreme agenda. ** It’s a loop that feeds itself, repeatedly. And unless we break it? _**It will only get worse.**_ [Soif you can, we’re asking you to help break the cycle. clean_body: A $3 donation today helps state Dems gather the necessary resources we need to compete and WIN nationwide. Can we count on you to chip in? | | | | | ---|--- Since Trump has been in office, he’s been doing exactly what he said he would – and it’s already hurting Americans. Prices are up. Stocks are down. Uncertainty is everywhere. And now, even grassroots fundraising has slowed down as we work to elect state Democrats who will stop the MAGA agenda. Here’s how that cycle could be dangerous: 🔄 When Trump enacts extreme policies that hurt working families... 🔄 People pull back financially to protect themselves, meaning... 🔄 Organizations like ours struggle to fund the fight, and... 🔄 State Democrats are left overlooked and underfunded. 🔄 This results in Trump and his MAGA allies facing less resistance – making it easier to push their extreme agenda. It’s a loop that feeds itself, repeatedly. And unless we break it? It will only get worse. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Thanks, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. name: Ro Khanna
subject: TAKE ACTION: Abolish Super PACs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
Rep. Summer Lee and I have introduced the Abolish Super PACs Act, a bill that would effectively eliminate super PACs in federal elections.
Over $4.4 billion spent in last year’s federal elections came from super PACs and dark money. This record is broken year after year, silencing Americans and corrupting our democracy. If we want real change in Washington, we need to get dark money out of the picture.
Sign the petition: End super PAC spending once and for all. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/abolish-super-pacs-act-petition?contactdata=7aNKZ1u+w8bjRWvD5ZVSIyp7/+DA5zRH8g/Kv7XCL0lQKcrj99kRI/inYP5sorxhMj2/Vpub+B1GAUbuLW3I3C10CBWulEgzUYeQNp2Hloi6aTRMOg/xzdWARNQd6x4UIgmiowbvMyqN1TQamSTmAWPTGN0eKSoo45hAr8/zselvCe2F3igVO7SbG2PPsDCQ]
https://x.com/ArtCandee/status/1904972861493641527 [https://x.com/ArtCandee/status/1904972861493641527]
I’ve never taken a dime of PAC or lobbyist money and I never will. When I was first elected, I co-founded the No PAC Caucus and introduced a bill to ban all PAC and lobbyist money from Congress because I firmly believe that our government should work for the people, NOT special interests.
By addressing the dangerous influence of unlimited spending in our elections, we can create a stronger democracy for all Americans.
ADD YOUR NAME [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/abolish-super-pacs-act-petition?contactdata=7aNKZ1u+w8bjRWvD5ZVSIyp7/+DA5zRH8g/Kv7XCL0lQKcrj99kRI/inYP5sorxhMj2/Vpub+B1GAUbuLW3I3C10CBWulEgzUYeQNp2Hloi6aTRMOg/xzdWARNQd6x4UIgmiowbvMyqN1TQamSTmAWPTGN0eKSoo45hAr8/zselvCe2F3igVO7SbG2PPsDCQ]
Thank you for your activism and everything you do.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!
DONATE $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20250416-abolish-super-pacs-act-lift&amount=3]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20250416-abolish-super-pacs-act-lift]
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com] https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA [https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA] https://twitter.com/RoKhanna [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna] https://www.tiktok.com/@rokhannausa [https://www.tiktok.com/@rokhannausa] https://bsky.app/profile/rokhanna.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/rokhanna.bsky.social] info@rokhanna.com [info@rokhanna.com]
Ro for Congress
P.O Box 3513
Santa Clara, CA 95051
United States
Paid for by Ro for Congress

name: Chris LaCivita, Trump Co-Campaign Manager
subject: Update: What I’m doing after helping run President Trump’s 2024 campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
I’m asking for your attention on something very important!| | | Friend, I helped run President Trump’s campaign in 2024. Now I’m asking for the entire MAGA movement’s attention! It’s Chris LaCivita, and co-managing President Trump’s campaign taught me two things: **_1\. The mandate is real: The silent majority proved that the mainstream media’s narratives were nothing but failed scare tactics. _** **_2\. Nothing is truly more powerful than the belief of true patriots behind the MAGA movement. _** But the dark reality is that none of this could matter. _**[Republicans will be throwing in the towel and walking away if we can’t ensure President Trump has the resources he needs in the Senate to protect and enact his agenda. That’s the reason I’m writing to you today!](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d119a3d735804b429ffb3bb9388a89fa&_e=gbXVT2_OJe2lcKOcfIa2kU8GcffvJc550aC6OtoHlp5kpkj5JOEFbsHOqbnZdweH5Ds8Rx633Dj2cUXiG6SdrZNjEbsnHxdaXkkXLSzd9gx1zulv_6hR4wli-It_n-Fm5FT2By3N7OwNgfA5NdhLHEvKxqdSLIAnB8fyBC0F4r-tcyI3rSTDvkI-tQa84cXOu3qaqWAfT6MvEnQEQ_T6yrC2vyprU5qYIy1tvkYuNFkfbNdZZGN3e-RR3n69-cI_m3UlmTB6JEyW7IzOkpDclvmAd8J0g9fo7I7C8NM2LYUA9H5-jh5Mszc9vE8Jeil1ydzou2FdpDZXChKlkQFJpLFm0yKAfbMrY70PPYS715gRMjLVGb4p-su4eFqzNp7pFZbGlM9qELfDW6rIVCp2DxsjRS_MIC6D8V-Cb7wT4nMaOw9PYyC1wLXC1q8d6WWN_lvnLFxoFAx9ufqq8SYdHi3DG8LBrP-XsWCjWPu39K8%3D)**_ All the work, the relentless fight from President Trump through the sham leftist courtrooms, the attacks on his life, everything that was poured into President Trump’s campaign was for this. The golden age is finally here, but if we want to ensure the MAGA movement keeps going, we need to take action sooner rather than later. **That’s why I’m supporting Mike Rogers’ campaign for the U.S. Senate in Michigan.** _**[This will not only be the closest race on the map next year, it’s the race that needs the MAGA movement behind it!](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d119a3d735804b429ffb3bb9388a89fa&_e=gbXVT2_OJe2lcKOcfIa2kU8GcffvJc550aC6OtoHlp5kpkj5JOEFbsHOqbnZdweH5Ds8Rx633Dj2cUXiG6SdrZNjEbsnHxdaXkkXLSzd9gx1zulv_6hR4wli-It_n-Fm5FT2By3N7OwNgfA5NdhLHEvKxqdSLIAnB8fyBC0F4r-tcyI3rSTDvkI-tQa84cXOu3qaqWAfT6MvEnQEQ_T6yrC2vyprU5qYIy1tvkYuNFkfbNdZZGN3e-RR3n69-cI_m3UlmTB6JEyW7IzOkpDclvmAd8J0g9fo7I7C8NM2LYUA9H5-jh5Mszc9vE8Jeil1ydzou2FdpDZXChKlkQFJpE2HjkKvPMUNNs2_hwPk_k0SnBOA7Q8X5Z6suem8Dn5vvipifPaONr_wMpmNIRvdqf7Gk9w-0ydEiFiMyPuv7y8ye7a-HsJZ5_NtKOp2HARhXG86C29lXWGi8mRynKtT0jYhj6xbuaCUzvKsH_b5BVA%3D)**_ Mike Rogers is a veteran and an experienced law enforcement agent who started his career as an FBI special agent and found his way to becoming the chairman of the House Intelligence Committee. He’s brought down cyber threats from China, corrupt Chicago politicians, and dangerous human traffickers. The truth is, if we’re not standing with Mike Rogers, we’re turning our backs on a critical race for Republicans. Not only is this race a must-win, it’s going to be a battle to the bitter end. Flipping a seat in Michigan is a task that we can not take lightly. _**[If you’re as concerned as I am about keeping the successes of President Trump’s movement going, I’m asking if you’ll join me in backing my friend Mike today by chipping in any amount at all!](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d119a3d735804b429ffb3bb9388a89fa&_e=gbXVT2_OJe2lcKOcfIa2kU8GcffvJc550aC6OtoHlp5kpkj5JOEFbsHOqbnZdweH5Ds8Rx633Dj2cUXiG6SdrZNjEbsnHxdaXkkXLSzd9gx1zulv_6hR4wli-It_n-Fm5FT2By3N7OwNgfA5NdhLHEvKxqdSLIAnB8fyBC0F4r-tcyI3rSTDvkI-tQa84cXOu3qaqWAfT6MvEnQEQ_T6yrC2vyprU5qYIy1tvkYuNFkfbNdZZGN3e-RR3n69-cI_m3UlmTB6JEyW7IzOkpDclvmAd8J0g9fo7I7C8NM2LYUA9H5-jh5Mszc9vE8Jeil1ydzou2FdpDZXChKlkQFJpHSEVtmEGgznuYn8reueCoCNk5t0d9BugWCevdy_v1ubxMjoY4cftKYITQDIdPaALyL-wu5S0f_P3t-inu1Gy4QoQPBwOKYEAF34mkp9s_A5sN-HN9jczLDLDdSZSeeJyr2PJpUWz_xigXUKePqAQIc%3D)**_ Thank you for your support! Sincerely, Chris LaCivita

| | Peter,

| | **“Tax cuts are what Republicans are good at," —that's the message Josh sent to the American people in a recent Fox News interview. ** Josh is taking the fight straight to Washington’s doorstep — pushing for real tax relief for the backbone of the MAGA movement: hardworking Americans. This isn’t about Wall Street or corporate giants. name: AOC
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Donald Trump is a criminal who makes members of Congress who collude with him rich.
#
We have somehow conditioned ourselves to believe that it is normal for members of Congress — who swore an oath to the people — to day-trade individual stocks and make millions with the sensitive information we are entrusted with to serve.
How can anyone _possibly_ make an objective vote on health care, energy, or war when their personal money is tied up in pharmaceutical companies, oil companies, or defense companies' stocks? **You can't**.
We saw this play out last week with Trump's corrupt, disastrous, and rushed tariff scheme. **We saw Marjorie Taylor Greene buy that dip**.
I've got one question for her: how much did you make? How much did you make off of people's despair? How much did you make off that panic? How much did you make off that suffering?
**No more. We can't accept it.**
I hope you see now that it was all about manipulating the markets so he could quietly enrich his friends who bought the dip before reversing it all in the morning.
All while our seniors and retirees suffered.
Donald Trump is a criminal who makes himself rich, the billionaires who back him rich, and the members of Congress who collude with him rich — **but not you or any working person in this country**.
To be clear, I don't care what party you are, it doesn't matter how powerful or what positions you have: members of Congress holding and trading individual stock is wrong. It is corrosive, it is destructive, and it must be banned.
You can run the tape: I have always held this position, whether it was Democrats or Republicans in charge. **We deserve better**.
But now, we will have to fight harder than ever to prevent our country from becoming a personal slush fund for Trump and the GOP.
[Help us continue the fight by making a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250416-2.oBWP1t&refcode=em20250416-8625-P_FND_CTR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8625%2E2526796%2EVXlKH2)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250416-2.oBWP1t&refcode=em20250416-8625-P_FND_CTR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8625%2E2526796%2EVXlKH2)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250416-2?refcode=em20250416-8625-P_FND_CTR_CTR&t=21&refcode2=8625_2526796_VXlKH2&akid=8625%2E2526796%2EVXlKH2)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250416-8625-P_FND_CTR_CTR&t=22&akid=8625%2E2526796%2EVXlKH2)**

Through robust policies and unwavering commitment, we've significantly curbed illegal immigration and fortified our homeland. This is just the start, Peter. President Trump needs allies in the Senate to enact his plan to MAKE AMERICA GREAT. But this fight is far from over - Senate Democrats are going to do whatever they can to obstruct and block our reform. Our team is conducting an to gauge where real America First patriots stand on this issue. But time is running out - We need from every Republican in every state to send a message loud and clear: 🔽 🔽 This is a private poll. name: Jacob Carrel, NDRC
subject: A reminder that a more representative democracy is possible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
I’m grateful for everyone who made these wins happen.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105959838/539954269/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzNDU1OWNjLWZkMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iAkVvaXEzTukg1vSpacGdc7Z0Hu7OSrNA2McliAVpZQ=&emci=3d384a2b-391a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c34559cc-fd1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)
---

Hi Peter, Every one of us has a story about why we got inspired to fight for fair representation. For me, it goes back to organizing in my home state of Wisconsin — a place that’s been a key focus for the fair maps movement. So today, in the wake of Judge Susan Crawford’s recent victory in the Badger State, I’d like to spend some time reflecting on what we’ve been able to accomplish in Wisconsin, and what it means for our work. Let’s take it all the way back to 2011. Newly elected Republican Governor Scott Walker and his GOP allies jumped at the chance to manipulate the state's legislative maps with a horrifying gerrymander, guaranteeing them an unearned lock on power for a decade. **To protest his power-grabbing agenda, I spent three weeks sleeping on the cold marble floor in the state capitol building with 100,000 other concerned citizens.** | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105959841/539954272/653874474?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_Wisconsin_email_20250416-NDRC-Tier1-Wisconsin_31&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250416-NDRC-Tier1-Wisconsin_31&utm_campaign=Wisconsin&amount=31&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzNDU1OWNjLWZkMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iAkVvaXEzTukg1vSpacGdc7Z0Hu7OSrNA2McliAVpZQ=)
---
_(That’s me with the bullhorn!)_
And I saw the damage that an unresponsive, unaccountable, gerrymandered legislature was able to do, from cutting funding for my public school district to refusing to expand Medicaid.
But the people of Wisconsin kept fighting back.
**And when the National Democratic Redistricting Committee got off the ground in 2017, they jumped into the fight.** The organization began building an organizing infrastructure that put a spotlight on just how badly Republicans were bending the rules — not just in Wisconsin but all across the country.
In the 2018 governor’s race, the NDRC endorsed Tony Evers, who defeated Scott Walker. The NDRC invested year after year in winning a pro-democracy majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court, culminating in helping to flip control of the court in 2023.
**As a result of those victories, in 2024 — for the first time since I became eligible to vote — Wisconsin’s state legislative maps were finally fair.** Democrats broke the Republican supermajority in the state senate and flipped seats in the state assembly, creating a path to win majorities in 2026.
And earlier this month, Wisconsinites preserved the state supreme court’s pro-democracy majority by electing Judge Crawford, who won despite Elon Musk and Donald Trump’s best efforts.
I got to go back to Wisconsin for the last few days before that election to help get out the vote, and I was thrilled to celebrate a victory for democracy with the whole team. When we knocked doors this month, through freezing rain and a bit of snow, I saw the same righteous anger I saw in the 2011 protests — except now, voters had a path to power.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105959843/539954274/653874474?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_Wisconsin_email_20250416-NDRC-Tier1-Wisconsin_31&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250416-NDRC-Tier1-Wisconsin_31&utm_campaign=Wisconsin&amount=31&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzNDU1OWNjLWZkMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iAkVvaXEzTukg1vSpacGdc7Z0Hu7OSrNA2McliAVpZQ=)
---
These years of wins are a testament to years of organizing and activism by this entire movement. And they remind us that a more representative democracy is possible.
As we look ahead to must-win elections in Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Virginia later this year, we’ll need grassroots support to keep up the momentum. And we know the far right will redouble their efforts in the wake of their loss in Wisconsin.
**The NDRC is able to keep up the fight for fair representation in the long term because supporters like you donate whatever and whenever you can.[I’m asking you to make a donation of $31 or more now to help elect more Democracy Defenders and power our movement across the country.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105959845/539954276/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_Wisconsin_email_20250416-NDRC-Tier1-Wisconsin_31&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250416-NDRC-Tier1-Wisconsin_31&utm_campaign=Wisconsin&amount=31&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzNDU1OWNjLWZkMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iAkVvaXEzTukg1vSpacGdc7Z0Hu7OSrNA2McliAVpZQ=)**
All the best,
Jacob

Jacob Carrel
Deputy Director of Litigation & Policy
