clean_body: I’m grateful for everyone who made these wins happen. | Hi Peter, Every one of us has a story about why we got inspired to fight for fair representation. For me, it goes back to organizing in my home state of Wisconsin — a place that’s been a key focus for the fair maps movement. So today, in the wake of Judge Susan Crawford’s recent victory in the Badger State, I’d like to spend some time reflecting on what we’ve been able to accomplish in Wisconsin, and what it means for our work. Let’s take it all the way back to 2011. Newly elected Republican Governor Scott Walker and his GOP allies jumped at the chance to manipulate the state's legislative maps with a horrifying gerrymander, guaranteeing them an unearned lock on power for a decade. To protest his power-grabbing agenda, I spent three weeks sleeping on the cold marble floor in the state capitol building with 100,000 other concerned citizens. | = (That’s me with the bullhorn!) And I saw the damage that an unresponsive, unaccountable, gerrymandered legislature was able to do, from cutting funding for my public school district to refusing to expand Medicaid. But the people of Wisconsin kept fighting back. And when the National Democratic Redistricting Committee got off the ground in 2017, they jumped into the fight. The organization began building an organizing infrastructure that put a spotlight on just how badly Republicans were bending the rules — not just in Wisconsin but all across the country. In the 2018 governor’s race, the NDRC endorsed Tony Evers, who defeated Scott Walker. The NDRC invested year after year in winning a pro-democracy majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court, culminating in helping to flip control of the court in 2023. As a result of those victories, in 2024 — for the first time since I became eligible to vote — Wisconsin’s state legislative maps were finally fair. Democrats broke the Republican supermajority in the state senate and flipped seats in the state assembly, creating a path to win majorities in 2026. And earlier this month, Wisconsinites preserved the state supreme court’s pro-democracy majority by electing Judge Crawford, who won despite Elon Musk and Donald Trump’s best efforts. I got to go back to Wisconsin for the last few days before that election to help get out the vote, and I was thrilled to celebrate a victory for democracy with the whole team. When we knocked doors this month, through freezing rain and a bit of snow, I saw the same righteous anger I saw in the 2011 protests — except now, voters had a path to power. = These years of wins are a testament to years of organizing and activism by this entire movement. And they remind us that a more representative democracy is possible. As we look ahead to must-win elections in Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Virginia later this year, we’ll need grassroots support to keep up the momentum. And we know the far right will redouble their efforts in the wake of their loss in Wisconsin. The NDRC is able to keep up the fight for fair representation in the long term because supporters like you donate whatever and whenever you can.= All the best, Jacob Jacob Carrel Deputy Director of Litigation & Policy = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

I never got to use a toilet seat. Instead, we had to share a hole in the ground with 8 other families. I was raised on food rationing coupons in the Sichuan province of China during Mao’s Cultural Revolution. I was only a child, yet I worshiped him like a God. I had no other choice. I was brainwashed. We all were. Eventually, I was able to escape from China and flee to the United States.

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Mark_=E2=80=9COz=E2=80=9D_Geist?=
subject: Hey, meet Rone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shadow Warriors Project
body:
My physical recovery was just half the battle
| | | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a0881cc7b13a4de8b424e40e6e09c56d&_e=jk4QrilNrkX2yWQUtwMjQ9kwbPSErO6GEmwEt_ChKGif4Kdeep1HYR_TuA86R6ijtAaopHoPzB8lz9j5k1AfoRjJv0scyxedRvmfAu-fmBvGegGAdAARwMp3S1JXf8cjlBQSzAGRrDAlmwccduA-8huPWK1vgALrDVQtx4-LLpL_Q0D745DGMT_ajH6BOvShdqhuwScbiL_Ad64Q18XGDBNbDUkd4fHgCPqTqddgW71igyMN_GkWh7_d1MBQ_DCv4AaFSQWThYMWY2Qis3PhJw%3D%3D)
---
|
---
|
---
Friend, meet Rone.
She's 7 – and I’m proud to say she’s named in honor of Tyrone Woods, my fellow warrior who died next to me in Benghazi in 2012.
It will never come easy to talk about being abandoned by our government, _twice._
**Once for 13 hours in Benghazi, and again after I returned home without pay. **
My recovery process was long, costly and excruciating. I underwent 14 surgeries, primarily as a result of the shrapnel I took in my arms, neck and legs.
The physical recovery is just half of the battle, however. The other half was mental, but I got there, and Rone played a huge part in that.
This dog helped to bring me genuine healing and a new sense of purpose which I’ve channeled into helping other warriors facing similar challenges.
**Bonding a veteran with a service K9, and watching them train and grow together is an amazing thing to be a part of, and that’s why it’s such a big focus of ours at Shadow Warriors Project.**
Most military contractors, or “shadow warriors,” serve in classified programs for our government, and it's easy for them to be forgotten about.
Having been through it myself, I refuse to sit back when I have the power to help these warriors and their families who've given so much.
**[So here's my challenge for you today – make a tax-deductible donation, and empower us to bring healing, financial assistance and service K-9s to those who truly need and deserve it.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a0881cc7b13a4de8b424e40e6e09c56d&_e=jk4QrilNrkX2yWQUtwMjQ9kwbPSErO6GEmwEt_ChKGif4Kdeep1HYR_TuA86R6ijtAaopHoPzB8lz9j5k1AfoRjJv0scyxedRvmfAu-fmBvGegGAdAARwMp3S1JXf8cjiJBdI4cg-5WFc6SuPrfv7vVkqLlBnyrJtYwUH-xuElbb18PinSr4yPaClb3Cc1uNmRQ11sUZMDTIU-BdeSOQTvEc9qucA9dveIihgMnHF0SVTShlY6mSj8QzBP-cG15fnw6i-BRJxi6JdkwUjEf3lA%3D%3D)**
Thanks for your time, and I hope we can count on your support.
Semper Fi,
Mark "Oz" Geist

|
---
[SUPPORT OUR WARRIORS >>](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a0881cc7b13a4de8b424e40e6e09c56d&_e=jk4QrilNrkX2yWQUtwMjQ9kwbPSErO6GEmwEt_ChKGif4Kdeep1HYR_TuA86R6ijtAaopHoPzB8lz9j5k1AfoRjJv0scyxedRvmfAu-fmBvGegGAdAARwMp3S1JXf8cjxwzvYD0CgUu1_gffZXDZLYNYgdPf5byxe1rot67gPYrB8vZ-RmfOut2FsDgeKqqKPrgYvoKU7LfuDCwSOw5lPBgL2XI7rDPrJbQjxOEKerK60H2c4J-IW0ecAkQp8ClZVfjNLQVt3ocNZyEc2fBgSQ%3D%3D)

name: [SURVEY] ScottPeters.com
subject: Save our Sequoias
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress
body:
---
| | Peter –

California communities have been devastated by increasingly severe wildfires in recent years – and our state’s precious sequoias are suffering irreparable damage as well.

Decades of poor forest management and climate change have made this once-fire-resilient species vulnerable to complete elimination without swift intervention.

**That’s why Scott has re-introduced the Save Our Sequoias Act to protect California’s iconic tree before it’s too late.**
[We need to hear from our strongest supporters on Scott’s latest climate action: Do you stand with Scott behind his action to protect these towering trees?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105960152/539955314/1083339955?refcode2=48d6ae9a-ff1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&refcode=SP_EM_SV_90DO_250416_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGQ2YWU5YS1mZjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lFWQI33fWIm8C3zUU6bHSIGXGAzGU5yVsFtFYeHcuRQ=&emci=300bad94-ff1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=48d6ae9a-ff1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5258741) | | **[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105960153/539955315/1083339955?refcode2=48d6ae9a-ff1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&refcode=SP_EM_SV_90DO_250416_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGQ2YWU5YS1mZjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lFWQI33fWIm8C3zUU6bHSIGXGAzGU5yVsFtFYeHcuRQ=&emci=300bad94-ff1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=48d6ae9a-ff1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5258741)**

| **[NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105960154/539955316/1083339955?refcode2=48d6ae9a-ff1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&refcode=SP_EM_SV_90DO_250416_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGQ2YWU5YS1mZjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lFWQI33fWIm8C3zUU6bHSIGXGAzGU5yVsFtFYeHcuRQ=&emci=300bad94-ff1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=48d6ae9a-ff1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5258741)**
---

For generations, the giant sequoia has been an iconic species that has provided immense cultural, environmental, and recreational benefits.

Not only have warming temperatures and drought caused by climate change created an environment that is killing sequoias at an alarming rate, but the resultant wildfires also create pollution that causes impact comparable to the entire energy sector in California – a troubling cycle that must be stopped.

**The Save Our Sequoias Act will enhance collaboration of land management between federal and local governments, fund comprehensive sequoia restoration projects, strengthen emergency procedures, and more.**

Scott is working to combat climate change and ensure the giant sequoias stand safely in their natural habitat for years to come – but we need to know you stand with this bold action.
[Peter – Are you with us in this fight to preserve California’s iconic sequoias?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105960155/539955317/1083339955?refcode2=48d6ae9a-ff1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&refcode=SP_EM_SV_90DO_250416_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGQ2YWU5YS1mZjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lFWQI33fWIm8C3zUU6bHSIGXGAzGU5yVsFtFYeHcuRQ=&emci=300bad94-ff1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=48d6ae9a-ff1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5258741) | **[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105960156/539955318/1083339955?refcode2=48d6ae9a-ff1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&refcode=SP_EM_SV_90DO_250416_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGQ2YWU5YS1mZjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lFWQI33fWIm8C3zUU6bHSIGXGAzGU5yVsFtFYeHcuRQ=&emci=300bad94-ff1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=48d6ae9a-ff1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5258741)**

clean_body: | | Peter – California communities have been devastated by increasingly severe wildfires in recent years – and our state’s precious sequoias are suffering irreparable damage as well. Decades of poor forest management and climate change have made this once-fire-resilient species vulnerable to complete elimination without swift intervention. That’s why Scott has re-introduced the Save Our Sequoias Act to protect California’s iconic tree before it’s too late. | | | For generations, the giant sequoia has been an iconic species that has provided immense cultural, environmental, and recreational benefits. Not only have warming temperatures and drought caused by climate change created an environment that is killing sequoias at an alarming rate, but the resultant wildfires also create pollution that causes impact comparable to the entire energy sector in California – a troubling cycle that must be stopped. The Save Our Sequoias Act will enhance collaboration of land management between federal and local governments, fund comprehensive sequoia restoration projects, strengthen emergency procedures, and more. Scott is working to combat climate change and ensure the giant sequoias stand safely in their natural habitat for years to come – but we need to know you stand with this bold action. | | – Peters HQ | | | = | As a leader among Democrats in Congress, Scott Peters has one of the strongest track records of achieving progressive reforms and getting things done. He’s committed to protecting our environment, improving access to affordable healthcare, implementing compassionate immigration reforms and protecting reproductive freedom. Democrats in swing districts like Scott’s rely on grassroots supporters like you.**= | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress Scott Peters for Congress PO Box 22074 San Diego, CA 92192 United States

body:
The SAVE Act means election integrity

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9TdXBwb3J0LVRoZS1TQVZFLUFjdF8yMDI1MDQxNSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVN1cHBvcnQtVGhlLVNBVkUtQWN0JnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTU0JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/es_-jFlmYXg3BNBMNJPcNA)

| | Fellow Conservative, The House passed the _**Safeguard American Voter Eligibility Act**_ also known as the "SAVE Act" on Thursday in spite of nearly every single Democrat voting against it. The SAVE Act is designed to protect the right to vote for all U.S. Citizens and to prevent illegal aliens and other foreigners from voting in our elections. Specifically, the SAVE Act will require proof of United States citizenship to register to vote. **_I am sure you agree .....Only United States citizens should be able to vote. _** **_And ....Only United States citizens should be allowed to register to vote. _** This is common sense. But, of course, the truth is that Democrats don't want to stop illegal aliens from voting. That's exactly why they had no problem allowing a transformative flood of millions of illegal immigrants to enter the country during the Biden administration. Senator Schumer said the SAVE Act would _"disenfranchise millions of American citizens, seize control of our elections, and fan the flames of election skepticism and denialism."_ This is ridiculous! Issues like this show why it was so important to win a Republican Majority in the last election and what is at stake in the fast-approaching mid-term elections. If Chuck Schumer and the radical Democrats in the United States Senate get their way, bills like the SAVE Act will never have a chance of even being debated, let alone passed into law. We ALL must work together to protect election integrity in this country. Are you able to send support to help me fight back right now? **[**Please pitch in here >>**](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9TdXBwb3J0LVRoZS1TQVZFLUFjdF8yMDI1MDQxNSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVN1cHBvcnQtVGhlLVNBVkUtQWN0JnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTU0JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/ggQPC_4mbPybOyNzEhn_cg)** **[Thank you for standing with me on crucial issues like this. subject: Trump's bank account: 📈 Americans' bank accounts: 📉
body:
We are up against a President with billions of dollars who will do anything to keep himself in power. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105960921/539957997/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE434_20250416_MemeCoin_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1055965&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDA2N2E3My0wMjFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=04RPjsfTHx3dsoBKP-DnHosEYrxw8VtyVGVPvEeHwjA=) Peter — Donald Trump is already the richest person to have ever become U.S. president, and he continues to get richer sitting in the Oval Office.

During this past election cycle, the Trump family, including the president, first lady, and his two oldest sons, have launched multiple cryptocurrencies, including personal meme coins. The various projects are approaching $1 billion in paper gains.

Our own **Sen. Elizabeth Warren (MA)** summed up what's going on perfectly — "Donald Trump is enriching himself and his family through their crypto businesses while his administration guts oversight of the market. It's a massive conflict of interest and a recipe for disaster."

[**EMILYs List women continue to lead the opposition. Peter, will you chip in today to help add more Democratic pro-choice women to their ranks?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105960922/539957998/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE434_20250416_MemeCoin_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1055965&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDA2N2E3My0wMjFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=04RPjsfTHx3dsoBKP-DnHosEYrxw8VtyVGVPvEeHwjA=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105960923/539957999/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE434_20250416_MemeCoin_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1055965&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDA2N2E3My0wMjFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=04RPjsfTHx3dsoBKP-DnHosEYrxw8VtyVGVPvEeHwjA=)
---
The law says that political donations — even to PACs or outside spending groups — must be public. But through the Trump family's cryptocurrency schemes, anyone can donate any amount of money _untraceably —_ to the president, likely in exchange for favors. **This is a _historic_ campaign finance scandal, but with the daily barrage of chaos and corruption coming out of the White House, this story hasn't gotten the airtime it deserves. **

Still, Democratic pro-choice women in the U.S. House are working hard to curb this clear abuse of power: **Rep. Brittany Pettersen (CO-07)** and **Rep. Sarah Elfreth (MD-03)** are co-sponsors of the Modern Emoluments and Malfeasance Enforcement (MEME) Act, which prohibits the country's top officials and their families, from Congress to the White House, from capitalizing on personal meme coins.

[**We are up against a president with billions of dollars and a determination to keep himself in power. Donate today to help grow our grassroots movement and fight back:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105960924/539958000/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE434_20250416_MemeCoin_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1055965&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDA2N2E3My0wMjFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=04RPjsfTHx3dsoBKP-DnHosEYrxw8VtyVGVPvEeHwjA=)

clean_body: We are up against a President with billions of dollars who will do anything to keep himself in power. | = Peter — Donald Trump is already the richest person to have ever become U.S. president, and he continues to get richer sitting in the Oval Office. During this past election cycle, the Trump family, including the president, first lady, and his two oldest sons, have launched multiple cryptocurrencies, including personal meme coins. The various projects are approaching $1 billion in paper gains. Our own Sen. Elizabeth Warren (MA) summed up what's going on perfectly — "Donald Trump is enriching himself and his family through their crypto businesses while his administration guts oversight of the market. It's a massive conflict of interest and a recipe for disaster." = | = The law says that political donations — even to PACs or outside spending groups — must be public. But through the Trump family's cryptocurrency schemes, anyone can donate any amount of money untraceably — to the president, likely in exchange for favors. This is a historic campaign finance scandal, but with the daily barrage of chaos and corruption coming out of the White House, this story hasn't gotten the airtime it deserves. Still, Democratic pro-choice women in the U.S. House are working hard to curb this clear abuse of power: Rep. Brittany Pettersen (CO-07) and Rep. Sarah Elfreth (MD-03) are co-sponsors of the Modern Emoluments and Malfeasance Enforcement (MEME) Act, which prohibits the country's top officials and their families, from Congress to the White House, from capitalizing on personal meme coins. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for taking a stand, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Interim Vice President of Federal and Gubernatorial Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. ### **Deported Without Trial Into Danger: Trump 's Fascism in Full Swing--But Democrats ARE FIGHTING BACK NOW **
Donald Trump--America's two-bit wannabe dictator with a golden toilet and a heart of asbestos--is once again ignoring court rulings like they're unpaid invoices from his sixth bankruptcy. This time, it's his backroom deal with the dictator-state, El Salvador, to accept deported immigrants from the U.S., **many of whom never even got a whiff of due process**.
People like Kilmar Abrego Garcia, who legally lived in the U.S. for years, have been swept up and tossed out like ketchup against a wall at Mar-a-Lago by Big Baby. No hearing, no justice, just a MAGA-approved human vending machine--insert brown person, eject to foreign nation, no questions asked.
**But not everyone 's bowing to a spray-tanned walrus of a strongman.** [Senator Chris Van Hollen is stepping up](https://substack.com/redirect/ba43dca2-9c88-4243-8db8-27e233a8a0f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and dragging the moral compass of this country along with him. Garcia was/is a Maryland resident, so the Maryland Senator flew to El Salvador to witness the human wreckage firsthand--_and not without risk._ Because, with Trump, there's treachery around every corner (see Jan 6th and Mike Pence's refusing to get in his car with "his" Secret Service).
I don't want to get into the weeds of the Tom Clancy/Jack Ryan spy novel turned film, _Clear And Present Danger,_ or the real-life horrific tragedy that took place in Jonestown, except to mention them both as a reminder that this is dangerous territory **and Van Hollen 's showing the courage** for which we've all clamored. He entering lawless terrain run by a strongman with hatred for due process and a Trump fetish.
What could go wrong?...

name: Nick Melvoin
subject: An Eventful Year
body:
| | | | | [](https://nickmelvoin.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e47425f168c0b7b00df186831&id=9ea2801263&e=3cf484ad56)
---
| | | | | | Dear Friends,
It’s been an eventful year—both personally and professionally—and I wanted to take a moment to share a quick update while LA Unified is on spring break this week. First and foremost, I hope you and your loved ones are safe and healthy. Chag Sameach/Happy Passover and a Happy Easter to all who are celebrating this week!
**As the elected school board member representing the Palisades, much of my year has been focused on**[**post-fire recovery for our students and families.**](https://nickmelvoin.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e47425f168c0b7b00df186831&id=1ec5f7f6fb&e=3cf484ad56) Starting the day after the fire, I’ve been on the ground in the Palisades supporting constituents who lost their homes and their schools. We preemptively relocated one school in advance of the fires and evacuated a number of others that morning. Two of our public elementary schools were almost completely destroyed, and [I worked to get those students relocated with their school community](https://nickmelvoin.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e47425f168c0b7b00df186831&id=ead43483ec&e=3cf484ad56) —classmates, teachers, principals, and support staff—intact by the following week. They remain co-located at two nearby campuses as we work to rebuild. Meanwhile, the nearly 3,000 students from [Pali High will return to in-person learning next week](https://nickmelvoin.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e47425f168c0b7b00df186831&id=61e1d5f6a2&e=3cf484ad56) at a repurposed Sears department store, where they’ll remain until their campus, which was about 30% damaged, reopens sometime next school year.
It’s been a tough few months, but the resilience of the Palisades community has been remarkable. I’m proud to represent them as we collectively rebuild.
**I’m also proud that**[**my cell phone ban has now been fully implemented**](https://nickmelvoin.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e47425f168c0b7b00df186831&id=adb7f8d6ac&e=3cf484ad56)**across LA Unified, making us the largest school district in the country to take this critical step for kids’ academic, mental, and physical well-being.** We’re already seeing [positive effects](https://nickmelvoin.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e47425f168c0b7b00df186831&id=59d28511eb&e=3cf484ad56). We’re also continuing to advance priorities like [building housing](https://nickmelvoin.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e47425f168c0b7b00df186831&id=946c1baabf&e=3cf484ad56) on vacant district property, [modernizing](https://nickmelvoin.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e47425f168c0b7b00df186831&id=cad7d85338&e=3cf484ad56) district systems, and [protecting every student’s right](https://nickmelvoin.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e47425f168c0b7b00df186831&id=4f969e0bc2&e=3cf484ad56) to be safe at school, despite the absolute chaos in Washington making it harder to build the strong, safe communities our kids deserve.
As many of you know, it was my time as a counselor at [Camp Harmony](https://nickmelvoin.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e47425f168c0b7b00df186831&id=0ce85a0086&e=3cf484ad56) nearly 25 years ago that first sparked my passion for working with kids. **As Camp Director now, I’m being honored by the organization at our annual fundraiser on May 2nd**. If you’re interested in attending or supporting, [you can do so here](https://nickmelvoin.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e47425f168c0b7b00df186831&id=bd2bef58dd&e=3cf484ad56). I'd be so grateful as this organization is so close to my heart.
**And finally, on a personal note, my wife Kim and I are expecting our first child this July, which is giving me a whole new appreciation for my work—not just as a policymaker, but as a soon-to-be dad.** We also recently adopted a puppy who was displaced by the fires, so I’ve pretty much gone fully domestic almost overnight.
At a time when it’s easy to feel discouraged or lose hope, I’m continually inspired by the young people I work with—whether it’s the kids at Camp Harmony or the students of LA Unified. I’m as committed as ever to the work of building a better future for all kids, now with an even more personal reason to double down.
More updates to come soon. For now—onward.
---
| [Donate to Camp Harmony](https://nickmelvoin.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e47425f168c0b7b00df186831&id=3d74503ddb&e=3cf484ad56)
---
|
---

I’m as committed as ever to the work of building a better future for all kids, now with an even more personal reason to double down. More updates to come soon. For now—onward. | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for School Board 2017 Officeholder Account1787 Tribute Road, Suite K, Sacramento, CA 95815Additional information is available at . Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or |

With only hours to go until our mid-month fundraising deadline, we’re reaching out to our committed supporters to ask for a favor: [_**can you chip in just $3?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105961302/539959397/339890710?amount=3&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MM3_250416_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzBhODJlNS0wMzFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M5o2M2qsrzgbSZvyOX06GOU-JpUHhbJZ6SgiSBSJEII=)

Right now, we’re $2,105 short of our $25,000 goal. We have to close this gap – and quickly. Here are 3 reasons why:
1. Senator Warner is a top GOP target. Republicans believe they can take back his seat to expand their majority in the Senate.

2. We need to be prepared for Elon Musk and his billionaire allies to spend whatever it takes to defeat Mark.

3. Unlike Republicans, Mark isn’t counting on billionaires to fund his reelection campaign. He counts on committed supporters like you to fuel this movement.

We know $3 might seem like it’s not enough to make an impact, but the truth is, donations from grassroots supporters like you make a _**big**_ difference. When hundreds of people step up, it adds up, and it gives us the resources we need to run a winning campaign and stop Elon Musk and Donald Trump.

[**_So, Derek, can we count on you to donate $3 before midnight tonight? name: Gary Sinise
subject: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xueijuIteknop5I0ITm9kn60kw&s=NBOJEIELJENJJDIK
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
------------------------------------------------------------
https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xueijuIteknop5I1ITm9kn60kw&s=NBOJEIELJENJJDIK

Friend,

Â

Itâs Gary Sinise here.

Â

You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY â but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders.

Â

I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005.Â

Â

Now, Iâm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.

Â

This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps.

Â

Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more? (https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xueijuIteknop5I2ITm9kn60kw&s=NBOJEIELJENJJDIK
Support the National Memorial Day Parade (https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xueijuIteknop5I3ITm9kn60kw&s=NBOJEIELJENJJDIK
https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xueijuIteknop5I4ITm9kn60kw&s=NBOJEIELJENJJDIK

The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macyâs Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade!

Â

That means that every dollar thatâs contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event.

Â

But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.Â

Â

Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xueijuIteknop5I5ITm9kn60kw&s=NBOJEIELJENJJDIK join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now. (https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xueijuIteknop5I6ITm9kn60kw&s=NBOJEIELJENJJDIK

Â

If youâve been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it.

Â

And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get.

Â

You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult.

Â

WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years.

Â

But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade.Â

Â

That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time.Â

Â

So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II â and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps â I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
Support the National Memorial Day Parade (https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xueijuIteknop5I7ITm9kn60kw&s=NBOJEIELJENJJDIK

And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

Â

On Memorial Day â not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year â please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms.

Â

Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veteransâ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country.

Â

I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more.

Â

Friend, thank you for your support of Americaâs heroes, and please â if youâre able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary. (https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xueijuIteknop5I8ITm9kn60kw&s=NBOJEIELJENJJDIK

clean_body: Please read the following message from our sponsor. Friend, Â Itâs Gary Sinise here. Â You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY â but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. Â I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005.Â Â Now, Iâm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. Â This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. Â Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more? ( Support the National Memorial Day Parade ( The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macyâs Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! Â That means that every dollar thatâs contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. Â But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.Â Â Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. * Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now. ( Â If youâve been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. Â And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. Â You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. Â WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. Â But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade.Â Â That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time.Â Â So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II â and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps â I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us. body:
President Trump made a bold claim:

“Social Security will not be touched, it will only be strengthened.”

**In case it isn’t clear by now, that’s a flat-out lie.**

In the past several months, Trump has unleashed Elon Musk and his DOGE buddies to close Social Security offices, shut down the phone lines and cut services that help our seniors get their hard-earned benefits.

Now, _The New York Times_ released a new report that Trump and Musk are trying to violate our privacy by collecting **314 pieces of data** about each and every American — including our Social Security numbers, disability statuses and even our bank account numbers.

Musk wants to consolidate our private information into one database — and _security experts are sounding the alarm._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105961575/539960134/-955580453?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.16_Musk-314_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGJjYmQ1ZC0wNDFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bmMv1_Bh-34ZRe_Fi5qOioNth0ntCBFgW0lTXWI6INk=) We should all be gravely concerned about this abuse of power — and this attempt to roll back the benefits that millions rely on.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: His nomination must be stopped
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I cannot allow this nomination to continue.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8486%2E5257348%2EKUFhCz)
Derek,
As a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, I have made it my mission to protect the rule of law, conduct rigorous oversight of the Department of Justice, and restore integrity to the courts.
**That’s why I cannot — under any circumstances — allow Donald Trump’s nomination of Ed Martin as U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia to advance.**
**_And it’s why I put a hold on his nomination._**
For the past few weeks, Ed Martin has served as Interim U.S. Attorney in the same role. He’s been a one-man wrecking ball — threatening perceived “enemies” of the Trump administration, firing career public servants for simply doing their jobs, using the powers of his office to deter free speech, and so much more.
But his troubling history goes back much longer than just the past few weeks. Martin was one of the leading advocates of the “Stop the Steal” movement. He even personally represented some of the same individuals who stormed the Capitol and attacked police officers on January 6th.
He’s also shown a blatant disregard for executing the duties of his office. In a post on X (formerly Twitter), Martin literally labeled the prosecutors in his office as “President Trump’s lawyers.”
Let me be clear about this, Derek: **Federal prosecutors are not Donald Trump’s lawyers. They are the people’s lawyers tasked with defending the Constitution, upholding the rule of law, and protecting our democracy — not serving the political whims of any one president.**
No one person represents Donald Trump’s weaponization of the Department of Justice more than Ed Martin. He is unfit to serve, which is why I placed a hold on his nomination and will block every attempt to jam through his appointment.
**[If you support my work alongside Senate Democrats to fight back against right-wing judges and Trump’s efforts to rig the system in his favor, add your name to my petition today →](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20250416-ed-martin.m4nnaz&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250416_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8486%2E5257348%2EKUFhCz)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20250416-ed-martin.m4nnaz&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250416_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8486%2E5257348%2EKUFhCz)
---
Thank you for standing with me. I’m prepared to use every ounce of my power to defend our Constitution and protect the rule of law.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5245?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250416_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=8486%2E5257348%2EKUFhCz)

clean_body: | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending Citizens United state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, If you would like to unsubscribe, Friend, As of 04/16/2025, we’ve attempted to contact you TWICE about your appointment to our House Advisor Committee. To be honest, we’re concerned. It’s incredibly urgent we start putting together our 2025 House Majority Strategy and figure out how to rebuild after the 2024 Elections. This gives us hope: The GOP only has a 5-seat majority — the narrowest majority in nearly 100 years. If we start working together now, we have a real chance to take back the House. But first, we need survey responses from real Democrats like you. This data is critical to formulating an effective plan. Our data for your city is incomplete so I’m asking once again. Can you take 3 minutes to help us formulate our 2026 House Strategy? | Thank you for participating! Fight for Reform —----------------FORWARDED MESSAGE---------------------------- | []() | ---|--- As one of the most informed and engaged Fight for Reform members in your area, you have been selected for this strategy interview today. Republicans have the House and Senate Majorities currently – YIKES!! But if they lose just a handful of seats, we can TAKE BACK the Majority and finally combat Donald Trump’s corruption and bring real reform to DC. That's why we need to develop a foolproof strategy NOW to take back the House! But this will only happen if we gather enough responses from smart Democrats like you. subject: Trump’s agenda is a disaster

body:
Trump’s reckless policies demand a strong response.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=08umMAS41hpy9mcg569Ry7aCKE85u2960eP0qjvVwBQpFD4CTYCqXrRQjb%2BH%2FI5Zp9jxXfLXFs1lYkFgTnYV5fzjKhnEvb0TztE5Dynt1K1P9i2cgitWqN6%2FxqNqcWzQ%2Fged7eTkfJeSVfWBjsCwwEx%2BL7GtoiaMehRTvjE6BMbMOrlg2ANEMeed8sHRoR8wGIminC6SgLjPEU1RIQrpiy9Rc31%2F6EHW0kvX0xAa0sdjTx3Y%2BoaVmUIb2afPEW%2BEaUi%2FVqgE8p7uDQumcp2bFZYz2wm7NpXrZOht4AAqWtFveOYGGnaV8cUxPj%2FOsrCvO6itXdW32QG1griivZ%2FY90Y1735e22pYqvkMaKAq1eP7tyUro4vjI6VfosCgwx3jHckW3DN8QjEfO84R9UPFuFCqtBCSc%2FoPQZ3nUare79o%3D)

Hey folks, it’s the team here at Vasquez HQ. Trump's economic policies are already hurting real people across the country, and Republicans in Congress aren't just ignoring the fallout — _they’re enabling it._ **Last week** , Trump’s reckless tariff stunt created chaos across our economy. And we’ve already seen the impact — millions of working families, small businesses, and retirees saw rising prices and shrinking retirement savings. **And this week** , the NRCC began spending BIG to pin the blame for House Republicans’ terrible policies on everyone but themselves. They’re pouring money right into this district to blame Gabe for Trump’s dangerous economic agenda. This is just the beginning. We know exactly what he and the Republicans in Congress will do if we don’t hold the line here in NM-02 and flip the House blue in 2026 — and that’s why it’s critical that we hit this goal. [Gabe is ready to fight against Trump’s disastrous economic agenda, but he needs your help to do it. We’ve set a goal to raise $8,000 before our mid-month deadline tomorrow at midnight. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hey folks, it’s the team here at Vasquez HQ. Trump's economic policies are already hurting real people across the country, and Republicans in Congress aren't just ignoring the fallout — they’re enabling it. Last week , Trump’s reckless tariff stunt created chaos across our economy. And we’ve already seen the impact — millions of working families, small businesses, and retirees saw rising prices and shrinking retirement savings. And this week , the NRCC began spending BIG to pin the blame for House Republicans’ terrible policies on everyone but themselves. They’re pouring money right into this district to blame Gabe for Trump’s dangerous economic agenda. This is just the beginning. We know exactly what he and the Republicans in Congress will do if we don’t hold the line here in NM-02 and flip the House blue in 2026 — and that’s why it’s critical that we hit this goal. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Vasquez | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. GOP Rep. Rich McCormick **[had a very heated exchange with CNN's Pamela Brown](https://substack.com/redirect/852e41b7-f8fd-48b5-86c2-5835d783a0ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during an interview, Wednesday, about the deportation of suspected MS-13 member Kilmar Abrego Garcia to El Salvador.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/852e41b7-f8fd-48b5-86c2-5835d783a0ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/852e41b7-f8fd-48b5-86c2-5835d783a0ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"We're just asking the important questions based on facts," Brown told McCormick. "If the administration is so confident in what it has done and that this person is a member of MS-13, why isn't it proving it in court? It's had ample opportunity!"
McCormick clearly answered, "In this case you have the President of on country agreeing with the President of another country that individual should stay there at this point,... he's not going to stay here either way!"
Brown pushed back, starting to say that the Supreme Court "agreed with the district judge saying that the U.S. administration,..."
**["No it did not!"](https://substack.com/redirect/852e41b7-f8fd-48b5-86c2-5835d783a0ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** McCormick interjected.
"Let me finish my sentence!" Brown fired back, upset. "I know you're trying to create a moment here..."
Watch the fiery CNN battle here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/852e41b7-f8fd-48b5-86c2-5835d783a0ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# _LIVE:_ Karoline Leavitt appears alongside mother of Rachel Morin, victim of illegal immigrant rape/killing
_" She no longer has her daughter, because of the Democrat Party's failed open border..."_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8ad1f6c4-c05f-4f69-b909-5d418599f543?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
A Maryland jury convicted Victor Antonio Martinez-Hernandez, a 24-year-old illegal immigrant from El Salvador, of first-degree murder, first-degree rape, third-degree sexual offense, and kidnapping in the August 2023 killing of Rachel Morin, a 37-year-old mother of five. The verdict, reached in under an hour on April 14, 2025, followed a nine-day trial in Harford County Circuit Court, where DNA evidence linked Martinez-Hernandez to the crime scene.
[Read More](https://substack.com/redirect/2d6d3387-4574-49e8-837a-f891a35ca1f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

---|---|---
If you're 50 or older and looking for a conservative alternative to AARP, now's the perfect time to make the switch.
AMAC - the Association of Mature American Citizens - is America's fastest-growing senior organization, and right now, they're offering a **[FREE membership](https://substack.com/redirect/74c27dd0-d1a2-4119-8a0d-e5f28ac8375f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for a limited time. That's right - no credit card, no strings attached.
With AMAC, you'll be part of a community that shares your values: faith, family, and freedom. Members enjoy access to exclusive benefits, including:
* **Money-saving discounts** on travel, insurance, and everyday essentials
* The **AMAC Magazine** , packed with news and insights from a conservative perspective
* Updates on the issues that matter most to you - like Social Security, Medicare, Border Security, and more!
* A chance to get involved through **AMAC Action** , their grassroots advocacy network

Whether you're looking to save money, stay informed, or make a difference, AMAC is here for you - and now it won't cost you a dime to get started.

No pressure. No politics you don't agree with. Just real benefits for real Americans.

# **Marjorie Taylor Greene TAKES ON radical protesters when CHAOS strikes at town hall**
Georgia Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene **[faced several outburst from hecklers and protesters](https://substack.com/redirect/891c8771-5b3a-4974-bdfa-e81216d704e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at her town hall event in her district, Tuesday night.
"The protest is outside! Bye, have fun out there," Greene waived to protesters being ushered out of the venue by police.
"This is a peaceful town hall,... this should not have to happen!" she later said as police had to tase a man to the ground who refused to leave after a disruption.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/891c8771-5b3a-4974-bdfa-e81216d704e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: We are suing to stop Trump’s tariffs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Donald Trump does not have the legal authority to unilaterally impose the largest tax hike of our lifetime with his destructive tariffs.

California is the largest manufacturing and agricultural state in the country as well as one of the largest trading partners around the globe.
President Trump’s unlawful tariffs are wreaking chaos on California families, businesses, and our economy — driving up prices and threatening jobs.
No state will be impacted more than California when it comes to the unilateral authority being asserted by the Trump administration to impose the largest tax increase in modern American history.
That is why -- earlier today -- California became the first state to file a lawsuit to stop Trump's tariffs, and we think it's on very sound grounds.
**[Watch more here:](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4151?t=1&akid=2323%2E4767699%2Eb0lBKw)**
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4151?t=2&akid=2323%2E4767699%2Eb0lBKw)
Donald Trump does not have the legal authority to unilaterally impose the largest tax hike of our lifetime with his destructive tariffs.
We're going to fight him on this.
Gavin Newsom

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: What I told Jen Psaki on MSNBC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=224%2E181023%2Egt22A6)
Hi there — I joined Jen Psaki on _MSNBC_ this week to talk about the terrible attack on PA Governor Josh Shapiro’s home over the weekend while he and his family were home after celebrating Passover.
This is personal to me for several reasons. My home was targeted by armed protestors while my young son and I were home. It’s scary, and it’s not ok.
I started my career investigating anti-semitism and neo-Nazis throughout the country. I’ve seen the dangerous impacts of hateful ideologies, investigated where they emerge, and worked to defeat them to protect our communities.
But perhaps most importantly, this attack was on a family dedicated to public service. This violence is deeply disturbing and an unfortunate reminder of what far too many leaders have endured in this political era.
**We need to change the tides. The hate and divisiveness of this moment are unraveling the values of our country, and we need to come together to fight back.**
We need to remember that we used to disagree without being disagreeable, and we can do that again. We should not need to be defined by violence and hate in our politics. We need to move forward, united by our shared commitment to bettering our communities and our country.
These are important reminders for us all.
Thank you,
Jocelyn Benson
| [DONATE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20250416_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=224%2E181023%2Egt22A6)
---

Peter, On Saturday, we kicked off our first set of People’s Town Halls in Bloomington and New Albany. The turnout was tremendous with over 300 Hoosiers coming out between our first two events. **Your support and enthusiasm made them so successful!**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105962856/539965154/1790261172?refcode=250416townhallsyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjRiZTliNS0wNzFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JpYoVQ4KCIalbB1z1DPNdu7dpC0pf0sf5Y4OHp8fpTU=)****[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105962857/539965155/1790261172?refcode=250416townhallsyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjRiZTliNS0wNzFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JpYoVQ4KCIalbB1z1DPNdu7dpC0pf0sf5Y4OHp8fpTU=)** Our panelists, including State Senator Shelli Yoder, State Rep. Matt Pierce, Bloomington City Clerk Nicole Bolden, Charlestown Mayor Treva Hodges, New Albany City Councilman Adam Dickey, and Bloomington City Councilwoman Hopi Stosberg joined Chair Karen Tallian and moderator Dave Crooks. They all helped answer Hoosier questions and lay out what’s at stake in Indiana and beyond. We will keep showing up over the next weeks and months, all across our beautiful state. Important: Open Senate seats are the best opportunity to hold and grow our Republican Majority so we can continue enacting the Trump agenda. We have 'Open Seat Funds' already set up to support the eventual Republican nominees in many states. Please donate right now to KEEP THE SENATE RED! We can't let Democrats derail the historic and Nation-saving work Republicans are doing in the United States Senate to support and protect President Trump and his administration. If we lose the Senate, President Trump's term effectively will be cut in half. Thank you! Team,

It’s Sean Casten here, and I’ve proudly represented Illinois’ 6th Congressional District since 2019. I was elected during the 2018, defeating a 7-term Republican incumbent who refused to meet with his constituents. That is why I was excited to partner with the IDCCA when they suggested hosting town halls in Republican controlled areas.

This past weekend I traveled to Dixon and Carterville to talk with voters about issues that matter to them. I believe that all elected officials should hold themselves accountable to the voters who elected them. Voters in the Illinois 12th & 16th districts have never had any opportunities to ask questions and get answers from their Members of Congress. And national Republicans have openly discouraged in-person town halls. **If my Republican colleagues are too afraid of their constituents to talk to them, then I’m happy to do it for them.**

I know a movement is building throughout Illinois and our country. The evidence was on display earlier this month during our municipal elections. That is why I’m excited to be partnering with the IDCCA. To help harness this energy to get good people elected. [**If you want to support their mission and ensure we’re supporting Democrats at every level right now, you can make a split contribution now between IDCCA and my re-election campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105962873/539965283/-1610733762?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_160425_FR_Casten&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2MyNTNmZDYtMDcxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bofEyACzCvylJTw5DY9ah75H6CCHHI4m56ZGidZu6ko=)

clean_body: = Team, It’s Sean Casten here, and I’ve proudly represented Illinois’ 6th Congressional District since 2019. I was elected during the 2018, defeating a 7-term Republican incumbent who refused to meet with his constituents. That is why I was excited to partner with the IDCCA when they suggested hosting town halls in Republican controlled areas. This past weekend I traveled to Dixon and Carterville to talk with voters about issues that matter to them. I believe that all elected officials should hold themselves accountable to the voters who elected them. Voters in the Illinois 12th & 16th districts have never had any opportunities to ask questions and get answers from their Members of Congress. And national Republicans have openly discouraged in-person town halls. If my Republican colleagues are too afraid of their constituents to talk to them, then I’m happy to do it for them. I know a movement is building throughout Illinois and our country. The evidence was on display earlier this month during our municipal elections. That is why I’m excited to be partnering with the IDCCA. To help harness this energy to get good people elected. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = in 2026 and taking back the House will mean meeting folks where they are, and hearing about what’s important to them. Once we take the House, we’ll be able to go a step further and take real action on fixing those issues. That’s something Republicans are failing to do in their attempt to cater to Trump and his extremism. We can win at all levels in 2026, but it will mean a long term investment in building our Democratic Party. name: Robert Garcia
subject: Taking on Marjorie Taylor Green and Congressional Stock Trading
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105962900/539965314/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDQ4MWNkZC0wNzFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h4jgx6FdNU8PkeJkjj5r_uLuwtZ1W4pxt7eaDvPu7B0=)
Friends,
Why is Marjorie Taylor Greene trading stocks right before Donald Trump’s tariff pause announcements?
We all know how close MTG is to Trump. So we have to ask: **What exactly did he tell her about his plans?**
Whether or not this crosses the line into insider trading is for the Ethics Committee to decide. But the fact that we even have to ask the question says a lot about the state of accountability in Congress.
Let me be clear, Friend: I don’t trade stock.
Why? Because public officials speculating in the market erodes public trust. That’s why I’ve been a consistent voice for a **total ban on Members of Congress trading stock.**
This stance hasn’t made me many friends among the billionaires and corporate donors bankrolling campaigns, including folks like Elon Musk. That’s why I depend on small-dollar donors to power this campaign. In fact, our average contribution is just $27.
**[Will you chip in today to help us fight back against the billionaires and demand real accountability in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105962901/539965315/-813591468?refcode2=1d481cdd-071b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&refcode=em250416&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDQ4MWNkZC0wNzFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h4jgx6FdNU8PkeJkjj5r_uLuwtZ1W4pxt7eaDvPu7B0=)**

[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105962902/539965316/-813591468?refcode2=1d481cdd-071b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&refcode=em250416&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDQ4MWNkZC0wNzFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h4jgx6FdNU8PkeJkjj5r_uLuwtZ1W4pxt7eaDvPu7B0=)

Together, we can stand up to self-dealing politicians like Marjorie Taylor Greene who use their positions, and their proximity to power, to get rich.
I’m not here to make friends on Wall Street. I’m here to fight for you. Let’s keep pushing for a ban on congressional stock trading and for a government that puts the public interest first.
Let's go,
Robert

* * *
Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress

name: Autism Health Inc.
subject: A Powerful Weekend at The AHS Conference - Stay Tuned
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Thank you to everyone who supported and followed the **2025 Autism Health Summit.** What an incredible and inspiring weekend it was. From passionate speakers to heartfelt connections and powerful education, the energy in the room and online was undeniable. We’re excited to share that the **Autism Health Summit will return next year** to the **Town & Country Resort in San Diego**. While dates are still being finalized, our **tentative dates are April 16–18, 2026**. We hope you plan to join us once again as we continue to unite, educate, and advocate for the autism community. For those who attended **virtually or in-person** , the **conference recordings will be sent out by the end of next week** so you can revisit the powerful talks and share them with others who need to hear this message. For those who were unable to attend, the conference recordings will be made available for purchase. We were honored to begin the summit with a **special message from Secretary of Health and Human Services, Robert F. Kennedy Jr.** , who addressed attendees with both compassion and urgency. You can watch his full video message **[HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=a49950db9a&e=3a42edfdc4). **At a press conference today, Kennedy acknowledged the staggering new CDC statistics of **1 in 31 children now diagnosed with autism **and emphasized that we are faced with a true epidemic that demands attention, accountability, and action. As many of you may have seen, NBC News published an article about the summit. I’ve written a full response to the article on my Substack, which you can read **[HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=7fe4f84572&e=3a42edfdc4)**. Please feel free to share. While we welcome open dialogue, it’s disheartening to see our voices dismissed and misrepresented. The Autism Health Summit was created to give families access to the research, resources, and real stories that are often silenced. We believe informed parents, scientific inquiry, and truth should never be controversial. At Autism Health Inc., we remain committed to **advocating for truth** , **standing up for justice** , and **exploring the most effective healing modalities** to address **environmental toxins** and the **underlying conditions affecting our children**. Thank you for your **unwavering support**. You are the reason this movement continues to grow. Together, we will keep pushing forward until every family has the answers, care, and support they deserve.
---
|
---
| **Autism Health Inc.**
**501(c)(3) Nonprofit Organization
San Diego, CA**
**[www.AutismHealth.com](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=7293e4f2bd&e=3a42edfdc4)**

subject: My situation is in your hands, Fellow Patriot.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea.

I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---

clean_body: I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. | | | | | | | | My situation is in your hands, Fellow Patriot. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously,a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Fellow Patriot. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Fellow Patriot, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. "I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!" If you can't afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, "please keep me and my team in your prayers and add your endorsement today:" I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments.

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas measles outbreak could last 12 months, experts say, risking U.S. elimination status,** " Dallas Morning News' **Emily Brindley** \-- "The measles outbreak that began in West Texas more than two months ago could continue [spreading and growing](https://substack.com/redirect/3590430b-c135-466b-a112-75af8a9f1995?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for months to come, according to health experts.

The outbreak has already caused the state to report more measles cases in the first few months of this year than in any full year since 1992. There have been 561 cases reported in Texas, plus dozens of additional cases in two neighboring states.

Health officials have also reported the deaths of [two unvaccinated children](https://substack.com/redirect/06c6e6a3-1670-4aa4-a36a-c19747b3085e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/89f1c6c3-8a8d-445d-8ae7-78e63a35eb28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Local health officials have reported a measles case in Rockwall County, possibly connected to the [West Texas outbreak](https://substack.com/redirect/ae5a5d1f-625b-4890-949b-8546741ab2b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

The county's health authority [issued a public health alert](https://substack.com/redirect/0d3dc824-a2c3-49fa-aff7-d9377e125dc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about the confirmed case. The illness was confirmed in an adult who recently traveled to West Texas, according to the health alert. The case was reported last week, the alert said, and the person has recovered and is no longer contagious.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/89f1c6c3-8a8d-445d-8ae7-78e63a35eb28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It's difficult to predict how long the outbreak could last, health experts said. But Lubbock's public health director, **Katherine Wells** , worries it could be many more months still.

"I'm really thinking this is going to be a year long in order to ... get through this entire outbreak," Wells said in a mid-March news briefing.

Other health experts, while hesitant to give an exact timeframe, agreed the outbreak still has a long time left.

"I don't think this thing is anywhere near over yet," said Dr. Greg Poland, a vaccinologist, in late March.

Measles was declared eliminated in the U.S. in 2000. The World Health Organization defines measles elimination as the "absence of endemic measles transmission" for at least 12 months. That means the U.S. could [lose its elimination status](https://substack.com/redirect/d34aff4c-f5b9-4666-97e5-37e775bb7983?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) if a measles outbreak lasts longer than a year.

"We are almost certainly going to lose that," Poland said. "In that sense from a public health view, we are going backwards. And that will hurt people."" [DMN](https://substack.com/redirect/d834b38f-7803-4ca9-80d9-5b1df71c72fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

TOP NEWS "Texas measles outbreak could last 12 months, experts say, risking U.S. elimination status, " Dallas Morning News' Emily Brindley \-- "The measles outbreak that began in West Texas more than two months ago could continue for months to come, according to health experts. The outbreak has already caused the state to report more measles cases in the first few months of this year than in any full year since 1992. There have been 561 cases reported in Texas, plus dozens of additional cases in two neighboring states. Health officials have also reported the deaths of . Local health officials have reported a measles case in Rockwall County, possibly connected to the . The county's health authority about the confirmed case. The illness was confirmed in an adult who recently traveled to West Texas, according to the health alert. The case was reported last week, the alert said, and the person has recovered and is no longer contagious. It's difficult to predict how long the outbreak could last, health experts said. But Lubbock's public health director, Katherine Wells , worries it could be many more months still. "I'm really thinking this is going to be a year long in order to ... get through this entire outbreak," Wells said in a mid-March news briefing. Other health experts, while hesitant to give an exact timeframe, agreed the outbreak still has a long time left. "I don't think this thing is anywhere near over yet," said Dr. Greg Poland, a vaccinologist, in late March. Measles was declared eliminated in the U.S. in 2000. The World Health Organization defines measles elimination as the "absence of endemic measles transmission" for at least 12 months. That means the U.S. could if a measles outbreak lasts longer than a year. "We are almost certainly going to lose that," Poland said. "In that sense from a public health view, we are going backwards. And that will hurt people."" ($) FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. "**Texas measles outbreak could last 12 months, experts say, risking U.S. elimination status,** ” Dallas Morning News' **Emily Brindley** \-- "The measles outbreak that began in West Texas more than two months ago could continue [spreading and growing](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eOQPXJLmqZGCIlkWp25_d_lRU4DKWv0hqCiezum2AJdrgSrNVHzig7VMMWW1o80FBFj4PECUM8pJMo3lBotdX_ebSVC4LRxj8JlondD7ml77ol2uVrtWfsFuBSSGSi-uxRAY4TiGcrfX2KJ9fkQS7yPB5B3iBzHXzM5wOjVMVsmwjj8Zyx_sHS1BB46tu_BpmADkNl-7YSm86Wg9qjqPA4LMXVvkW-7QjsqX6MF3wS9-uW7SgEEj98GpPXtzK7nzMETSq-KEW5N7IOp0SuLzQaTwpKh2wI5KsupI4kEN_svLWML2DgXuKfufL9LagTsP9RFwC4KM5i1ef49B9kKTx1MZBtA4VeXZW_7UuoLntHQBYkfaf0INCXONiLpqwg1sEfzSYGGQ1aywsUMQEcRWiLNVo3wV7pjDZ9rY13eZBOWXDZS7lrh5NsSJ7sYQpGVMbbFxMjiM6my0ZMRk-Ui9dZw/4fp/HH-kCV_8RYmQyUW57cYumQ/h12/h001.x8t7XN_K8WSXFtsNljPUOhDw4VVW7YBNatkbLOp9N0c) for months to come, according to health experts.

The outbreak has already caused the state to report more measles cases in the first few months of this year than in any full year since 1992. There have been 561 cases reported in Texas, plus dozens of additional cases in two neighboring states.

Health officials have also reported the deaths of [two unvaccinated children](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eOQPXJLmqZGCIlkWp25_d_lRU4DKWv0hqCiezum2AJdrJTndBVVYYn4PJEjYrfHHyvpFvvmQbeW-YZ89wuHlRLA9zf4CbRb6ex14sY5hFMDtsSihtBiq2xtwqMyBzYMRh7w8Ne7RzpbY6tKX2wVTPsHT8c8ClxkSnaathSu3GjyOm1fiEmJGQHJaDf-TinQYJzKQQ2Wx21rVzGjWncGekzfODCY_FeZmTBcm_1uCxpfp_lcMWRccapcUpKMPigWCl8FsQy6iYzV8iQQzS2RKgGlBBFOhepq9QDWq4lbYEW8XpTdZnqZfCxu4UJbz1qoYgBKBK2XPMxpL5r8ppWQFd6oFQKKUsXyXDMcapzWuBBSsvoQHlzuJFof3Lky4bI9P4T8NRLFtq5ocTEgiqNkNQz90CzsHn4i3Gh6ZUVFo6bgd4bIk_-sj28BsUGbAW9CWamBphmYL9AddGAvjePNz1830Jwmexk-zmkMHZcAk8Kkqin6GK0ns5oH3nYbQOgAfuzCQjiOlSmZ0etjibvFVSj3Oz32RmJAF-UokskcGQnlqZCenGdva50nEod3WI4PeUQ/4fp/HH-kCV_8RYmQyUW57cYumQ/h13/h001.YgzugsD0FISYalJ7n_wkbIaNzrsm-9ckJH0nELnHgt4).

It’s difficult to predict how long the outbreak could last, health experts said. But Lubbock’s public health director, **Katherine Wells** , worries it could be many more months still.

“I’m really thinking this is going to be a year long in order to ... get through this entire outbreak,” Wells said in a mid-March news briefing.

Other health experts, while hesitant to give an exact timeframe, agreed the outbreak still has a long time left.

“I don’t think this thing is anywhere near over yet,” said Dr. Greg Poland, a vaccinologist, in late March.

Measles was declared eliminated in the U.S. in 2000. The World Health Organization defines measles elimination as the “absence of endemic measles transmission” for at least 12 months. That means the U.S. could [lose its elimination status](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eLe2WtF4jQodAdHf9P-RPJRnyYVsT-p_6ywXFnSJdgRdYYfY6TkmUPxS92M0ysce5VLWF9dynTjGHQezkM_rftniJHG4DVG23JqJCdRKgKQpgVQH4aqEjPdTZin3xfB1evYTNiqiMxysBlqhuTzoHoeTkCMgvyRzTvFdefLkMPMXVTy8Zb4Na6g0KqFmioyyl2cVdfaAP7Agu_Pq4JpC6Uwog5AUaDTpfdYr8InQRwLgY4TcKFBkdkJQIYOEHAOEZLBH_Tt4zfE6JEI7RMatrvmUukDujWrgZ2j_yNFthqFs7a5G4UWLjlGsryj-RPOFk0vSZImsuXpjcftEuj9asAkhdnfAQ6x7QwIQdudPqmzlAHQM1rkNUhAuEKquniE9QyRMd5mlGPnV_cjcNRkQGRjCFoKp-64eF9tTbU12UsNsd-p2sZrGPqgLVkRoYIX5K1CeVMil_U_iWyCpp4vKFipNsFyqJs3wHzEH7ygP5lrlQZe_49zQEBhEZacfJlbajA/4fp/HH-kCV_8RYmQyUW57cYumQ/h18/h001.Q72rd7nECUqrUOim6JpjSlI-MwKKt9oc9Ya0MD-VqhA) if a measles outbreak lasts longer than a year.

The outbreak has already caused the state to report more measles cases in the first few months of this year than in any full year since 1992. There have been 561 cases reported in Texas, plus dozens of additional cases in two neighboring states. Health officials have also reported the deaths of . » Local health officials have reported a measles case in Rockwall County, possibly connected to the . The case was reported last week, the alert said, and the person has recovered and is no longer contagious. » It’s difficult to predict how long the outbreak could last, health experts said.
