* **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas measles outbreak could last 12 months, experts say, risking U.S. elimination status,** " Dallas Morning News' **Emily Brindley** \-- "The measles outbreak that began in West Texas more than two months ago could continue [spreading and growing](https://substack.com/redirect/f51db7f1-db4d-4d0e-aebc-8b1dfa370989?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for months to come, according to health experts.

The outbreak has already caused the state to report more measles cases in the first few months of this year than in any full year since 1992. There have been 561 cases reported in Texas, plus dozens of additional cases in two neighboring states.

Health officials have also reported the deaths of [two unvaccinated children](https://substack.com/redirect/81ade9d3-6d74-4052-aaa1-3d2f568e9b00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/b5b7a229-35d7-45ec-b80b-e6cf794d117b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Local health officials have reported a measles case in Rockwall County, possibly connected to the [West Texas outbreak](https://substack.com/redirect/c5bc4496-1679-4d21-ad4d-31717a4b8599?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

The county's health authority [issued a public health alert](https://substack.com/redirect/3108d2cd-52f6-4c05-83b4-c112b97b121e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about the confirmed case. The illness was confirmed in an adult who recently traveled to West Texas, according to the health alert. The case was reported last week, the alert said, and the person has recovered and is no longer contagious.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/b5b7a229-35d7-45ec-b80b-e6cf794d117b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It's difficult to predict how long the outbreak could last, health experts said. But Lubbock's public health director, **Katherine Wells** , worries it could be many more months still.

"I'm really thinking this is going to be a year long in order to ... get through this entire outbreak," Wells said in a mid-March news briefing.

Other health experts, while hesitant to give an exact timeframe, agreed the outbreak still has a long time left.

"I don't think this thing is anywhere near over yet," said Dr. Greg Poland, a vaccinologist, in late March.

Measles was declared eliminated in the U.S. in 2000. The World Health Organization defines measles elimination as the "absence of endemic measles transmission" for at least 12 months. That means the U.S. could [lose its elimination status](https://substack.com/redirect/e2326576-42aa-416f-8182-7b81841366fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) if a measles outbreak lasts longer than a year.

"We are almost certainly going to lose that," Poland said. "In that sense from a public health view, we are going backwards. And that will hurt people."" [DMN](https://substack.com/redirect/5ac82998-3338-48c3-8a41-1286af4ede8a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

TOP NEWS "Texas measles outbreak could last 12 months, experts say, risking U.S. elimination status, " Dallas Morning News' Emily Brindley \-- "The measles outbreak that began in West Texas more than two months ago could continue for months to come, according to health experts. The outbreak has already caused the state to report more measles cases in the first few months of this year than in any full year since 1992. There have been 561 cases reported in Texas, plus dozens of additional cases in two neighboring states. Health officials have also reported the deaths of . Local health officials have reported a measles case in Rockwall County, possibly connected to the . The county's health authority about the confirmed case. The illness was confirmed in an adult who recently traveled to West Texas, according to the health alert. The case was reported last week, the alert said, and the person has recovered and is no longer contagious. It's difficult to predict how long the outbreak could last, health experts said. But Lubbock's public health director, Katherine Wells , worries it could be many more months still. "I'm really thinking this is going to be a year long in order to ... get through this entire outbreak," Wells said in a mid-March news briefing. Other health experts, while hesitant to give an exact timeframe, agreed the outbreak still has a long time left. "I don't think this thing is anywhere near over yet," said Dr. Greg Poland, a vaccinologist, in late March. Measles was declared eliminated in the U.S. in 2000. The World Health Organization defines measles elimination as the "absence of endemic measles transmission" for at least 12 months. That means the U.S. could if a measles outbreak lasts longer than a year. "We are almost certainly going to lose that," Poland said. "In that sense from a public health view, we are going backwards. And that will hurt people."" ($) FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. Free subscribers will need to become paid subscribers to receive full story summaries. name: Justice Democrats
subject: Targeted solely for speaking out against genocide
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Donald Trump’s administration has illegally disappeared another
Palestinian activist, Peter. We
have to pay attention to this chilling escalation of fascism in America.

Mohsen Mahdawi is a student organizer and co-founder of the Palestinian
Student Union at Columbia University, where he worked to lead
pro-Palestine demonstrations demanding an end to the genocide in Gaza.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250416-free-mohsen-mahdawi/?source=em20250416-36591&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&akid=36591%2E1203867%2EdQ-mZg ]New York Times headline which reads "Columbia Activist Arrested by ICE
at His Appointment for Citizenship". Subhead reads: "Mohsen Mahdawi,a
legal permanent resident, has lived in the United States for 10 years and
was arrested in Vermont. He has not been charged with a crime.

Mohsen went to an immigration office for what should have been the final
step in his citizenship process. Instead, he was illegally arrested by
plainclothes officers who refused to explain where they were taking him or
what would happen to him.

This is an attack on our right to dissent in a democracy and on immigrant
communities. Mohsen is being targeted because he spoke out against
genocide — and if they can get away with disappearing him, no one who
fights for justice is safe.

Now, it’s time for action. We need a grassroots movement to call for an
end to this authoritarianism.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250416-free-mohsen-mahdawi/?source=em20250416-36591&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&akid=36591%2E1203867%2EdQ-mZg ]Add your name to demand the immediate release of Mohsen Mahdawi and an
end to the racist targeting of Palestinian activists.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250416-free-mohsen-mahdawi/?source=em20250416-36591&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&akid=36591%2E1203867%2EdQ-mZg ]ADD YOUR NAME

In solidarity,

– Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250416-36591-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36591_1203867_dQ-mZg&akid=36591%2E1203867%2EdQ-mZg

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36591%2E1203867%2EdQ-mZg

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Trump is openly defying the courts.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
This is a dangerous, slippery slope.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105964079/539969190/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250416courts_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTExZjMwYi0wYzFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D_7olnvGmp6Lv4QKUOXQeQmL2qBkQBLM-g1OXI46J-A=) Peter,

The US must bring Kilmar Abrego Garcia home.

If you missed it, last month, this husband and father was **wrongfully** sent to El Salvador to a notorious mega prison called CECOT, which is known for being violent and overcrowded. The Trump administration admitted in court that this mistake was an “administrative error,” and it happened despite Garcia never being charged with a crime and with a court order protecting him from deportation.

Now, **Trump is openly defying the Supreme Court** , which ordered his Administration to facilitate the return of Garcia to his family. Meanwhile, Republicans in Congress, who supposedly believe in “law and order,” _are silent._

**This is a dangerous, slippery slope for our Constitutional order and the rights of all American citizens.**

The Trump administration is pushing us closer to a constitutional crisis than ever before. We must continue to fight back with everything we can.

Onward,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?
---

name: Texas Organizing Project PAC
subject: Look at what Trump is trying to do in TX →
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, toppac
body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=ZoTMmUwI7DRUJ%2FIsF%2BejL0rgWx6SFuMUhh4io%2FiG4%2BMjvFs21lFY%2BX%2BeRWylBe2HHQIKcsFMSX0uGzCiRze2P%2F%2FKO3huG5WXtZcNrBzqzy1RIzgBjMwC8WXPSM8h9obBUCJ7uOMfhssIjGhONdPcmRmo3d3VrOxJXI2gB1K1l0lyWzxyRizWHwOWX%2Bfn6StdVmJhA8mQ76FbgLP5lY3ZqXtDTR%2Bi%2FaDAjBJcplVjVF11fkZt46zJt8kVKEwe9gjeGbe3mV7Dhc8SkTEsftCs3WpvQ44SQls1nt9hW6TFjO1DgRXILgscHbu4pKN3EtPSBbulIlSaSuQFq5jg%2FwOMQQQZwHb0E%2BWQp2CMmXYrKE71mMtyoQ3KyZX2CWnrxrq1yKA2HCcnPQVctUnkyLenAur98yjqqaOC70T9y68UuKw%3D]

# [#]
Peter, have you seen this? Trump wants to TAKE AWAY money from our public schools. He even CALLED the Texas Republicans to convince them to support Governor Abbott’s school voucher scam!

Texas School vouchers war erupts as GOP, Dems dig in at State Capitol
Abbott met with the Texas House GOP Caucus ahead of the hearing with the support of Trump, who encouraged GOP lawmakers via speakerphone.
- CHRON

We need to fight back NOW. Can you rush a contribution to help us send the message that Trump should get his hands off our public education system?

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em?amount=10&refcode=SBD_TOP_EM_FR_041725_VOUCHERRR_90DO_D1_S1

Trump thinks that if he steps in, he can get Abbott’s school voucher SCAM to become a reality for Texas. Abbott has already spent MILLIONS trying to pass the program which would disproportionately hurt Black and Latino students and families.

Tax payer dollars should go to PUBLIC schools and institutions – not private and parochial schools. It’s an affront to our education system, and an insult to tax payers.

If Republicans have their way, our kids will suffer, and the damage to our schools will be hard to undo. We have to act now, before it’s too late. Will you please chip in? Any amount helps us fight back → http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em?amount=10&refcode=SBD_TOP_EM_FR_041725_VOUCHERRR_90DO_D1_S1

Thanks for standing up,

clean_body: Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] Peter, have you seen this? Trump wants to TAKE AWAY money from our public schools. He even CALLED the Texas Republicans to convince them to support Governor Abbott’s school voucher scam! Texas School vouchers war erupts as GOP, Dems dig in at State Capitol Abbott met with the Texas House GOP Caucus ahead of the hearing with the support of Trump, who encouraged GOP lawmakers via speakerphone. - CHRON We need to fight back NOW. Can you rush a contribution to help us send the message that Trump should get his hands off our public education system? Trump thinks that if he steps in, he can get Abbott’s school voucher SCAM to become a reality for Texas. Abbott has already spent MILLIONS trying to pass the program which would disproportionately hurt Black and Latino students and families. Tax payer dollars should go to PUBLIC schools and institutions – not private and parochial schools. It’s an affront to our education system, and an insult to tax payers. If Republicans have their way, our kids will suffer, and the damage to our schools will be hard to undo. We have to act now, before it’s too late. Will you please chip in? Any amount helps us fight back → Thanks for standing up, Texas Organizing Project PAC [] [] [] [] [] Texas Organizing Project PAC runs the largest, independent get-out-the-vote political field programs in Texas, focusing on expanding the electorate of color, with an emphasis on turning out Black and Latino voters. To date, TOP PAC has mobilized hundreds of thousands of voters across the state with the aim of transforming Texas and building a reflective democracy — one that looks like us and shares our values. name: Katie Porter for Governor
subject: just $20.47

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39642%2E3422442%2ED3ydgH)
Dear Derek,
Every campaign Katie’s ever run has been funded by grassroots support—and this campaign is no different.
**In fact, our average donation this month is just $20.47!**
We’re proud of that number, but the truth is that in a big state like California, winning a race can take tens of millions of dollars.
Unlike other candidates, we reject money from corporations, lobbyists, and executives at Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Banks.
That means the only way we’re going to elect Katie as California’s next governor is with folks like you chipping in $20.47 or whatever you can.
**[So please, will you consider making a donation to our campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250416_1_ak?refcode=em20250416-39642&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39642_3422442_D3ydgH&akid=39642%2E3422442%2ED3ydgH)**

Thanks for considering,
Team KP

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250416-39642&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39642_3422442_D3ydgH&akid=39642%2E3422442%2ED3ydgH)**

subject: Fighting for working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
| Americans across the country are standing up against Trump and using their voices to take to the streets and protest the undermining of our democracy. But our work is not over, which is why we need your support now.

**_[Read more from Bonnie below, and click here to support our work by rushing $10 or any amount before our crucial deadline TOMORROW at midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105964284/539969885/-1705718601?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250416_FR_MMFR_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_MMFR2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTQyNWUyNy0wZDFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yBV04rzfPCSjx2ZXsQ16c1uQEFFIhB1PDXuBacUK0sc=)_**
* * *
**_Begin forwarded message:_**

We have a lot to be proud of this month. My friend Cory Booker broke the record for his longest speech on the Congress floor, protesting Trump and this Administration’s despicable actions, and I was so proud to be there.

I joined hundreds of Americans last weekend at the Hands Off Democracy rallies, urging against the undermining of our democracy by Trump and Musk. The American people are tired of incompetent governing. And our work is not over.

**_[Can you rush a donation of $10 or any amount before our deadline in the next 72 hours? We need all hands on deck to fight back against this Administration.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105964285/539969886/-1705718601?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250416_FR_MMFR_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_MMFR2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTQyNWUyNy0wZDFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yBV04rzfPCSjx2ZXsQ16c1uQEFFIhB1PDXuBacUK0sc=)_**

Donald Trump ran on the promise that he would make things easier for working families and cut costs — but in reality, he’s done the opposite. Making severe cuts to Medicaid and other programs that millions of Americans rely on will negatively impact our communities’ quality of life and health.

These atrocities cannot go ignored. We need your help to keep on fighting back and take a stand against Republican incompetence. You deserve a government that fights for you, not one that puts more money into the hands of billionaires.

body:
Someone needs to tell the Democrats | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b270e63b0fbb46d8af034b1807059799&_e=iyoKNeEzjWUFtQy650WZ4k39haMCbMgbjDyu4CowAfg5fe9Kat8mdBRF1KZqMaNornQzDcVfi-QnJC1y_uBWpS1BJGX24hMfKiZ4pg2vrj-g9dMUjS9ya5_LR9ZJLC1lnLM4G3zIut9CN6CnceEoHtDh9OzbEL-d9XLJM2sQojhNnDJk3Or7dlvb27eRv7xQQWVITGhYu-lDVeJfnYtB83v_1ve5hZ1FnOMRJIu6XZb1_3bxK8lbB33TamR854Yov8nUhH-iU5Xnd_7OuyhYCfTzamESYs6LkkDBiZolGR3cXsIP2MzBgnW35CcinFK-WGR3YgkZ0emWE7FYVjahEA%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

**April 16 is Emancipation Day. That means that 163 years ago, President Lincoln signed into law the DC Compensated Emancipation Act,** which freed the slaves and signaled a new America where freedom and prosperity would be available to all.

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b270e63b0fbb46d8af034b1807059799&_e=iyoKNeEzjWUFtQy650WZ4k39haMCbMgbjDyu4CowAfg5fe9Kat8mdBRF1KZqMaNornQzDcVfi-QnJC1y_uBWpS1BJGX24hMfKiZ4pg2vrj-g9dMUjS9ya5_LR9ZJLC1lnLM4G3zIut9CN6CnceEoHtDh9OzbEL-d9XLJM2sQojhNnDJk3Or7dlvb27eRv7xQVR-xqmbmI1Rait5tdEbkZFT_0UWLaejCAQsr9DQDOa1NZVUU_uJ552b-5utgOOHrpc418xpI2UMxPDQdBWkhtbsGbwO8mq2zWQlGAanXLhY0gtmJwLfsAQG6MlV0euRdpEzZjryh-Urt4zrjKhBmPg%3D%3D)
**Someone needs to tell the Democrats about that. They still prey on the Black Community, trying to force us to vote for their Radical Agenda with the false promises of helping our community.**

But it’s all lies. We’ve seen what happens in Democrat-run areas – crime runs rampant, homelessness reaches new heights, and the income disparity is stark.

**Meanwhile, the Democrats line their own pockets and profit off of our suffering.**

Then, they promise us they’ll fix the problems they created – only if we vote for them again. They think we’ll be slaves and servants to their agenda, but I’m putting a stop to that.

_**It’s a never-ending cycle, and I’m trying to break the wheel.**_

It’s long past due that Minnesota elected a Black Senator to Washington, D.C. I ran against Ilhan Omar in 2022 and Amy Klobuchar in 2024. I came up short both times, but I learned a lot about what it takes to win.

The Democrats are engulfed in millions of dollars sent to them from George Soros and Hollywood Elites. It’s nearly impossible to break through and win in Minnesota, but I’ve gotten closer and closer each attempt, and now I’m ready to finally win.

**The only way we break through once and for all is with a strong grassroots movement.** [**If you can chip in just $10 before midnight, it will go a long way to FLIPPING Minnesota RED.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b270e63b0fbb46d8af034b1807059799&_e=iyoKNeEzjWUFtQy650WZ4k39haMCbMgbjDyu4CowAfg5fe9Kat8mdBRF1KZqMaNornQzDcVfi-QnJC1y_uBWpS1BJGX24hMfKiZ4pg2vrj-g9dMUjS9ya5_LR9ZJLC1lnLM4G3zIut9CN6CnceEoHtDh9OzbEL-d9XLJM2sQojhNnDJk3Or7dlvb27eRv7xQf6LxGInvsOxIFYTU_Z8B76CbCXpZuvl1wogoKf2DrCEcgeJDBnd2p0oLskerIpklAiJaNNCitcuoDNLRYSvw_WP4NIQeU2588_qrMuGQdwTcKJRLi57OhGZ7F_1sgO_RgRGQfLiwMV8yfhTn7zgCYw%3D%3D)

| [ **CHIP IN $10** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b270e63b0fbb46d8af034b1807059799&_e=iyoKNeEzjWUFtQy650WZ4k39haMCbMgbjDyu4CowAfg5fe9Kat8mdBRF1KZqMaNornQzDcVfi-QnJC1y_uBWpS1BJGX24hMfKiZ4pg2vrj-g9dMUjS9ya5_LR9ZJLC1lnLM4G3zIut9CN6CnceEoHmbxprAihGycBm62Qzop74mhBB_LpckKZfVdjP4awklRqj62Ocglrsyd47SyCZM3MAcE-UYcDRC0TBqf05k6SRpn_e6JJ5_eUeS96PNEm7Y5lvB1f4rs-wiTkGgVobBAWpSYffKi2WC0W8xDFyOVmJBuvbDfPJhgnk7eMEPetu40fRFDTYRBWi206GqbLht3RQ%3D%3D)
---

[**Will you help me honor President Lincoln’s historic Emancipation Proclamation by helping me win my election to become Minnesota’s first-ever Black Senator?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b270e63b0fbb46d8af034b1807059799&_e=iyoKNeEzjWUFtQy650WZ4k39haMCbMgbjDyu4CowAfg5fe9Kat8mdBRF1KZqMaNornQzDcVfi-QnJC1y_uBWpS1BJGX24hMfKiZ4pg2vrj-g9dMUjS9ya5_LR9ZJLC1lnLM4G3zIut9CN6CnceEoHtDh9OzbEL-d9XLJM2sQojhNnDJk3Or7dlvb27eRv7xQp5aPyVQY34t6mdJQftvkJW7apMXPFd-rHp7CY0KrVgCL2kptXHzZYCcrJrozztKO9qpOVNDwu2CQ5f9CllJCApBPf-U5FmpPTj6wLK7QUydyB38C9xyqP79TKHn4DasfdbxbTUDbRo1uuN4G2DTuHA%3D%3D)

Thank you,
Royce White

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b270e63b0fbb46d8af034b1807059799&_e=iyoKNeEzjWUFtQy650WZ4k39haMCbMgbjDyu4CowAfg5fe9Kat8mdBRF1KZqMaNornQzDcVfi-QnJC1y_uBWpS1BJGX24hMfKiZ4pg2vrj-g9dMUjS9ya5_LR9ZJLC1lnLM4G3zIut9CN6CnceEoHtDh9OzbEL-d9XLJM2sQojhNnDJk3Or7dlvb27eRv7xQRuRWLrwv62Q9gpZrdulO3Iv6na-bHalT8mhr6PG91-pfbEeBv4Ad5qSTPE8TFz9pmhHLmhEqKeo1hP5g6nRMyovw-DECz2FDcNd7VwFiJm52yz2RL5KADwQhWyIZuWsgW1QiCGP8ydEWh_Tyf3D2aQ%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b270e63b0fbb46d8af034b1807059799&_e=iyoKNeEzjWUFtQy650WZ4k39haMCbMgbjDyu4CowAfg5fe9Kat8mdBRF1KZqMaNornQzDcVfi-QnJC1y_uBWpS1BJGX24hMfKiZ4pg2vrj-g9dMUjS9ya5_LR9ZJLC1lnLM4G3zIut9CN6CnceEoHtDh9OzbEL-d9XLJM2sQojhNnDJk3Or7dlvb27eRv7xQg_xdVylHI3ENK5ClamWmps87YfJtQ_zhfynGGY3BD_OPAUhbo5541Zsb8yVu7zJP_FQlSVfm2azguKdmwAELPltffPeo0pmkrqbrbne_0I8KAj05lsCmGD6VJ4gINCJQfCxVNb8u0KXhhYcooBM1jQ%3D%3D)

---

name: Blake Gendebien
subject: This is why they’re keeping Elise Stefanik in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Three weeks ago, the Administration withdrew Elise Stefanik’s nomination to be the U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations.
| [](https://fight4progress.org/gendebien?t=auk1CYYo7CRY&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-16_1&amount=25)
---
Peter, it’s Democrat Blake Gendebien. Fight For Progress said I could reach out with an update on our race in NY-21.

Three weeks ago, the Administration withdrew Elise Stefanik’s nomination to be the U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations.

**It’s clear: they are scared.**

They’ve seen what we’ve been able to accomplish in just a few months. Thousands of grassroots donors have stepped up to help send a dairy farmer to Congress, and voters across the North Country are ready to elect a leader who will actually fight for them.

Our opponents know we had a real shot at winning this race, so they’re keeping Elise Stefanik in Congress to help them cut Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare and give more tax cuts to billionaires.

**But, Peter, I’m not giving up. It doesn’t matter who I’m running against or when the election might be – I’m still committed to representing the community that raised me.**

[_**As we get ready for next November, I need your support to continue moving forward. Will you split a donation between me and Fight For Progress today to help us prepare for what’s ahead?**_](https://fight4progress.org/gendebien?t=4O2Gxc8t8X3P&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-16_1&amount=25)
| | | [ CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://fight4progress.org/gendebien?t=Nre7EfT2PFOF&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-16_1&amount=5)

Blake

name: Voter Verification 2025 Polling Team
subject: This is not a drill, friend
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1lmvdrfsbqyfdtpr4qglqtgavvcqa15tlrjh6150xkpylbmqtnd1nxo4r0p4d217hbmenvygbozwzcxw6xb&__stmp=sutzu2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sutzu2&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dkb8zk3lmhbje8wtz8o6eijmpgse5p4x6pxqtkp3wlgcmjuubtuve07o8nzwph9ocniw4i1oja6b929j3rshjl25r44case8xoasop44b7ag757ti2wvvetogoyt38431bpenvcubd1etzzfcb9b&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sutzu2&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sutzu2&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sutzu2&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sutzu2&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dkb8zk3lmhbje8wtz8o6eijmztv8p52rkmeg74ccdosx588srb5bkvzgqgd9gsaqy8ki5rt80o10x5ldiwwdwxni40jbxr38u3vn6h4d1zcou2iajla66e3yv9iqw1zzpl3540puwedtlod4apbq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sutzu2&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sutzu2&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
I’ll never stop fighting to protect California families.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250416&t=1&akid=1740%2E1088799%2EF55WI0)
Hey, it's Rob.
We’re now just over halfway through April, so I wanted to take a moment to share what I’ve been working on. But first, **[can you help fuel my work by chipping in $5 to my campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250416?refcode=em20250416-1740&amount=5&refcode2=1740_1088799_F55WI0&akid=1740%2E1088799%2EF55WI0)**
I won’t back down when Trump tries to bully California – especially when he tries to cut funding for our schools, libraries, and public health programs; attempts to gut the civil service; or signs unconstitutional executive orders that attack our rights.
I’m working with my partners in the legislature to **advocate for legislation to protect us from corporate greed.** Senate Bill 763, which I announced with State Senator Melissa Hurtado (D-Bakersfield), increases penalties on companies that break antitrust laws – ensuring they can’t rip off hard working families just to pad their profits.
And as California’s top cop, I’m making sure **our office is hard at working protecting our communities from those seeking to do harm.** That means:
* Arresting and charging people trying to sell illegal firearms,
* Securing up to $335 million from a company that fueled the opioid crisis,
* Protecting Californians from robocall and job recruitment scams.

This work is personal to me. I’ll never stop fighting to protect California families because with everything happening around us, the people need someone on their side.
**[If you believe in standing up to Trump, taking on corporate greed, and protecting our communities, I’m asking you to make a donation to my campaign today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250416?refcode=em20250416-1740&amount=5&refcode2=1740_1088799_F55WI0&akid=1740%2E1088799%2EF55WI0)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250416?refcode=em20250416-1740&amount=5&refcode2=1740_1088799_F55WI0&akid=1740%2E1088799%2EF55WI0)**
In solidarity,
Rob Bonta
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250416&t=3&refcode2=1740_1088799_F55WI0&akid=1740%2E1088799%2EF55WI0)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1740%2E1088799%2EF55WI0)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1740%2E1088799%2EF55WI0)

To give by check:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
Email us: [info@robbonta.com](mailto:info@robbonta.com)
PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642

Senator Cory Gardner is the Chairman of the Senate Leadership Fund. As a former Senator from Colorado and U.S. Congressman in Colorado's district 4, Gardner's role now focuses on making and keeping a Senate Republican majority. Gardner is the perfect person to walk us through the 2026 Senate Midterm elections. With President Trump adding Jd Vance as Vice President and Marco Rubio as Secretary of State, 2 special elections will take place in Ohio and Florida. Both those states are Republican strongholds with Lieutenant Governor Jon Husted in Ohio and Senator Ashley Moody in Florida are expected to hold their seats. We then dive into current ruby red states and seats that both Gardner and I expect Republican to hold. As for the Democrats, we cover all the states in their favor, including strongholds like Oregon and Massachusetts that they expect to win. The swing states in play are shaping up for some very competitive races and Gardner gives us the inside look at the races and candidates shaping the elections. Make sure you watch to the end to see if Republicans could walk away with a majority in 2026.
Featuring:
**Senator Cory Gardner**
Chairman | Senate Leadership Fund
Former U.S. Senator, Colorado
Former U.S. Congressman, Colorado, District 4 https://www.senateleadershipfund.org/

2. The incumbent is deeply CORRUPT-- he is under FBI investigation and his bribery trial starts later this year
3. Pres. Trump WON this district-- meaning a strong MAGA warrior can 100% win

If that is all you need to hear, I encourage you in the strongest possible terms to become a founding donor to my brand new campaign! LGMVvP7LCqpnNoOQj8AnPExGfhFoeS4CiQWfzmphUyI1JYV0LP7ATc8Y7FQYBJi3Dhco6HE5NGJeaA1wVYEYooJ0ZrVcLL9vbTQVuU0rvI1GtZo3rmph-cu5ce746356mHQkZ8-iiyE8Ex8mDxfE_JnB3MIfSdBsDxhxOClfFJcCursGat1gIW_R5BIrRKsPHles9PiqoSix_fmDB6N2sllDqyOIorohmncZrRxkrv_TWA9QM0j7VEA85iIvpX_oZfm1FBGE3MSH3f7vqb6CgJl04TP34DQoaX5lRhnEFPLNtfvhONlCdz81R1tF6XCp4F9w_SN6ADwdA_a7gM)I will tell you this--
Hispanic communities are fertile ground for Conservatives. That is why Latinos SURGED toward President Trump and won Republicans the House, the Senate, and the presidency. Now we can flip this seat too, and save our MAGA House Majority in the process. Unfortunately, that will not be a walk in the park.

This was a real wake-up call for us. So I’m here to explain our strategy to fight back. If you can chip in anything to help us out, I’ll leave a link [_**here**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105965179/539973357/-1071877382?&refcode=E12964-20250416-PlanofAttack-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQxYjY2MmMtMGYxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PGdkoTbV98tUfxPONNTMuF8D5p6mUMbrOdi7v4XiS5o=). **Situational awareness:** As you know, Josh’s seat is a toss-up district because he’s one of the few Democrats representing a district Trump won. Josh is literally at the top of Speaker Mike Johnson’s list of Democrats to take out. Josh also doesn’t accept corporate money which means all the special interests also aren’t fans of his (because they can’t control him). So, when you combine those two facts, it’s not a surprise that Josh is being attacked with large sums of money incredibly early in the cycle. **Our strategy:** We’re quickly developing a plan on how we’re going to respond to the GOP’s new ad blitz. It’s going to include everything from early organizing investments to our first digital ads in Spanish. We know we have to respond to the ads quickly, and we know we have to do it in a way that spends our money wisely. We believe field and digital are two smart investments. [_**That’s why I’m coming to you for help. clean_body: How we’re responding. | = | Hi Peter, As Josh explained yesterday, we are currently being hit with a massive new attack campaign from one of the GOP’s biggest groups - and it came earlier than we ever expected. This was a real wake-up call for us. So I’m here to explain our strategy to fight back. If you can chip in anything to help us out, I’ll leave a link =. Situational awareness: As you know, Josh’s seat is a toss-up district because he’s one of the few Democrats representing a district Trump won. Josh is literally at the top of Speaker Mike Johnson’s list of Democrats to take out. Josh also doesn’t accept corporate money which means all the special interests also aren’t fans of his (because they can’t control him). So, when you combine those two facts, it’s not a surprise that Josh is being attacked with large sums of money incredibly early in the cycle. Our strategy: We’re quickly developing a plan on how we’re going to respond to the GOP’s new ad blitz. It’s going to include everything from early organizing investments to our first digital ads in Spanish. We know we have to respond to the ads quickly, and we know we have to do it in a way that spends our money wisely. We believe field and digital are two smart investments. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- \- Michael Hammer Finance Director, Harder for Congress *

name: Senator Ted Cruz
subject: A proven warrior is stepping up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
Mike Rogers is running for Senate. Let me tell you why that should matter to you, even if you don’t live in Michigan.

| | | Friend, _[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=15edb05125fb4e5aa5f53db2c8cb4c43&_e=dWoDvMV7wUdMAkoVLD7Gf8bT5muF6NrzG9mkdVu5NmsmvGDdpFxDz8znozqO0Lbfu0-pQKf4gt5cMBxi-MWQJPnIXHNO_Ad5AtmtTn9leUowJoRbw8SI2N7T5RWuG_7VmKqLcVuaTyplaXE_MMHwYZ3cosG2SctHTqUwpb_O6AEep0jdFOOS8ImIV3CPylOrw5Aii76cFQBQeNcEvCTR3rBlVvDrrjsNjOGeM6YloQYkrBK3K54TZiE72USdzAD2eFmysKP3WaA-e3ukJmXdNpwIoPBBWzyZKSx2-ZJodfvRh5Ldcvv267ebLhzLWMyFA6pR65099q3z8-Bgfd60AWClP7JlRYkTBkpJ6iNlfxG6xGNxk-KJKgLHebI68wnaU2eZRsb2b5Z-MLZO7hgM9JvYRLcVL2xThEPytO2iRzKRz_JmsIbsBYrBuIiwZmlv8rnQtGv2sKvCjrFUHsy-lg%3D%3D)_ When I say America needs more fighters in Washington, I mean it. That’s why I’m proud to support my friend Mike Rogers in Michigan’s Senate race. Mike is a warfighter. A former Army officer. An FBI agent who’s gone toe-to-toe with some of America’s worst criminals. And a Congressman who stood firm against the Left before it was fashionable to do so. _**[Mike’s running to flip Michigan red—and I’ll tell you this: We need him in the Senate.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=15edb05125fb4e5aa5f53db2c8cb4c43&_e=dWoDvMV7wUdMAkoVLD7Gf8bT5muF6NrzG9mkdVu5NmsHhHeeNRnaRPY8knwciw4L3ijoCxysEqBm7nh-Ys8Y5wLJttgsH89_DWee5P2SPmUy8Llo7t_u3iK21PZ28_I34EMZGoaNBfkuY5pPsjMWx9yVw7QZsKtDRh3-CL5Jx0WzxiJINzgtfDJw-bZLC3HiEqG_xetUOGqg8DNFgdehIs86v4L5_EozE48ISkRpSzOFfQhRNzQarw6WXsSL9KEPdSHvtZ3rKJL8Kb97R7yb4m44DQUmgJqTEW8vMMVPiBzoLUOAJwErDv1UJzehRV8iiiJQJKbQXijaZZIejWXPtQFzrGMQa0geEp-rUX1BGRD-3JnyNHf42R3eEe6hgIfIUp1PkJwFWmEQ3MUFGYfEZbnnh1Uz-_JgwUVpIOyGdkSLbi0c425PD5Q8Zh8IbVDNwzHah0yPYlwBdlziKoJqpg%3D%3D)**_ He’s the kind of leader who will: **👉 Always keep our southern border secure****👉 Defend the Constitution without apology****👉 Back law enforcement and clean up crime** **👉 Stand up to China and bring jobs home** _**[The Democrats know this race could decide the balance of power in the Senate. They’ll spend MILLIONS trying to stop Mike.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=15edb05125fb4e5aa5f53db2c8cb4c43&_e=dWoDvMV7wUdMAkoVLD7Gf8bT5muF6NrzG9mkdVu5NmsHhHeeNRnaRPY8knwciw4L3ijoCxysEqBm7nh-Ys8Y5wLJttgsH89_DWee5P2SPmUy8Llo7t_u3iK21PZ28_I34EMZGoaNBfkuY5pPsjMWx9yVw7QZsKtDRh3-CL5Jx0WzxiJINzgtfDJw-bZLC3HiEqG_xetUOGqg8DNFgdehIs86v4L5_EozE48ISkRpSzOFfQhRNzQarw6WXsSL9KEPdSHvtZ3rKJL8Kb97R7yb4m44DQUmgJqTEW8vMMVPiBw2Yd8NDGp8mslTnYgIgpf3mD0DqfJMMki_s2YY4caaxSYkBC3vcsauoH3iyC0aY3U4GquzrtUx_1pfOXRc8ETrvL4e-ixNn_iAvP_Sk7Wsh-rbs-4bTxUe-1SBxdjke8YZLl6elwf2vVB4XcgKD-9mGTSox8ehXw6cbFVhc-Jgjw%3D%3D)**_ Let’s stop them before they even get started. Can you pitch in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to help Mike Rogers take back Michigan—and protect our Republican Majority?
---
[**Donate Now**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=15edb05125fb4e5aa5f53db2c8cb4c43&_e=dWoDvMV7wUdMAkoVLD7Gf8bT5muF6NrzG9mkdVu5NmsHhHeeNRnaRPY8knwciw4L3ijoCxysEqBm7nh-Ys8Y5wLJttgsH89_DWee5P2SPmUy8Llo7t_u3iK21PZ28_I34EMZGoaNBfkuY5pPsjMWx9yVw7QZsKtDRh3-CL5Jx0WzxiJINzgtfDJw-bZLC3HiEqG_xetUOGqg8DNFgdehIs86v4L5_EozE48ISkRpSzOFfQhRNzQarw6WXsSL9KEPdSHvtZ3rKJL8Kb97R7yb4m44DQUmgJqTEW8vMMVPiBz6N0rp4HyUNoC5V9UY96uSRpruP55tZ9ECs2IFYSpfqfJiBjluo0TMtXdY3oluDjTntGmCZ1qIK2OhylZtTprscdQRIj4Xs3t3TFjFlxd4UnhV3i6I3ndNXrtNEzsc_qQWOOWMETMnVuYN0nKPY_X3bFv_qgnA7YInv2h1P5dAoA%3D%3D)

| **As DOGE and the Trump administration cut corners at the expense of hardworking families, Hillary is fighting back.**

**▶️ **Demanding accountability and transparency through the CLEAR Act

**▶️ **Protecting Reproductive Access

**▶️ **Working to support small businesses in rural and low-income areas

**The next few years will require leaders in Congress who fight for us, not billionaires. name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: Hard-earned benefits
body:
| | Peter – For nearly 90 years, Social Security has helped to protect seniors and allow them to retire with dignity, and it remains a critical resource for millions of Americans today.

**But Peter, Social Security and other programs like Medicare are under attack like never before.**

I will always protect Medicare and Social Security, and I’m committed to ensuring seniors in Southwest Washington receive the benefits they’ve earned throughout their careers of hard work.

[Are you with me, Peter? Add your name now if you support protecting these vital programs:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105966448/539977868/526531515?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_90DO_250416_1_1&refcode2=4a38c7bb-131b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTM4YzdiYi0xMzFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tzsvm9apPkSClyIpw7x3KJkL1NipkJqEGIWrg6soKqY=&emci=94da269c-081b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=4a38c7bb-131b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=31138575)

Far-right extremists aren’t hiding their plans to privatize Social Security and cut benefits for some of our most vulnerable neighbors.

Just recently, a flurry of rule changes and staff cuts have left Americans seeking retirement or survivor benefits to face unnecessary hurdles in accessing these services, or unable to access them altogether.

Hardworking seniors have earned these benefits, and efforts to rip them away are downright cruel.

[Help me support these hard-earned benefits by signing on today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105966454/539977874/526531515?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_90DO_250416_1_1&refcode2=4a38c7bb-131b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTM4YzdiYi0xMzFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tzsvm9apPkSClyIpw7x3KJkL1NipkJqEGIWrg6soKqY=&emci=94da269c-081b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=4a38c7bb-131b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=31138575)

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Someone’s profiting off Trump’s chaos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Call volume spiked minutes before Trump’s tariff pause announcement. The American people deserve answers.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250416-4954-footer&t=1&akid=4954%2E420207%2ElfAuSg)
Peter, just minutes before Donald Trump announced a pause on his reckless new tariffs, trading in call options suddenly spiked.
That kind of timing doesn’t happen by accident.
[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250416?refcode=em20250416-4954&:amount=3&refcode2=4954_420207_lfAuSg&akid=4954%2E420207%2ElfAuSg)
This reeks of insider trading and market manipulation. It raises serious questions about who had access to nonpublic information and who used it to make a quick buck while millions of working people braced for economic chaos.
**Let’s be clear:** Trump’s economic policies are already hurting everyday families. But if his allies are lining their pockets _on top of that?_
_**That’s corruption, plain and simple.**_
We need answers. We need accountability. And we need leaders in Washington who will fight for real reforms – like banning stock trading by members of Congress and public officials.
That’s exactly what Pramila is fighting for. But if we’re going to win this fight, we need a grassroots movement behind her. [**Will you pitch in $3 right now to help Pramila hold the powerful accountable and build a government that puts people before profits?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250416?refcode=em20250416-4954&amount=3&refcode2=4954_420207_lfAuSg&akid=4954%2E420207%2ElfAuSg)

Thank you for being in this fight with us.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

name: The Democratic Party
subject: 3 things we’re doing right now
body:
---
Derek, We heard from thousands of Democrats last month about how to reshape the DNC’s strategic direction. With this guidance, we have:
* **Launched the People’s Cabinet,** an initiative that brings together experts and community leaders who will cut through the lies and speak directly to the American people about the destruction of the Trump administration.
* **Set up a new War Room operation** to combat the far-right’s lies and streamline the DNC’s communications, research, and mobilization operations.
* **Hosted People’s Town Halls** in districts where Republican Representatives are hiding from constituents rather than showing up and doing their jobs.

**This is just the beginning.** We’re building and strengthening the Democratic Party to fight back against Trump, protect our democracy and fundamental freedoms, and elect Democrats this year, next year, and beyond. But the truth is that these programs take a lot of resources to sustain. And it’s supporters like you who give $3, $5, or even $10 at a time that help keep these efforts running so we are in the strongest possible position right now and for the fights ahead. [**If this work and fighting for our democracy is important to you, can you chip in $3 to the DNC today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250416_3203_fr&refcode2=3203_22930333_Vw7krf&akid=3203%2E22930333%2EVw7krf) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250416_3203_fr&refcode2=3203_22930333_Vw7krf&akid=3203%2E22930333%2EVw7krf)**

clean_body: We need to fight back against the radical leftists. | | | | Peter, it's Speaker Johnson. I'm reaching out to you about your 2025 House Majority Membership. Look, I have to be honest: I need you on my team. So I'm reaching out to you today to personally ask you to reactivate your 2025 House Majority Membership. "Please activate your exclusive membership today and join the team working to expand our conservative Majority in 2025. " | | | "ACTIVATE YOUR MEMBERSHIP" Democrats are going FULL THROTTLE in 2025. That means we need all hands on deck, and you play an essential part in our goal to stop them! Activating your membership might not feel like a huge step towards growing our Majority and beating the Radical Left Democrats, but let me assure you, it makes all the difference. Let me tell you why. By activating your membership today, you will be: Supporting conservatives across the nation as they go on the offensive and bring the fight to the Radical Democrats Growing our efforts to hold the Deep State and the Radical Left accountable for their corruption, failures, and lies Becoming an essential part of defending our conservative Majority and fighting for America First values | | | "ACTIVATE YOUR 2025 MEMBERSHIP" "I hope to see your name on the list of 2025 House GOP Members soon, Peter!"** Thank you and God bless, | Speaker Mike Johnson | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Liz Cheney
subject: Zoe Lofgren is an unsung hero
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | Dear Peter,

My friend Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is an unsung hero for defending our democracy and our Constitution.

I had not known Zoe well before our work together on the House Select Committee to Investigate the January 6th attack on the United States Capitol, but I was aware of her reputation as one of the most effective and respected Members of the House of Representatives. She is a thoughtful and serious member, and she operates with zero ego — a rarity in Congress.

Zoe has been a source of wisdom and good judgment for me and many Members in Congress. Although we don’t share many views on politics or public policy, I can assure you that we need Zoe in Congress and on the frontlines as we continue to protect and secure the future of our democracy.

We all must look beyond party and support people like Zoe who will defend the Constitution, someone we know will do the right thing. _We need good, smart, honest and honorable people in elected office._

[**_With your help we can make sure Zoe has the resources needed to stay in Congress and continue the important work of defending our Constitution. Please join me in supporting her and contributing $10 today._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105966578/539978209/-1469323401?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-04-16_LIZ_ZOL_ES-21491_RS&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmRlYjQ2ZC0xNDFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1GsCyftlUIQOOePv9B4F2wP9UkZJfgXI2MOWBtmoKhs=)

I hope I can count on you to join me. [**_We need to support and stand with Zoe now!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105966579/539978210/-1469323401?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-04-16_LIZ_ZOL_ES-21491_RS&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmRlYjQ2ZC0xNDFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1GsCyftlUIQOOePv9B4F2wP9UkZJfgXI2MOWBtmoKhs=)

Best,

Liz Cheney

subject: Our first week - thank you!

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250416-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250416-email]
Peter,
We just wrapped up our first week on the campaign trail, and we’re off to an incredible start.
Because of your support, and the support of so many Coloradans who believe in Jena’s vision for equality and justice for all, we raised over $230,000 from 1,100 individual donations in the campaign's first 48 hours.
That’s the power of a grassroots movement. People from every corner of Colorado are stepping up to support Jena’s fight.
Whether you gave $1 or $100, your support is helping us build a campaign that’s ready to take on extremists, defend reproductive freedom, and protect the rights of every Coloradan.
Thank you for being part of this movement.
Team Griswold

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: I’ll get right to it:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
I’ll get right to it: Republicans are leaving the American people behind.

The Holocaust Encyclopedia defines a concentration camp as [follows](https://substack.com/redirect/b2f97dc5-f43f-405b-b0f9-0bbd45558b63?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> What distinguishes a concentration camp from a prison (in the modern sense) is that it functions outside of a judicial system. The prisoners are not indicted or convicted of any crime by judicial process.
That's not a historical footnote--it's a warning. And today, it's happening again.
Mahmoud Khalil was here legally.
Rumeysa Ozturk was here legally.
Kilmar Abrego Garcia was here legally.
Yet they are all detained, disappeared, or deported without trial, without conviction, without any due process. Languishing in government ordered confinement, their incarceration can _only_ be described as a Concentration Camp. **Let 's Address This.**
**Let's Address This is made possibly by you --the thoughtful person reading this. Add your email below and subscribe to our movement for justice.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..AgzT3Xme7lpld_SatYY0Vbji0piyDLxn21z6RdLvvmo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=161488003)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/29187ebd-ce5a-4f66-a482-701b6877039b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
El Salvador's president has offered to incarcerate criminals deported from the US at The Terrorism Confinement Center, a mega-prison intentionally isolated from urban areas that can accommodate up to 40,000 inmates. via Secretaria de Prensa de la Presidencia
The Trump regime's horrific treatment of a growing number of Black and brown (and yes, documented) immigrants is proof of one thing: When MAGA Republicans claim they "just want legal immigration," they are lying. What they actually want--what they've always actually wanted--is to end non-white immigration entirely, just as it was before the 1965 Immigration and Nationality Act. That's what the "Again" in "Make America Great Again" has always meant: a return to Jim Crow America. A return to white Christian nationalism by any means necessary.
This isn't speculation. This is policy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7cd3463f-f39c-488d-b7ad-7d4f9271efa1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A non-comprehensive list of Black and brown immigrants not charged with any crime, but arrested, detained, and/or deported without due process of law for the "crime" of criticizing U.S. foreign policy.
Take the case of Kilmar Abrego Garcia. This week Maryland Senator Chris Van Hollen traveled to El Salvador to fight for his release. He discovered something that should horrify every American: El Salvador admits Kilmar committed no crime, that they have no evidence that he committed any crime--and the U.S. government is paying El Salvador to keep him locked away. This despite the US Supreme Court ruling 9-0 that Garcia should be returned to the United States immediately.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1c4a4924-f89d-4991-88cf-893d3cd22b6a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A picture of Kilmar Abrego Garcia and his son. Photo: Alex Wong/Getty
This is a Constitutional Crisis of the highest order. An American president is defying a direct order from the U.S. Supreme Court. He's sending innocent people--_legal immigrants_ --to foreign black sites and demanding other governments build more camps to detain more people. Caught on a hot mic last week, Trump remarked to El Salvador's president to build at least five more of these facilities because Trump wants to send "home grown" people there soon. That's not immigration policy. That's not national security. That is fascism. And yes--those are concentration camps.
## Fascism Is Unoriginal
We've seen this playbook before. As Princeton Professor James Q. Whitman documents in his landmark book, _Hitler 's American Model_, Hitler explicitly based the Nazi racial purity laws on the United States' Jim Crow laws.
Today's GOP is taking it full circle.
And while Black and brown people are being kidnapped, deported, and tortured for speaking out, consider that KKK terrorists--who murdered over 5,000 Black Americans that we know of--continue to exist freely under the guise of "free speech." That's not justice. That's not law and order. That's the core of American fascism--where whiteness is protected and every other identity is criminalized by default.
**If you 're finding value in this human rights content, please subscribe to support our advocacy.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..AgzT3Xme7lpld_SatYY0Vbji0piyDLxn21z6RdLvvmo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=161488003)
## We Must Uphold Justice Over Politics
Moreover, while it might hurt to hear this part, do not make the mistake of thinking this is just a MAGA problem. A shocking 60 Democratic members of Congress--House and Senate combined--helped pass the fascist Laken Riley Act, which allows the federal government to deport immigrants on the mere accusation of a crime, without evidence or conviction. About the Laken Riley Act, the National Immigration Council [warned](https://substack.com/redirect/a47a5044-dcb4-45df-a925-95208139faff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> The bill eliminates due process for many immigrants, including some who have been living and working legally in the U.S. for years. Under this law, they would be placed in indefinite detention if accused--not convicted--of low-level crimes like shoplifting. That could include children who are mistakenly arrested and accused of crimes they did not commit. **" This bill does nothing to improve safety or fix our broken immigration system. Under the guise of preventing violence, the bill forces immigration officers to indefinitely detain and deport non-citizens who pose no public safety risk, without access to basic due process. The bill also gives state attorneys general unprecedented power over immigration policy. The bill strips people of their basic rights and upends how the U.S. government enforces immigration law," **said Nayna Gupta, policy director at the American Immigration Council.
And yet, 60 Democrats voted YES on this fascist bill and helped make it law. Who are they? Well, the 12 Senate Democrats who voted for it are as follows:
* Arizona: Mark Kelly, Ruben Gallego
* Nevada: Jacky Rosen, Catherine Cortez Masto
* New Hampshire: Maggie Hassan, Jeanne Shaheen
* Georgia: Jon Ossoff, Raphael Warnock
* Michigan: Gary Peters, Elissa Slotkin
* Virginia: Mark Warner
* Pennsylvania: John Fetterman

These 12 Democrats helped overcome the filibuster requirement and ensured this unjust piece of legislation became law. And while Republicans could in theory pass this bill through the House without any Democratic support, 48 House Democrats joined Republicans anyway. [See full list linked at bottom of article]1
So when these same Democrats post statements of concern about Mahmoud Khalil, Rumeysa Ozturk, or Kilmar Abrego Garcia or about the importance of due process of law and Constitutional rights--just know they helped make this fascism possible. We need a true opposition party, and right now too many Democrats are failing at fulfilling that obligation to the American people or to the United States Constitution.
And finally, let's not forget the enablers who stood by as fascism advanced in America. We are here because of a comprehensive failure of leadership, and it is important we recognize this fact.
Mitch McConnell admitted on January 6 that Trump was responsible for the violent insurrection, and then he voted to acquit him of wrongdoing. Knowing all this, former Attorney General Merrick Garland "stuck to norms" and refused to prosecute Trump, even as the law demanded it. He chose to protect the illusion of institutional decorum over the survival of democracy itself. And of course, as the Supreme Court gave Trump near-total immunity last year, Trump is now using that immunity to ignore the Court entirely. Honestly, who could have seen this coming? (_Spoiler alert: everyone with eyes, a conscience, or a basic understanding of history._)
## Conclusion
We must say it plainly and clearly. We are in a Constitutional Crisis. The United States Government is building concentration camps in foreign nations to disappear people it doesn't like--not because they committed any form of crime--but because the President has decided that the US Constitution is not worth upholding. I am unsure what Democratic Party leadership needs to see to recognize that this is a Constitutional Crisis, and we are already under a five-alarm fire. We need more leaders like Senator Chris Van Hollen to demonstrate that it is not enough to merely resist fascism--we need a true opposition party.
Otherwise, we may not make it to Mid-term elections.
**I am doing everything in my power to raise awareness on human rights and justice. I cannot do it alone. I hope you consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**

clean_body: Donald Trump is sending people to concentration camps in El Salvador and in defiance of the U.S. Supreme Court--this is a Constitutional Crisis | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! Donald Trump is sending people to concentration camps in El Salvador and in defiance of the U.S. Supreme Court--this is a Constitutional Crisis | | | Apr 16 | | | | | | | | | | | | The Holocaust Encyclopedia defines a concentration camp as : What distinguishes a concentration camp from a prison (in the modern sense) is that it functions outside of a judicial system. The prisoners are not indicted or convicted of any crime by judicial process. That's not a historical footnote--it's a warning. And today, it's happening again. Mahmoud Khalil was here legally. Rumeysa Ozturk was here legally. Kilmar Abrego Garcia was here legally. Yet they are all detained, disappeared, or deported without trial, without conviction, without any due process. Languishing in government ordered confinement, their incarceration can only be described as a Concentration Camp. Let 's Address This. Let's Address This is made possibly by you --the thoughtful person reading this. Add your email below and subscribe to our movement for justice. | | ---|---|--- El Salvador's president has offered to incarcerate criminals deported from the US at The Terrorism Confinement Center, a mega-prison intentionally isolated from urban areas that can accommodate up to 40,000 inmates. via Secretaria de Prensa de la Presidencia The Trump regime's horrific treatment of a growing number of Black and brown (and yes, documented) immigrants is proof of one thing: When MAGA Republicans claim they "just want legal immigration," they are lying. What they actually want--what they've always actually wanted--is to end non-white immigration entirely, just as it was before the 1965 Immigration and Nationality Act. That's what the "Again" in "Make America Great Again" has always meant: a return to Jim Crow America. A return to white Christian nationalism by any means necessary. This isn't speculation. This is policy. | | ---|---|--- A non-comprehensive list of Black and brown immigrants not charged with any crime, but arrested, detained, and/or deported without due process of law for the "crime" of criticizing U.S. foreign policy. Take the case of Kilmar Abrego Garcia. This week Maryland Senator Chris Van Hollen traveled to El Salvador to fight for his release. He discovered something that should horrify every American: El Salvador admits Kilmar committed no crime, that they have no evidence that he committed any crime--and the U.S. government is paying El Salvador to keep him locked away. This despite the US Supreme Court ruling 9-0 that Garcia should be returned to the United States immediately. | | ---|---|--- A picture of Kilmar Abrego Garcia and his son. Photo: Alex Wong/Getty This is a Constitutional Crisis of the highest order. An American president is defying a direct order from the U.S. Supreme Court. He's sending innocent people--legal immigrants --to foreign black sites and demanding other governments build more camps to detain more people. Caught on a hot mic last week, Trump remarked to El Salvador's president to build at least five more of these facilities because Trump wants to send "home grown" people there soon. That's not immigration policy. That's not national security. That is fascism. And yes--those are concentration camps. Fascism Is Unoriginal We've seen this playbook before. As Princeton Professor James Q. Whitman documents in his landmark book, Hitler 's American Model, Hitler explicitly based the Nazi racial purity laws on the United States' Jim Crow laws. Today's GOP is taking it full circle. And while Black and brown people are being kidnapped, deported, and tortured for speaking out, consider that KKK terrorists--who murdered over 5,000 Black Americans that we know of--continue to exist freely under the guise of "free speech." That's not justice. That's not law and order. That's the core of American fascism--where whiteness is protected and every other identity is criminalized by default. If you 're finding value in this human rights content, please subscribe to support our advocacy. We Must Uphold Justice Over Politics Moreover, while it might hurt to hear this part, do not make the mistake of thinking this is just a MAGA problem. A shocking 60 Democratic members of Congress--House and Senate combined--helped pass the fascist Laken Riley Act, which allows the federal government to deport immigrants on the mere accusation of a crime, without evidence or conviction. About the Laken Riley Act, the National Immigration Council : The bill eliminates due process for many immigrants, including some who have been living and working legally in the U.S. for years. Under this law, they would be placed in indefinite detention if accused--not convicted--of low-level crimes like shoplifting. That could include children who are mistakenly arrested and accused of crimes they did not commit. " This bill does nothing to improve safety or fix our broken immigration system. Under the guise of preventing violence, the bill forces immigration officers to indefinitely detain and deport non-citizens who pose no public safety risk, without access to basic due process. The bill also gives state attorneys general unprecedented power over immigration policy. The bill strips people of their basic rights and upends how the U.S. government enforces immigration law," said Nayna Gupta, policy director at the American Immigration Council. And yet, 60 Democrats voted YES on this fascist bill and helped make it law. Who are they? Well, the 12 Senate Democrats who voted for it are as follows: Arizona: Mark Kelly, Ruben Gallego Nevada: Jacky Rosen, Catherine Cortez Masto New Hampshire: Maggie Hassan, Jeanne Shaheen Georgia: Jon Ossoff, Raphael Warnock Michigan: Gary Peters, Elissa Slotkin Virginia: Mark Warner Pennsylvania: John Fetterman These 12 Democrats helped overcome the filibuster requirement and ensured this unjust piece of legislation became law. And while Republicans could in theory pass this bill through the House without any Democratic support, 48 House Democrats joined Republicans anyway. [See full list linked at bottom of article]1 So when these same Democrats post statements of concern about Mahmoud Khalil, Rumeysa Ozturk, or Kilmar Abrego Garcia or about the importance of due process of law and Constitutional rights--just know they helped make this fascism possible. We need a true opposition party, and right now too many Democrats are failing at fulfilling that obligation to the American people or to the United States Constitution. And finally, let's not forget the enablers who stood by as fascism advanced in America. We are here because of a comprehensive failure of leadership, and it is important we recognize this fact. Mitch McConnell admitted on January 6 that Trump was responsible for the violent insurrection, and then he voted to acquit him of wrongdoing. Knowing all this, former Attorney General Merrick Garland "stuck to norms" and refused to prosecute Trump, even as the law demanded it. He chose to protect the illusion of institutional decorum over the survival of democracy itself. And of course, as the Supreme Court gave Trump near-total immunity last year, Trump is now using that immunity to ignore the Court entirely. Honestly, who could have seen this coming? (Spoiler alert: everyone with eyes, a conscience, or a basic understanding of history.) Conclusion We must say it plainly and clearly. We are in a Constitutional Crisis. The United States Government is building concentration camps in foreign nations to disappear people it doesn't like--not because they committed any form of crime--but because the President has decided that the US Constitution is not worth upholding. I am unsure what Democratic Party leadership needs to see to recognize that this is a Constitutional Crisis, and we are already under a five-alarm fire. We need more leaders like Senator Chris Van Hollen to demonstrate that it is not enough to merely resist fascism--we need a true opposition party. Otherwise, we may not make it to Mid-term elections. I am doing everything in my power to raise awareness on human rights and justice. I cannot do it alone. I hope you consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. 1 Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

name: Team Bonta
subject: [BREAKING]: AG Bonta sues Trump admin over tariffs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
Breaking news from today:
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250416-2&t=1&akid=1741%2E1088799%2EORhDba)
Breaking news:
**Today, Rob Bonta sued the Trump Administration over its illegal use of power to impose tariffs that threaten California’s economy, people, and small businesses.** _Without authorization from Congress, the Trump Administration directed Homeland Security and Customs and Border Patrol to implement and enforce the unlawful tariffs._
Trump is acting like he’s above the law—he isn’t. It’s time to reign him in, restore stability to the economy, and uphold the U.S. Constitution.
California is the fifth largest economy in the world, and the country’s largest importer and second-largest exporter. **These chaotic and unlawful tariffs threaten _all_ Californians.**
Trade policy is no place for political games—and Rob won’t stand by while the Trump Administration takes unlawful actions that hurt our businesses, workers, and families. He’s going to the mat with everything he’s got to defend California’s economy and hold this administration accountable.
But this fight is far from over—and we need your support to keep up the pressure on the Trump admin.
**[Will you support our grassroots-fueled campaign as Rob keeps up the work to stop the Trump administration's unlawful power grabs?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250416-2?refcode=em20250416-1741&amount=5&refcode2=1741_1088799_ORhDba&akid=1741%2E1088799%2EORhDba)**
